name: Christopher Ahuja for Congress
subject: Healthcare Premiums Set to Spike in Days — Republicans Are Still Blocking Relief
body:
It's time our representatives represented us.

| | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=9dac902b5e&e=53c7d12fc7)
| | | | | |
Peter**In just days, thousands of residents across California’s 32nd Congressional District will face soaring health care costs** — because Republicans in Congress are choosing to block relief. They shut down every amendment that would have extended Affordable Care Act subsidies — protections that keep coverage affordable for working families, seniors, and small business owners. Even moderates warned that letting these subsidies expire would cause immediate harm.Still, they are digging in — ignoring the health care needs of millions.The result?At the end of the month, premiums will spike — an unaffordable shock.**Families will be forced to choose between health care, rent, and groceries**. Many who are unemployed or underemployed may cancel coverage altogether. Seniors may delay care or skip medications. Workers who need an MRI or cancer treatment are left wondering how they’ll pay.This is happening now.During the holidays.And Brad Sherman has said nothing.While our district braces for higher bills, Republicans are using health care as a political bargaining chip — a show of power at the expense of working families. This is beyond unacceptable.**In Congress, I will:**
* **Fight to extend ACA subsidies without delay**
* **Hold leadership accountable in both parties**
* **Stand with patients, not insurance company profits**
* **Refuse to stay silent while families are priced out of care**

I need you with me right now to elevate this fight. [**A contribution of $27 fuels our rapid response and voter outreach across CA-32** ](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=652eb2cdd1&e=53c7d12fc7)— so residents know exactly who is standing with them, and who isn’t.[**Donate whatever you can today to help us fight back.**](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=3b47a9357d&e=53c7d12fc7) This moment demands leadership. It demands urgency. And it demands action.**Let’s hold Congress accountable.**
---
| | **This is the fight.****Let’s Go!**[](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=beabafe3b1&e=53c7d12fc7)**Chris Ahuja****Candidate for Congress, CA-32**

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: Defying odds since 1985
body:
This work is only possible with your support. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121559914/589849189/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL45_20251218_ERMMem_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyNDJhYi02ZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEi33Xz1Zzq2pzax3Zy9Z04GC7-j6aueT5zTt03h9aM=) Dear Peter,

Whether you're new to EMILYs List or you've been with us since 1985, you are part of a movement that has changed American politics forever.

EMILYs List built a name for itself because we support Democratic pro-choice women who _defy_ the odds and never back down from a tough fight. I founded EMILYs List to help change the face of power in this country, and I know I can speak on behalf of the entire team when I say that the work will continue into 2026, 2027, and beyond. [**And that is why I want to personally invite you into our pro-choice community: Peter, will you become a 2026 EMILYs List member?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121559916/589849190/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL45_20251218_ERMMem_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyNDJhYi02ZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEi33Xz1Zzq2pzax3Zy9Z04GC7-j6aueT5zTt03h9aM=) | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121559917/589849191/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL45_20251218_ERMMem_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyNDJhYi02ZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEi33Xz1Zzq2pzax3Zy9Z04GC7-j6aueT5zTt03h9aM=)
---
Your investments in our endorsed women last cycle were the reason we were able to elect and reelect so many champions like **Mikie Sherrill** , **Abigail Spanberger** , **Ghazala Hashmi** , **Eileen Higgins** , and many more women to be the voices we need in the halls of power. Without the support, courage, and determination of pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, none of those victories would have been possible.

So, as far-right Republicans attempt to eliminate freedoms for millions of Americans, **we're rolling up our sleeves and preparing for the fight ahead. **
[**EMILYs List candidates are counting on your support, and one of the best ways to make lasting change in the fight for our rights is to become a 2026 member. So please, don't wait to join the millions who are ready to champion fearless women taking on tough battles this Election Day and beyond. Donate now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121559918/589849193/2025016083?refcode=WUEFEL45_20251218_ERMMem_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyNDJhYi02ZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEi33Xz1Zzq2pzax3Zy9Z04GC7-j6aueT5zTt03h9aM=)

clean_body: This work is only possible with your support. | = Dear Peter, Whether you're new to EMILYs List or you've been with us since 1985, you are part of a movement that has changed American politics forever. EMILYs List built a name for itself because we support Democratic pro-choice women who defy the odds and never back down from a tough fight. I founded EMILYs List to help change the face of power in this country, and I know I can speak on behalf of the entire team when I say that the work will continue into 2026, 2027, and beyond. = | = Your investments in our endorsed women last cycle were the reason we were able to elect and reelect so many champions like Mikie Sherrill , Abigail Spanberger , Ghazala Hashmi , Eileen Higgins , and many more women to be the voices we need in the halls of power. Without the support, courage, and determination of pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, none of those victories would have been possible. So, as far-right Republicans attempt to eliminate freedoms for millions of Americans, we're rolling up our sleeves and preparing for the fight ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ellen R. name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
| Peter, Mark Kelly here. They are escalating. [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2951?t=2&akid=182%2E124072%2EdyoXRr) We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this. Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again. Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them. **[Please. If you’ve got my back: Split a donation of $10 between me and Roy Cooper.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2952?t=3&akid=182%2E124072%2EdyoXRr)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Kelly and Roy Cooper:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2953?t=4&akid=182%2E124072%2EdyoXRr)

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Keeping the faith in 2026
body:
|
---
Dear neighbors,

I hope this note finds you enjoying the holiday season with your friends and family. As we prepare for the new year, I wanted to share some of my thoughts as I reflect on 2025 and the work that remains before us in 2026.

I won't sugarcoat it: this has been a hard year for so many of our communities. A year when too many families worked harder and felt like they were falling further behind as the cost of living continues to soar. A year when Washington felt stuck, disconnected, and too often focused on the politicians instead of the people. I know many of you are tired. I feel it too.

I expressed this weariness we feel in a [recent speech unpacking](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dw5eIVb8iy4Q&redir_log=420346940269293) what I see as America's spiritual crisis. I've said before that our country has a kind of low-grade fever-a sense that something isn't right. People are anxious about how they can afford health care, housing, and child care. They don't know if the American Dream is still within grasp. That frustration transcends our political divides, and it has changed our relationship with one another.
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dw5eIVb8iy4Q&redir_log=420346940269293)_Above: I discussed America 's spiritual crisis during my recent speech in Washington_
| | _[WATCH MY SPEECH ON AMERICA 'S SPIRITUAL CRISIS](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dw5eIVb8iy4Q&redir_log=420346940269293)_
---
Even so, I remain hopeful that we can create what Dr. King called the "Beloved Community." To do that, we must restore the promise of the American Dream. Only then can we once again believe in our shared fate. That's why I'm focused every day in the Senate on making everything from housing to prescription drugs more affordable for ordinary people.

I've spent my life walking with people through difficult moments as a pastor, as a father of two young children, and now as your U.S. Senator. I've learned that progress rarely comes all at once. It comes in fits and starts; it comes when ordinary people refuse to give up on the covenant we share with one another. When we remember that my children's future is tied to yours. That our success is bound together and tied in a single garment of destiny.
_Above: Meeting my constituents --no matter how small--is one of the best parts of my job_
As we head into a new year, I will keep fighting to lower costs, protect health care, defend the dignity of work, and make sure Georgia families are not left behind in Washington. I will keep speaking truth to power, even when it's uncomfortable. And I will keep the faith that light still breaks through the darkness, and our country's best days still remain ahead of us.

As a U.S. Senator for all Georgians, it is the honor of my life to fight for you and our great state. From my family to yours, I wish you a peaceful holiday season and a blessed new year.

With gratitude,
U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.
TO UNSUBSCRIBE, PLEASE CLICK [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16936.23655493.8564815.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fnewsletter-signup%2funsubscribe%2f&redir_log=564209011866492).

clean_body: | Dear neighbors, I hope this note finds you enjoying the holiday season with your friends and family. As we prepare for the new year, I wanted to share some of my thoughts as I reflect on 2025 and the work that remains before us in 2026. I won't sugarcoat it: this has been a hard year for so many of our communities. A year when too many families worked harder and felt like they were falling further behind as the cost of living continues to soar. A year when Washington felt stuck, disconnected, and too often focused on the politicians instead of the people. I know many of you are tired. I feel it too. I expressed this weariness we feel in a what I see as America's spiritual crisis. I've said before that our country has a kind of low-grade fever-a sense that something isn't right. People are anxious about how they can afford health care, housing, and child care. They don't know if the American Dream is still within grasp. That frustration transcends our political divides, and it has changed our relationship with one another. : I discussed America 's spiritual crisis during my recent speech in Washington | | Even so, I remain hopeful that we can create what Dr. King called the "Beloved Community." To do that, we must restore the promise of the American Dream. Only then can we once again believe in our shared fate. That's why I'm focused every day in the Senate on making everything from housing to prescription drugs more affordable for ordinary people. I've spent my life walking with people through difficult moments as a pastor, as a father of two young children, and now as your U.S. Senator. I've learned that progress rarely comes all at once. It comes in fits and starts; it comes when ordinary people refuse to give up on the covenant we share with one another. When we remember that my children's future is tied to yours. That our success is bound together and tied in a single garment of destiny. Above: Meeting my constituents --no matter how small--is one of the best parts of my job As we head into a new year, I will keep fighting to lower costs, protect health care, defend the dignity of work, and make sure Georgia families are not left behind in Washington. I will keep speaking truth to power, even when it's uncomfortable. And I will keep the faith that light still breaks through the darkness, and our country's best days still remain ahead of us. As a U.S. Senator for all Georgians, it is the honor of my life to fight for you and our great state. From my family to yours, I wish you a peaceful holiday season and a blessed new year. With gratitude, U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock | This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office . If you need help with a federal agency, please click .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: An utter disgrace
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Add your name if you agree that Hegseth should resign.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9316%2E5257348%2EP1cxv2)
Derek —
We've all known Pete Hegseth was the wrong choice for Secretary of Defense from the moment he was nominated.
He is incompetent, reckless, and arrogant — a dangerous combination for a Defense Secretary responsible for the safety of this country and its armed forces.
And from Day One, he’s put our service members at risk by his actions.
Remember the Signal group chat, where he and other top officials discussed military strike plans on an unsecured messaging app — without even realizing there was a reporter in the group?
That was just _one_ glaring example of his ineptitude.
Now, he is recklessly using the DoD to conduct illegal strikes in the Caribbean. The killing of shipwrecked survivors at sea is a textbook violation of the laws of war. Not only is it illegal, it is also morally repugnant.
His Signalgate misconduct put our pilots at risk, and now he is putting our sailors at risk of legal liability by ordering illegal strikes in the Caribbean, and dragging us closer to a war no American wants.
Hegseth cannot be trusted with the responsibility of such an important post, or the management of an agency of such massive size.
**[_He 's got to go._ Join me in calling on Pete Hegseth to resign. ](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2512_Hegsethresign.Qq9oYG&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251218_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9316%2E5257348%2EP1cxv2)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2512_Hegsethresign.Qq9oYG&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251218_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9316%2E5257348%2EP1cxv2)
---
Derek, this level of incompetence is dangerous, and there must be consequences.
More soon,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251218_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9316%2E5257348%2EP1cxv2)

clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! name: Shenna Bellows
subject: Tucker Carlson just attacked me, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| Friend, Over the weekend, I joined a powerful rally in Lewiston to stand in solidarity with our Somali neighbors. I shared what I believe: that no one should fear harassment or detention on the way to the doctor, picking their child up from school, or seeking help in a moment of crisis. Maine should follow in the footsteps of other states and create safe zones around hospitals, courthouses, and schools – because everyone deserves to feel safe in their community. That rally got picked up online – and Tucker Carlson got a hold of it. So yesterday, he took to his show to go on a bizarre and racist tirade about the event – and me – boasting that I “**know nothing** ,” and even suggesting I’m not from here. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121561118/589873487/114605485?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM3ZGQ3OC03M2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xDx8gy77lADVp8tQ83TTV_2cQ5FClXxUocZqRFcUAA=) Well, Tucker – my parents moved to Maine when I was two years old. We were poor. We didn’t have electricity or running water for years. My dad was a carpenter. My mom worked in a light bulb filament factory and then a greenhouse. I’ve worked hard my whole life. And that woman I was standing with on stage? That’s my dear friend, Safiya. I hired her when I served in the Legislature. She’s a force. _And yes – she’s a whole lot better than you._ I won’t be distracted by bad-faith attacks. I’m interested in doing what’s right. And here’s what I know: I know that fear has no place in our state. I know that our immigrant neighbors deserve dignity, not demonization. And I know that when you stand up for fairness, and basic human decency – the far-right will come after you. I’ve spent my entire career fighting for civil rights, equality, and democracy. And as I run for Governor of Maine, I’m not backing down now. [**If you’re with me, will you split an $3 donation between my campaign and DASS right now? clean_body: | Friend, Over the weekend, I joined a powerful rally in Lewiston to stand in solidarity with our Somali neighbors. I shared what I believe: that no one should fear harassment or detention on the way to the doctor, picking their child up from school, or seeking help in a moment of crisis. Maine should follow in the footsteps of other states and create safe zones around hospitals, courthouses, and schools – because everyone deserves to feel safe in their community. That rally got picked up online – and Tucker Carlson got a hold of it. So yesterday, he took to his show to go on a bizarre and racist tirade about the event – and me – boasting that I “know nothing ,” and even suggesting I’m not from here. = Well, Tucker – my parents moved to Maine when I was two years old. We were poor. We didn’t have electricity or running water for years. My dad was a carpenter. My mom worked in a light bulb filament factory and then a greenhouse. I’ve worked hard my whole life. And that woman I was standing with on stage? That’s my dear friend, Safiya. I hired her when I served in the Legislature. She’s a force. And yes – she’s a whole lot better than you. I won’t be distracted by bad-faith attacks. I’m interested in doing what’s right. And here’s what I know: I know that fear has no place in our state. I know that our immigrant neighbors deserve dignity, not demonization. And I know that when you stand up for fairness, and basic human decency – the far-right will come after you. I’ve spent my entire career fighting for civil rights, equality, and democracy. And as I run for Governor of Maine, I’m not backing down now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Take care, Shenna | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Can I explain?
body:
---
Hi Derek, it's Jon. If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC here: [**https://ak.democrats.org/go/ossoff**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split-2025?amount=20&refcode=em_20251218_5566_fr&refcode2=5566_22930333_LaqBnN&akid=5566%2E22930333%2ELaqBnN). Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. _But I have you, Derek._ Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.** Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. ___Let’s do it again._ So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and the DNC today. Here’s the link again: [**https://ak.democrats.org/go/ossoff**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split-2025?amount=20&refcode=em_20251218_5566_fr&refcode2=5566_22930333_LaqBnN&akid=5566%2E22930333%2ELaqBnN). _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Jon Ossoff and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split-2025?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251218_5566_fr&refcode2=5566_22930333_LaqBnN&akid=5566%2E22930333%2ELaqBnN)**

_You've been selected to participate in our rapid response poll to gauge public opinion. Please submit your answer before 11:59 PM today to help our team collect data._
It's sickening.
Trump just pardoned Honduras' former president — who was charged with drug trafficking — from federal prison.
This isn't Trump's first time helping his criminal friends.
Trump has pardoned more than 1,800 people in his second term as president — up from 237 in his first term. This includes over 1,500 January 6th insurrectionists.
Pardoning the ex-president of Honduras is just another example of Trump abusing his powers to enable his MAGA allies. That's why our team is gearing up to organize across the country and make sure we reject MAGA at the ballot box next year.
But first, we want to understand public opinion around the Trump administration's historic number of pardons this year.

name: Voter Action Project Courts
subject: Sixty years backwards?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Knocking out this leg of the Voting Rights Act -- by weakening Section 2 -- would almost certainly reconstitute state legislatures, city councils, judicial districts, and every other type of political boundary in which racial minorities could be cut off from having a voice in their government.
This kind of change would silence untold numbers of voters and spiral our fight for voting rights back sixty years. RUSH $25 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Mother Jones: Republican Justices Appear Poised to Destroy What’s Left of the Voting Rights Act [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_3&amount=25]
We'll hand this straight to Mother Jones, Team: " The Supreme Court, with its six-to-three Republican-appointed majority, appears ready to kneecap what remains of the Voting Rights Act’s protections for minority political representation. "
The descriptive language seems harsh, but the objective of these justices seems clear -- a complete dismantling of our seminal civil rights law . We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
During this week’s oral argument in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_3&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_3&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_3&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
“ Race is a part of redistricting always ,” Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, addressing the solicitor general from Louisiana, who was arguing against an existing map that had enabled the election of two Black members of Congress in his state. “ What you’re saying to us [is]...‘You can use [race] to help yourself achieve goals that reduce particular groups’ electoral participation, but you can’t use it to remedy that situation .’”
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121825_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121825_3&amount=20]

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

And in North Carolina, Roy Cooper is running in what could be the most expensive Senate race **in history.** Roy Cooper has never lost an election, but Donald Trump and national Republicans will spend _whatever it takes_ to prevent Democrats from flipping North Carolina blue.
_The Cook Political Report is calling these two races**pure toss-ups**_ , and for good reason. Republicans know that if they lose these two seats, their chances of holding the Senate evaporate.

| | | **Dry Eyes? The Problem Isn’t on the Surface**
If you’re constantly reaching for eye drops, you’re not alone—but you might be treating the _wrong problem_.
Most Americans are told to “just use drops,” yet chronic dry eye often begins inside the body—rooted in inflammation and a lack of critical omega-3s. That’s why drops offer a few minutes of comfort... and then the burning, itching, and irritation return.
What actually makes a difference? Not generic fish oil—your body can’t absorb enough of it. The key is **high-absorption omega-3s paired with the antioxidant astaxanthin** , shown to support natural tear production, calm irritation, and protect delicate eye tissue.
It’s no wonder thousands of Americans are finally finding real, lasting relief—without living bottle-to-bottle on eye drops.
If you’re tired of temporary fixes, this short report explains the truth behind dry eye—and the solution that’s helping so many people:
[👉](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e85746/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsWWx2dTM2cQ/qP3NpZD0xNzE0JnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTEyMTctRlRELTAmYzI9QUlERSZjMz1GVEQ/gaUSo7w/sfi68071d3b) **[5 Reasons Drops Won’t Work (and What Actually Does)](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e85746/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsWWx2dTM2cQ/qP3NpZD0xNzE0JnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTEyMTctRlRELTAmYzI9QUlERSZjMz1GVEQ/gaUSo7w/sfi68071d3b)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: We’re building our 2026 Readiness Fund
body:
A stronger Rocky Mountain Voice now means stronger reporting in 2026
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | Peter,
Heidi Ganahl here and as we approach the end of the year, I want to share something important we’re launching at Rocky Mountain Voice.
We’ve opened our **2026 Readiness Fund** , a year-end program designed to strengthen RMV before we enter one of the most consequential years in Colorado politics.
Because here’s the truth:
**If RMV isn’t ready heading into 2026, the Left wins the media battle by default.**
They’ll shape the narrative.
They’ll silence conservative voices.
They’ll do everything they can to push Colorado further off the cliff.
RMV must be strong now, not later.
That’s why we're asking our top supporters to help us build the 2026 Readiness Fund before the year closes.
**[👉 Chip in to the 2026 Readiness Fund HERE.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

This fund will support:
* Hard-hitting investigative reporting
* Expanding coverage into communities the media ignores
* Election-year accountability
* New series exposing radical legislation and government overreach
* Tools to push back against the Left’s media dominance

If RMV is going to compete with billion-dollar media operations and political machines in 2026, we must strengthen our foundation right now.
Peter, I hope I can count on you to help us prepare.

---
[Add your name to RMV’s 2026 Readiness Fund](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Thank you for believing in this mission and fighting for the truth with us.

[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Heidi Ganahl
President, Rocky Mountain Voice

body:
With your support, we will ensure that our elections are fair in Missouri and beyond
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121562128/589894057/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwZTdmZDQ1LTdhZGMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7doyfaI-nyA2sjfsvjr-WAXdhxyy544EP9YXrTcaQZg=&emci=ef215567-3edc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c0e7fd45-7adc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Ever wondered why Missouri is called the “Show-Me” state? Legend has it that in 1899, Missouri congressman Willard Duncan Vandiver coined the term in a speech, when he said: "I come from a state that raises corn and cotton and cockleburs and Democrats, and frothy eloquence neither convinces nor satisfies me. **I am from Missouri. You have got to show me.** " The name stuck. And that’s because Missourians are known for being no-nonsense, for not taking things on faith alone. _They want_ to see what’s going on behind the curtain. And what’s going on in Missouri isn’t pretty. After ramming through a wildly gerrymandered map against the will of the voters in September, Missouri Republicans have tried every trick in the book to stop a citizen-led ballot measure that would throw out their map. As Democracy Docket recently reported, Missouri Republicans have:
* **Tried to block the referendum in the courts,** in an attempt to take away voters’ ability to reject redistricted maps

* **Sought to invalidate tens of thousands of petition signatures**

* **Crafted misleading language** to confuse voters about what the ballot measure does

* **Sent deceptive text messages** to persuade voters to remove their names from the petition

* **Coordinated with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)** to intimidate those collecting signatures.

That doesn’t sound remotely like the transparency and honesty that Missourians want and expect from their elected officials — but that’s what we’re up against: dirty tricks all designed to undermine democracy and prevent voters from having the final say. [**If we are able to beat back this gerrymandered map through direct democracy, it will send a powerful message that voters reject these Republican power grabs, and we will not be silenced. Peter, Ever wondered why Missouri is called the “Show-Me” state? Legend has it that in 1899, Missouri congressman Willard Duncan Vandiver coined the term in a speech, when he said: "I come from a state that raises corn and cotton and cockleburs and Democrats, and frothy eloquence neither convinces nor satisfies me. **I am from Missouri. You have got to show me.** " The name stuck. And that’s because Missourians are known for being no-nonsense, for not taking things on faith alone. _They want_ to see what’s going on behind the curtain. And what’s going on in Missouri isn’t pretty. After ramming through a wildly gerrymandered map against the will of the voters in September, Missouri Republicans have tried every trick in the book to stop a citizen-led ballot measure that would throw out their map. As Democracy Docket recently reported, Missouri Republicans have:
* **Tried to block the referendum in the courts,** in an attempt to take away voters’ ability to reject redistricted maps

* **Sought to invalidate tens of thousands of petition signatures**

* **Crafted misleading language** to confuse voters about what the ballot measure does

* **Sent deceptive text messages** to persuade voters to remove their names from the petition

* **Coordinated with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)** to intimidate those collecting signatures.

That doesn’t sound remotely like the transparency and honesty that Missourians want and expect from their elected officials — but that’s what we’re up against: dirty tricks all designed to undermine democracy and prevent voters from having the final say. [**If we are able to beat back this gerrymandered map through direct democracy, it will send a powerful message that voters reject these Republican power grabs, and we will not be silenced. Will you make a donation to help fight for fair maps in Missouri and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121562151/589894325/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier2_email_SilencingMO_email_20251218-NDRC-Tier2-SilencingMO_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251218-NDRC-Tier2-SilencingMO_&utm_campaign=SilencingMO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiZTdmZDQ1LTdhZGMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aVmbfps1ZKR9gzuZn4avnCW4EQoWDiNV2HkOD7CNk58=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: With your support, we will ensure that our elections are fair in Missouri and beyond | Peter, Ever wondered why Missouri is called the “Show-Me” state? Legend has it that in 1899, Missouri congressman Willard Duncan Vandiver coined the term in a speech, when he said: "I come from a state that raises corn and cotton and cockleburs and Democrats, and frothy eloquence neither convinces nor satisfies me. I am from Missouri. You have got to show me. " The name stuck. And that’s because Missourians are known for being no-nonsense, for not taking things on faith alone. They want to see what’s going on behind the curtain. And what’s going on in Missouri isn’t pretty. After ramming through a wildly gerrymandered map against the will of the voters in September, Missouri Republicans have tried every trick in the book to stop a citizen-led ballot measure that would throw out their map. As Democracy Docket recently reported, Missouri Republicans have: Tried to block the referendum in the courts, in an attempt to take away voters’ ability to reject redistricted maps Sought to invalidate tens of thousands of petition signatures Crafted misleading language to confuse voters about what the ballot measure does Sent deceptive text messages to persuade voters to remove their names from the petition Coordinated with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to intimidate those collecting signatures. That doesn’t sound remotely like the transparency and honesty that Missourians want and expect from their elected officials — but that’s what we’re up against: dirty tricks all designed to undermine democracy and prevent voters from having the final say. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Join us and let’s show them everything we’ve got. Thank you, Claire = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NW, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply**

name: David Hogg
subject: The DNC is quietly killing its 2024 autopsy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
To win in 2026 and beyond, we need to change the party.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251218-1&t=1&akid=2961%2E587540%2ESU4uVm)
**Peter, the DNC just decided NOT to release its autopsy report analyzing the 2024 Election:**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251218_1_dnc.4zxPmK&refcode=em20251218-2961&amount=5&t=2&akid=2961%2E587540%2ESU4uVm)
On the heels of our massive losses as a party in 2024, I ran to serve on the DNC’s leadership because I wanted to change the party. I did so because I care deeply about building a Democratic Party that actually wins. I was elected to that role, but ultimately removed due to my work to challenge the status quo and primary asleep-at-the-wheel incumbents in safe Democratic seats.
The DNC hiding this autopsy report is further proof that our party leadership isn’t serious about fixing what’s wrong. **_They don’t even want to talk about it!_** They’d rather face the midterms with blinders on than disclose where they went wrong. This will not help us rebuild faith with the American people. Quite honestly, it’s gaslighting.
To win in 2026 and beyond, we need to change the party. And if we really want to fix it, we have to be willing to admit that something is broken in the first place.
If the party leaders won’t take the steps required to rebuild the party into a winning coalition (even after they literally pledged to do so), we will take matters into our own hands.
The reason Leaders We Deserve decided to challenge a select number of ineffectual Democratic incumbents in safe seats is not because it makes me popular in DC, it’s because the thing that we need to do most is the thing that 95% of DC is terrified of doing: challenging the status quo.
Many elected officials and party leaders say they want change, but few actually do. Why? Any serious threat to the status quo also threatens their position of power, and they will do everything they can to stop that threat.
What concerns me most about the state of our party is that our decisions do not seem to be driven by principles. More than anything, they are driven by fear. Fear of pissing off special interests. Fear of pissing off consultants. Fear of pissing off leaders in Congress. Fear of learning from our own mistakes. What we need to fear most is the fact that while party leadership ignores the uncomfortable truth in favor of sticking to the status quo, we are losing the American people.
**That’s why Leaders We Deserve is raising $20 million to contest red-to-blue districts across the country _AND_ unseat ineffective, asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in Congress.**
We have already raised a significant portion of that goal. If you need a nudge to make your first donation to power our work today, let the DNC spiking this autopsy report be your motivation.
**[Peter, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can now? We’ve got a big end-of-year FEC deadline coming up and we could use your support right now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251218_1_dnc.4zxPmK&refcode=em20251218-2961&amount=5&t=3&akid=2961%2E587540%2ESU4uVm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251218_1_dnc.4zxPmK&amount=5&refcode=em20251218-2961&t=22&akid=2961%2E587540%2ESU4uVm)**
Thank you for everything you’re doing,
David

clean_body: To win in 2026 and beyond, we need to change the party. Peter, the DNC just decided NOT to release its autopsy report analyzing the 2024 Election: On the heels of our massive losses as a party in 2024, I ran to serve on the DNC’s leadership because I wanted to change the party. I did so because I care deeply about building a Democratic Party that actually wins. I was elected to that role, but ultimately removed due to my work to challenge the status quo and primary asleep-at-the-wheel incumbents in safe Democratic seats. The DNC hiding this autopsy report is further proof that our party leadership isn’t serious about fixing what’s wrong. They don’t even want to talk about it! They’d rather face the midterms with blinders on than disclose where they went wrong. This will not help us rebuild faith with the American people. Quite honestly, it’s gaslighting. To win in 2026 and beyond, we need to change the party. And if we really want to fix it, we have to be willing to admit that something is broken in the first place. If the party leaders won’t take the steps required to rebuild the party into a winning coalition (even after they literally pledged to do so), we will take matters into our own hands. The reason Leaders We Deserve decided to challenge a select number of ineffectual Democratic incumbents in safe seats is not because it makes me popular in DC, it’s because the thing that we need to do most is the thing that 95% of DC is terrified of doing: challenging the status quo. Many elected officials and party leaders say they want change, but few actually do. Why? Any serious threat to the status quo also threatens their position of power, and they will do everything they can to stop that threat. What concerns me most about the state of our party is that our decisions do not seem to be driven by principles. More than anything, they are driven by fear. Fear of pissing off special interests. Fear of pissing off consultants. Fear of pissing off leaders in Congress. Fear of learning from our own mistakes. What we need to fear most is the fact that while party leadership ignores the uncomfortable truth in favor of sticking to the status quo, we are losing the American people. That’s why Leaders We Deserve is raising $20 million to contest red-to-blue districts across the country AND unseat ineffective, asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in Congress. We have already raised a significant portion of that goal. If you need a nudge to make your first donation to power our work today, let the DNC spiking this autopsy report be your motivation. Thank you for everything you’re doing, David

name: Troop Holiday Card via USO
subject: Don't let a hero spend Christmas alone.
body:
Your message can bring warmth and hope today
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHg_83dt9/L3FsYlEzbkQ0ZkhEai95VnVEbkxTSUo0U1M5Z0s1dDVjK2xZa0FwNmFrc0lZRDBlSnNHZXNVSzhJa2MyaDhIUjJMNktMeTRva3JsVUZYVC9lemdDOHZNWEF4K2ZpcThsNzA0NWFGamZENjQ9S0/bjc0bERqMy9BWEd3a21BVGt0aVN2bHhvbWwxM2FvNjZiVVBvOWVrdWNuNGZqS25hQVZ4QTdlRENkdHVpeFJPZUkwMmt6ZWxBcHphTG01MlRwQ3dzc3dnNUVvQ3FpZ3J0S0)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
Christmas is a time to be with loved ones and relax. For our service members stationed throughout the world, the holidays will not look like that. You can make this Christmas a little merrier with a simple note on our holiday appreciation card. It's a small thing to add to your holiday list and a big impact you can have on our troops.
**[We have an important goal: 100,000 signatures on our card by Christmas to help combat the loneliness our active-duty service members feel during the holidays. Can we count on you to add your name to honor their sacrifice?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/zdb4h37~bLtV/L3FsYlEzbkQ0ZkhEai95VnVEbkxTSUo0U1M5Z0s1dDVjK2xZa0FwNmFrc0lZRDBlSnNHZXNVSzhJa2MyaDhIUjJMNktMeTRva3JsVUZYVC9lemdDOHZNWEF4K2ZpcThsNzA0NWFGamZENjQ9S0/bjc0bERqMy9BWEd3a21BVGt0aVN2bHhvbWwxM2FvNjZiVVBvOWVrdWNuNGZqS25hQVZ4QTdlRENkdHVpeFJPZUkwMmt6ZWxBcHphTG01MlRwQ3dzc3dnNUVvQ3FpZ3J0S0)
---
| | [ Your Name Here ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbXAY3hr/L3FsYlEzbkQ0ZkhEai95VnVEbkxTSUo0U1M5Z0s1dDVjK2xZa0FwNmFrc0lZRDBlSnNHZXNVSzhJa2MyaDhIUjJMNktMeTRva3JsVUZYVC9lemdDOHZNWEF4K2ZpcThsNzA0NWFGamZENjQ9S0/bjc0bERqMy9BWEd3a21BVGt0aVN2bHhvbWwxM2FvNjZiVVBvOWVrdWNuNGZqS25hQVZ4QTdlRENkdHVpeFJPZUkwMmt6ZWxBcHphTG01MlRwQ3dzc3dnNUVvQ3FpZ3J0S0)
---
|
---
| | [SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hVWYNAC_/L3FsYlEzbkQ0ZkhEai95VnVEbkxTSUo0U1M5Z0s1dDVjK2xZa0FwNmFrc0lZRDBlSnNHZXNVSzhJa2MyaDhIUjJMNktMeTRva3JsVUZYVC9lemdDOHZNWEF4K2ZpcThsNzA0NWFGamZENjQ9S0/bjc0bERqMy9BWEd3a21BVGt0aVN2bHhvbWwxM2FvNjZiVVBvOWVrdWNuNGZqS25hQVZ4QTdlRENkdHVpeFJPZUkwMmt6ZWxBcHphTG01MlRwQ3dzc3dnNUVvQ3FpZ3J0S0)
---
**You can help make a hero feel less alone during this special time of year.**
**" When we get messages of support while we're deployed from home, it's a huge morale booster," says one Navy sailor.**
It is never easy for a service member to be away from their family, but it is even harder during the holidays. This year has been especially difficult for our heroes in uniform. We need all of our military supporters to band together to let them know they are not forgotten and we are deeply appreciative of their sacrifice.
**[We are falling short of our goal, so please, sign the card today and let our service members know how valued they are this season.](https://links.e.uso.)**
On behalf of our heroes,
The USO

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

The border crisis isn't just a headline -- it's a national emergency.

Under Joe Biden,**fentanyl deaths surged** , **crime exploded** , and **millions of illegal immigrants** were released into our cities. And now, the Left wants to make mass deportations "illegal."

That's why **The Heritage Foundation** launched the **2025 Mass Deportation Ballot** -- to give patriotic Americans like you a voice in shaping immigration policy.

Your ballot will help Heritage show lawmakers that the American people demand:
* Enforcement of immigration laws already on the books
* An end to sanctuary cities and states
* Swift deportations for those who broke our laws

Washington will be watching these results closely. Please take the Ballot before the national deadline:

Submit My Official Ballot Now: [https://secured.heritage.org/heritage-mass-deportation-ballot/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z905i764p7p8hqoloojkum0137dl0k4b7f4cpujg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3chgm4p72c1h2bs)

Sincerely,

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: December e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/214ec3cb2289/december-e-newsletter?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **2025 December e-newsletter**
#### **Happy Holidays!**
**Special ‘Tops of 2025’ edition**
---
|
* Momentum grows across the nation to combat epidemic of loneliness
* Ferry service clears major hurdle to operate at Port of Redwood City
* San Bruno Mountain Park gets a long overdue $2 million revamp
* Voters to decide potential historic regional lifeline for Caltrain, SamTrans and BART
* Board passes $5.5 billion budget, one of the strongest and most resilient in California
* First-of-its-kind Wellness Center to bring critical health care services to north San Mateo County residents

---
| | |
---
|
# “Whether it’s a daily walk, caring for a rescue animal, or simply the comfort of companionship at home, animals can reduce stress, improve overall mental well-being, and create new social connections. This event is about giving residents the chance to experience that connection and maybe even find their new best friend.”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 December e-newsletter** **San Mateo County celebrates a year of firsts** Dear friends, As 2025 comes to an end and I wrap up the year serving as President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors, I am so thankful for all the accomplishments the county and its partners have achieved in what has been an incredible year of firsts. For me, the theme of this past year has been “building community” as the county has prioritized fiscal prudence, continued to combat the affordability crisis, invested in health care and transit infrastructure and addressed the epidemic of social isolation and loneliness afflicting our oldest and youngest residents. As the holidays may be the most festive time of the year, I want to remind us all that it can also be a bit bleak for many of us, including incarcerated parents with children. This year, to bring a little cheer to these children, the county hosted its first ever Christmas tree lighting and toy drive Dec. 11 at 500 County Center to benefit the Service League, which provides intensive services for individuals in county jails. Thank you to the hundreds who attended this event and donated gifts and a very special thanks to the Aragon High School Chorus who kicked off the season with live music as hot cocoa was served in what will become a new holiday tradition annually in downtown Redwood City. For those who have followed my monthly newsletters for the past 9 years, thank you for reading and engaging with my office. And now, please enjoy my top stories of 2025 list as we look ahead to another year of making history in San Mateo County!

**Tops of 2025: 500 County Center welcomes the world to the greenest civic building in the nation** In May, the county celebrated the 169th birthday of San Mateo County and the ribbon cutting of 500 County Center, the greenest civic building in the United States. The evening started under the stained-glass rotunda at the Old County Courthouse in downtown Redwood City with a reenactment marking the county’s founding and was followed by a brief procession of hundreds of attendees to the new civic building accompanied by the Woodside High School Band. Barely 18 months old, 500 County Center is already the winner of numerous Best of the Best Sustainability awards, including from engineering News Record and the American Institute of Architects. It was a beautiful evening to celebrate the county’s storied past, the possibilities of the future and to toast the renaissance of San Mateo County. The event has hosted by the Board of Supervisors, County Executive’s Office and Historical Association to welcome the public to the new workplace for San Mateo County employees which is becoming a destination for large community gatherings with its immense lobby and vast courtyards that can accommodate hundreds of people. To me, 500 County Center represents the cultural, artistic, political and economic revival of what has become the healthiest and near wealthiest county in California and will serve county residents as a community-building center for generations to come. I want to take the time to recognize architect Javier Arizmendi, History Museum Director Mitch Postel, Chief of the Silicon Valley Office of Protocol Deanna Tryon and County Executive Mike Callagy for welcoming the nearly 700 attendees who joined the celebration. **Tops of 2025: Midway Village completes Phase 1 as another landmark deal locks in affordable housing into the 22 nd Century** Midway Village in Daly City’s Bayshore neighborhood marked the completion of 147 new affordable homes and broke ground on 113 more in April as part of the largest affordable housing redevelopment in San Mateo County’s history. And in November, the county officially purchased the property at 493 Eastmoor Ave. for $4.4 million, unlocking the path to building 72 units of 100% affordable housing for households earning 20%–50% of the area median income. The two projects highlight the county’s commitment to addressing the affordability crisis and are cause to celebrate. The celebration at Midway Village included a ribbon-cutting for Midway Village I and the ceremonial launch of construction on 113 homes as part of Midway Village 2. This is a transformative project that took a very old and outdated affordable housing complex with 150 units into what will be a modern complex that will have more than 500 units for individuals, often on the brink of being homeless. Developed by the nonprofit MidPen Housing, the project also includes 27 units for local educators and 12 units for young adults transitioning out of foster care. One of the project’s first residents is a 22-year-old who aged out of the foster care system named Nathan Smith. In addition to resident amenities similar to those in Midway Village I, this second phase will also feature a 15,000-square-foot childcare center where Peninsula Family Service will serve 109 children, including children from low-income families in the broader community. Regarding the Eastmoor project, our county should be extraordinarily proud of identifying and investing in this transit-rich, community-centered project near the Colma BART station. This is exactly the kind of bold action that prevents displacement, keeps families housed, and stops homelessness before it starts. By purchasing the property, we’re enabling the developer to secure the tax credits and financing necessary to bring this project to life. And the best part? No new funds were required. The $4.4 million was already allocated as part of our commitment to affordable housing. Now, with county ownership and a long-term lease in place, 55 years with an option for 44 more, we are ensuring long-term affordability and long-term stability. This is how we build a future where everyone has a place to call home. This is putting community first, and this is the San Mateo County we can all be proud of. **Tops of 2025: First-of-its-kind Wellness Center to bring critical health care services to north San Mateo County residents** The North County Wellness Center hit a significant milestone in August when the final structural beam was signed by the Board of Supervisors and placed atop the $140 million clinic site at a topping off ceremony in South San Francisco. This is more than just a building, it’s the future hub of critical county services that will provide specialty care and, for the first time, comprehensive dental services which will provide an additional 5,500 dental visits annually. Once complete in 2027, this Wellness Center will house the Health System, Human Services Agency, Tax Collector and the District Attorney’s Office all under one roof. That means more coordinated care, streamlined services, and a more equitable experience for the people we serve. Whether someone is navigating a health crisis, seeking housing support, or accessing justice, this center will offer compassion, dignity, and access. Thank you to our project partners, the contractors, planners, and workers who have brought us to this point. Thank you to the county departments who envisioned a better way to serve and to the staff who will bring this space to life. And thank you to the community for your support during construction. Let today be a reminder that public infrastructure is about people and this Wellness Center is a promise to put people first. I look forward to returning here soon to cut the ribbon and officially open the doors to better service, stronger partnerships, and healthier futures. **Tops of 2025: Board passes $5.5 billion budget, one of the strongest and most resilient in California** San Mateo County’s budget is widely regarded as one of the strongest and most resilient in California, based on standard public-finance benchmarks used across the state. The Board of Supervisors adopted a revised $5.5 billion FY 2025–26 budget that protects core services while maintaining nearly $580 million in reserves, even amid significant uncertainty around state deficits and potential federal funding cuts. Maintaining that level of reserves while continuing to invest is a key indicator of fiscal strength. The county also demonstrated structural balance and forward planning. Rather than relying on one-time fixes, the Board adjusted the budget to account for possible revenue volatility, added 24 targeted positions, and preserved long-term obligations such as infrastructure, public safety, health care, and housing. Many California counties have had to draw down reserves or defer investments; San Mateo County did neither. Compared to peer counties, San Mateo County benefits from a diversified and high-value tax base; strong property-tax and sales-tax performance; conservative fiscal policies around reserves and debt; and multi-year financial forecasting tied to capital planning. In short, while there is no single official ranking of “strongest” county budgets, by every conventional measure, reserve levels, service protection, adaptability, and long-term planning, San Mateo County’s budget stands among the strongest in the state and positions the county well to weather economic or policy shocks without compromising essential services. The Board also approved a $975.3 million 2025-30 Capital Improvement Plan, a 5-year blueprint of costs and funding sources spanning 268 projects across departments. Projects range from replacing a water line at Memorial Park to construction of the new North County Wellness Center in South San Francisco, improving the reception area at the Human Services Agency office in Daly City, upgrading sewers at the Coyote Point Recreation Area in San Mateo and studying solutions to flooding in North Fair Oaks.

**Tops of 2025: Voters to decide potential historic regional lifeline for Caltrain, SamTrans and BART** The Legislature delivered a historic win for San Mateo County in September by passing Senate Bill 63. With strong bipartisan and Gov. Gavin Newsom’s support, SB 63 gives voters the chance in 2026 to approve a regional sales tax to sustain and improve public transit. As Legislation Committee Chair on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I’ve worked nearly two years to secure a fair deal for San Mateo County. Without new funding, Caltrain faces an annual $75 million deficit that would force service cuts, strand riders, worsen traffic and harm air quality. A stable funding stream would keep Caltrain, SamTrans, BART and other transit systems running and improving. As I serve on the MTC, SamTrans and Caltrain boards, I couldn’t be proud of the regional and collaborative efforts achieved in the past year to save public transit. The bill gives voters in San Mateo, San Francisco, Santa Clara, Alameda, and Contra Costa counties the chance in November 2026 to approve a regional sales tax measure dedicated to preserving and improving public transit. SB 63 guarantees around $50 million per year in “return-to-source” funding for SamTrans, money that goes straight back into transformative local projects, from faster bus service to safer streets. Meanwhile, we’re already making progress. Caltrain’s electrification has boosted ridership by 76% over the past year, offering riders faster, cleaner, and quieter trains. BART has rolled out new trains, enhanced safety measures by installing new fare gates at its 5 stations in San Mateo County and stepped-up cleaning protocols. The county provided BART with a $10.3 million bridge loan that ensures the upgraded security gates will be maintained after installation and that the agency will discuss strategies with the cities and county for increasing fare enforcement and BART police presence. Of the 82 new fare gates, 29 of them have been installed at the Millbrae station, an intermodal transit station that links BART with Caltrain, SamTrans and shuttles to SFO International Airport. The stations are immediately adjacent to the Gateway at Millbrae, a new mixed-use world-class development that will soon be the headquarters of SamTrans and Caltrain.

**Tops of 2025: San Bruno Mountain Park gets a long overdue $2 million revamp** I was excited to break the ground and celebrate the $2 million San Bruno Mountain State and County Park Day Use Improvement Project with officials from the county’s Parks Department, the city of Daly City and volunteers with San Bruno Mountain Watch back in May. The project includes an interpretive center, new picnic areas with BBQ grills and new restrooms. San Bruno Mountain offers a great outdoor escape from close-by urban life with 12-miles of hiking trails, wildflower displays and spectacular views of San Francisco and the Farallon Islands. This project will enhance visitor experience and bring in more people to explore this remarkable place. While the peaks of San Bruno Mountain Park are easily seen from Highway 101, its biological significance is not obvious. The park is home to rare and endangered plants and three rare and endangered butterfly species including the Mission Blue and San Bruno Elfin that are found in only a few other places in the world. The new interpretive pavilion will feature exhibits and space for educational programs. I advocated for Measure K funding to support the improvements the public identified through surveys conducted in 2022 to 2023. I allocated $1 million in discretionary Measure K funds and the Parks Department contributed an additional $1 million in Measure K funding for the project. This is the first major investment in the park in decades and I can’t wait for the public to enjoy it.
******Tops of 2025: Ferry service clears major hurdle to operate at Port of Redwood City** The Redwood City Ferry Project got a boost from the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, which I serve on, when the full MTC Board of Commissioners voted in January to add the project to Plan Bay Area 50+, which makes the project eligible for federal funding. This game-changing project will connect the Port of Redwood City to Oakland and San Francisco, driving economic growth and opportunity along the Peninsula in an environmentally friendly way. As a certified federal staging area, it also strengthens our region’s emergency preparedness for natural disasters. The San Mateo County Transportation Authority has pitched in $15 million for the project and the state has provided an additional $5 million. This historic vote followed action in June 2024 when the MTC awarded the San Mateo County Transportation Authority and the city of Redwood City up to $48 million in Regional Measure 3 (RM3) toll funds for the “101/84 Interchange Reimagined” project. The $300 million total project will make major improvements to the Port of Redwood City and ease traffic at the Highway 101/Woodside Road interchange. Thank you to Kristine Zortman, the Executive Director of the Port of Redwood City, fellow MTC Commissioner Gina Papan, Michael Quigley, Executive Director of the California Alliance for Jobs and so many others for your advocacy on a project that will create lots of good jobs and boost the regional economy.

******Tops of 2025: Momentum grows across the nation to combat epidemic of loneliness** Momentum is growing across California to take on the epidemic of loneliness. Kaiser Permanente hosted the first of its kind Aging Well Summit at the historic Henry J. Kaiser Center for the Arts in Oakland, and I was honored to speak about the loneliness crisis and the power of social connection as we age. I was honored to share the stage with UCSF Dr. Carla Perissinotto and Village Movement California Board Member Carlene Davis prior to keynote speaker Rita Moreno taking the stage to discuss “redefining the journey of aging.” As we continue to push to redefine the journey of aging, we must do all we can to support the millions of Californians who confront loneliness and social isolation every day. As older adults are becoming a significantly larger portion of the state’s population, I’m proud to be a champion for the for the mental wellness of our aging population and that starts with social connection. About 53% of San Mateo County residents report feeling lonely. Loneliness affects people of all genders and ages, and anyone can experience it. By 2030, more than 8.7 million Californians will be 65 and older. We must make sure they’re not just living longer but living well, connected, and supported. San Mateo County made history in 2024 as the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis, a resolution my office authored. My mission is to continue creating events that bring people together and combat loneliness across San Mateo County with my “Loneliness to Light” initiative, a partnership with the Center for Age Friendly Excellence. Other events in the series included a pet adoption event with the Peninsula Humane Society in November, Take a Hike for Loneliness, a community event bringing neighbors and friends together at Sawyer Camp Trail in October and a fireside chat at the Magnolia of Millbrae in July to address why men aged 15–44 are dying by suicide at 3 to 4 times the rate of women, often in silence and isolation. To date, the county has committed more than $3 million to combat the epidemic by funding peer support and mobility options for older adults with our trusted partner Peninsula Family Service. This initiative is another important step in building a community that connects all of us, regardless of age or the ZIP code you live in. **Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!** Thanks for taking the time to read this special “Tops of 2025” edition of my monthly newsletter. It’s been a great year of firsts in the county and I can’t wait to see what 2026 has in store for all of us. From my family to yours, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=57960e0935&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=86a548d49e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=86a548d49e).

Peter,
Lauren Boebert just crawled ever deeper into the MAGA fringe.
Her latest embrace is MAGA activist Scott Presler, founder of the super PAC Early Vote Action. If that name sounds harmless, the money behind it isn't.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZZQ2SogXOUfVLiTfis1fcJJNCi-ExEPHBthWn2jRiu-XqMxhXuYRlJhq__tYxKEA4-5glWgfezN6vitXzQ0veTqXIhDrzuTFJ4sa_0dKgZThiPpGmtlzybfOim-5L5N9tVYCX5BTkiY4Bj42fOGGoKg7R-Al9byX1ussMODBirsOuEklCqRCbVcqplFgot_bHkZEKYvjoJQRoRwfP-8RdxJX_HIV24b&c=Pkop05BbYRbZ979ve1vqKBCWn3o7bitDREjczuNPtae5X04-fEw7AA==&ch=aA3I2ACRtobGAOtN1cr_LEmUBaDyNGYqqyR7InkaN-CLs6VzZJa1_g==)
---
The PAC is bankrolled by a who's-who of the MAGA fringe--including Elon Musk, who dropped one million dollars, Turning Point USA, and groups tied to Micheal Flynn, the same circle that helped push Q-anon conspiracies and political extremism to the mainstream.
But it gets worse.
One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZZQ2SogXOUfVLiTfis1fcJJNCi-ExEPHBthWn2jRiu-XqMxhXuYRlJhq__tYxKEA4-5glWgfezN6vitXzQ0veTqXIhDrzuTFJ4sa_0dKgZThiPpGmtlzybfOim-5L5N9tVYCX5BTkiY4Bj42fOGGoKg7R-Al9byX1ussMODBirsOuEklCqRCbVcqplFgot_bHkZEKYvjoKU6VAhOuQ1VQbc0rsQ3V7L&c=Pkop05BbYRbZ979ve1vqKBCWn3o7bitDREjczuNPtae5X04-fEw7AA==&ch=aA3I2ACRtobGAOtN1cr_LEmUBaDyNGYqqyR7InkaN-CLs6VzZJa1_g==)
---
Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. Voters see it. That's why she is unpopular. And it's why she's more vulnerable than ever.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And the last time Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her, our campaign delivered the best Democratic performance in this district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points.
The window for Democrats to finally end Lauren Boebert's career is wide open. But we have to take it.
[Our campaign doesn't have MAGA billionaires or extremist PACs. We have people like you. But it gets worse. One of the PAC's repeat donors is Tristan Tate, brother of "masculinity" influencer Andrew Tate. Both were arrested last year on rape, torture, and human-trafficking charges connected to an alleged international trafficking operation. | == Those are the kinds of dollars now flowing into Boebert's political orbit. name: Joe Lombardo
subject: Action needed to protect our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lombardo for Governor
body:
Peter,

Since the start of the school year, 200+ students have been injured in pedestrian collisions in Clark County alone. This is unacceptable.

That is why my administration took action and passed my bill to enhance school zone safety. I was proud to ceremonially sign AB 6 last week at Rowe Elementary alongside Clark County School District leaders and local partners.

This law gives communities real control and stronger penalties for reckless drivers in school zones. Nothing is more important than making sure every child gets to school and back home safely. Period.

Peter, that’s why I’m asking you to add your name to our petition to stand with parents and keep kids safe. [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/121525_school_salombardo/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=12.15.25_School_SALombardo&utm_content=Link&recurring=true]

SAFE STREETS FOR OUR STUDENTS >> [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/121525_school_salombardo/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=12.15.25_School_SALombardo&utm_content=Link&recurring=true]

This isn’t about politics. It’s about protecting our children from danger right now. Your signature reaffirms your support for stronger enforcement and stricter consequences for careless drivers near our kids.

Add your name today and stand with parents [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/121525_school_salombardo/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=12.15.25_School_SALombardo&utm_content=Link&recurring=true] demanding safe streets and safer schools. Our students deserve to walk to school without fear, and your voice makes sure that happens.

YOUR SIGNATURE = SAFER KIDS [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/121525_school_salombardo/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=12.15.25_School_SALombardo&utm_content=Link&recurring=true]

Sign the petition now [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/121525_school_salombardo/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=12.15.25_School_SALombardo&utm_content=Link&recurring=true] and help protect Nevada’s kids.

Thank you,

Joe Lombardo

Paid for by Lombardo for Governor

That is why my administration took action and passed my bill to enhance school zone safety. I was proud to ceremonially sign AB 6 last week at Rowe Elementary alongside Clark County School District leaders and local partners. This law gives communities real control and stronger penalties for reckless drivers in school zones. Nothing is more important than making sure every child gets to school and back home safely. Period. Peter, that’s why I’m asking you to add your name to our petition to stand with parents and keep kids safe. [] SAFE STREETS FOR OUR STUDENTS >> [] This isn’t about politics. It’s about protecting our children from danger right now. Your signature reaffirms your support for stronger enforcement and stricter consequences for careless drivers near our kids. Add your name today and stand with parents [] demanding safe streets and safer schools. Our students deserve to walk to school without fear, and your voice makes sure that happens. YOUR SIGNATURE = SAFER KIDS [] Sign the petition now [] and help protect Nevada’s kids. Thank you, Joe Lombardo Paid for by Lombardo for Governor [] Unsubscribe

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Go back to Pakistan
body:
I’m not going anywhere.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b7domjW-pi3HAaLGgyks20RjsUo82yAa5CZdyPDdoCXgLaZO8Cqgix4txB17It_zoyXH74HurlNUz11_HgNbqaOiqprLfuwiiwxmTYCEFdDisvNdV_i4ONrG_fuEBKXFozYYe_Nkp08MrwWeuAjpTHBLElOhOkrpMMMzn8LGvaPt_jPOVGID72ZIk1vBqpq329hobQLMPnHk9yLfjZSVxU5xURxKdUAd&c=GzmV2mqpGQGvad_61G4fdIqqmn7RaAW94DmQnc0UrhVEmgeCgZkRNg==&ch=OuwB7ePZwDZLnIXqYpoxwZhdMdIek-D-zakMeiMeVlbYYFx9KLS5eQ==)
