name: Aaron Regunberg from All right, then, I'll go to hell
subject: Final reflections from an awful, awful week.
body:
Finding the Brown shooter was hard. Getting accountability for the bad actors who exploited this tragedy will be even harder.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..mADNTv5H5ITlrD4IobwtfwllRqWyj1A_KpCDigYaUsc?) for more
---
# [Final reflections from an awful, awful week.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYxNjEzNTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODc1MzM1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e_WCBLtmjnYYPrUQlwyL8PrHYu3ZlJV2KlhTtBxpS7Q)
### Finding the Brown shooter was hard. Getting accountability for the bad actors who exploited this tragedy will be even harder.
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---
| Dec 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjE2MTM1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzY4NzUzMzU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDk4MTE3MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vnh3IiMJQ9f5iIXaIFStM08Wzu7ZuzAEZVQD8asMmQU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYxNjEzNTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODc1MzM1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e_WCBLtmjnYYPrUQlwyL8PrHYu3ZlJV2KlhTtBxpS7Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYxNjEzNTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODc1MzM1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e_WCBLtmjnYYPrUQlwyL8PrHYu3ZlJV2KlhTtBxpS7Q)
---
| | [](https://substack..1Q_stoiiY8SDyYN0znMfp2l_5kWv5lWFem4-8akodRk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/final-reflections-from-an-awful-awful?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

It's finally over. As you've probably seen, last night law enforcement found the man who attacked Brown University in a storage unit in New Hampshire, dead from a self-inflicted gunshot wound.
Maybe it's best to leave this well enough alone, now that we're through the anxious uncertainty and in a place where our Brown and Providence communities can focus on healing and supporting those who are grieving.
But I have to admit: I am still, at times, shaking with rage thinking about the cynicism, the mendacity, the obscenity of what the MAGA movement just put us through. So I wanted to share a few final reflections on an awful, awful week.
First, needless to say, every rightwing fraudster spinning bullshit conspiracies and doxxing innocent students and attacking our community was wrong. This was not, as [thousands](https://substack.com/redirect/c934316c-7ba1-4fea-b4cf-636c8612205d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of people with massive followings claimed based on literally zero evidence, a targeted attack against the right. There was not a [coverup](https://substack.com/redirect/54b429aa-2dcc-4a75-aeda-e58c11d6a162?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or refusal to investigate because Brown or Providence authorities don't care about conservative people's safety. The shooter wasn't a Muslim. The [random student](https://substack.com/redirect/b38d676d-664a-43cc-9de3-9ce8a7bf22c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that MAGA decided to target and endanger, simply because they were transgender and pro-Palestine, had nothing to do with the attack.
Second, even beyond the pain and fear these cowards caused to innocent doxxing victims and to many of the survivors whose grief they interrupted, they also, according to law enforcement, actively hurt the investigation. As the Colonel of the Rhode Island State Police said [last night](https://substack.com/redirect/d4a2607c-f161-40b9-b771-a3105a2cb2cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "The endless barrage of misinformation, disinformation, rumors, and clickbait were not helpful in this investigation. Distractions and unfounded criticisms do not support this work. They complicated and threatened to undermine the justice we seek for the victims and grieving families."
Third, it's worth noting that these unbelievably irresponsible attacks weren't just coming from the random fringes of the far right. These were coming from Republican officials of significant power and stature. Here's a Republican member of the United States House of Representatives actively amplifying a false conspiracy that law enforcement has said made their work harder.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7fa322ef-c95e-4c82-ac75-ca95e35da161?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's the head of the U.S. Department of Justice's Civil Rights Division doing the same.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f6ae379-7227-4f54-8768-ba0ad9861065?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's hard to put into words how disgusting this behavior is.
Fourth, it's important to remember that these people didn't just engage in their campaign of disinformation for laughs. This was a political project. Their goal was, [very explicitly](https://substack.com/redirect/5f87237a-4ac6-497f-bc8c-a6734a863a42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to use this tragedy to justify and build support for a martial crackdown by the Trump administration on the left and the Muslim community. The fact that the shooter was a middle-aged, white, European, can't-be-framed-as-a-leftist, cisgender man made that harder for them. But still, the administration wasted no time trying to use the one identity factor they could shoehorn into their narrative--that the shooter was originally from Portugal and received a green card in 2017 (can we remember who was president that year?)--to [dismantle](https://substack.com/redirect/3b4c03d1-53bc-47b8-bce4-8950042dcf46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the immigrant visa program he entered the country through. These fascists are desperate for their Reichstag fire, and it's chilling to think of the repression we likely would have seen if the shooter hadn't been, as usual, a deranged white guy.
Finally, I just want to name the surreality of the fact that there will be zero accountability for the bad actors who engaged in this vile conduct. In fact, they haven't slowed down their hateful disinformation for a single second. Here's what Laura Loomer--someone who has [Pentagon press credentials](https://substack.com/redirect/3da545b2-9e22-4cc1-bf7a-e99ec36f5be5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who is a high-level advisor to the president, such that she has the power to get national [security advisors fired](https://substack.com/redirect/db4faea9-b33b-4b68-88d0-af2d7ba094bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--posted last night, just minutes after being proven beyond any possible shred of a doubt to be lying.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c63da149-b02a-4729-9b8a-36c4bbf00a48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm so glad this investigation has come to a close. I'm so glad our community can now focus on healing. But we should not forget the craven treacherousness with which the MAGA movement seizes on any possible opportunity to instantiate their fascist vision for our country, to overrule truth with known lies so vociferously that the lie eventually becomes our accepted truth.
We need to defeat MAGA--in 2026, in 2028, and beyond--and then we need to hold these bad actors to account. It's not just our democracy that's at stake. It's our very capacity to maintain an understanding of reality that exists outside of their sick and cruel fever dreams.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE4MjA3OTYxNiwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjE2MTM1NSwiZXhwIjoyMDgxNzM3MzU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.Z8HxtspXl1ezO7z_dMfLitCKZ7PvkGYZDxk3LLPI40Q?)

---
| | | [Like](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjE2MTM1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzY4NzUzMzU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDk4MTE3MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vnh3IiMJQ9f5iIXaIFStM08Wzu7ZuzAEZVQD8asMmQU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=182079616&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDc5NjE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYxNjEzNTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODc1MzM1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e_WCBLtmjnYYPrUQlwyL8PrHYu3ZlJV2KlhTtBxpS7Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/21034a39-af7f-4fdd-b60a-3c8698ec4f04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..Y_dPV4NDI6ym9L9gvKMIldoYsbMGktvq5h_53VZVswg?)

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25]

Folks,

We know that you’re going to be inundated in the next few weeks with End of Quarter messages. We’re going to email you now, because we think it’s important that you get some actual time off and away from your computer, without having to worry about dozens of missed emails.

But that also means that we need to hit our goal earlier than we ever have before, so we can close the books on the year.

We’re aiming to raise $5,000 from our grassroots sources so we can start 2026 strong. Would you contribute right now to help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?express_lane=true&amount=5] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?express_lane=true&amount=100] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?] We have a big 2026 planned: we’re putting the finishing touches on a budget and strategy for Vote By Mail, digital ads, and billboards – but all of those plans are contingent on us hitting our End of Year goal.

Our goal is to oust Republicans up and down the ballot, and ensure that we not only have a blue wave in 2026 – but a blue washout.

Would you make a contribution right now to help us close the books on December? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_dec25?]

Thank you,

IDCCA

But that also means that we need to hit our goal earlier than we ever have before, so we can close the books on the year. We’re aiming to raise $5,000 from our grassroots sources so we can start 2026 strong. Would you contribute right now to help us get there? name: Trisha C.
subject: Why I went on a conservative talk radio station as a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert is too busy embarrassing us in D.C., attending parties for felon George Santos, and fighting with Marjorie Taylor Greene to show up.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HkeLdWBBShVvh2a7AT8iAB_yZuJnHoMOvWoBPrmcr7e8ivENRSLU-x-j69tVq7l4ShbsgOyIsA-wO3PRRYhTDZAdJl38FPFp6RNFm_uIkAAcyYaj8rAFnwOnnqZoNsMQCJ1P7Bpnf33O2bhCOk6W9QqMWuEehFB15WMrOFID43CMhbWad-1UoFlwM0CTZqZw2P0hB3pVq54q8MTssSDO36kLZ3X7yLH-1bjE40lP4=&c=ctg_bMtDyvagNPwpqNei_wuoXEB3fcTiaurSnEiol7E2eoKbxOhgeA==&ch=CgXENvwPEDUI3-E4RPnratQOjnwpjP7HgOjV-VXUe7yaVgIaWEGzAQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Where is Lauren Boebert?
That's the question I have been asking--and have been getting asked--on conservative radio in my district.
You might think that talking on conservative media is a waste of time, but that would be an incorrect assumption. Just as in 2024, Democrats need to think outside the box and show up in places we don't normally participate to reach less-political people with our economic reform/anti-corruption message.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HkeLdWBBShVvh2a7AT8iAB_yZuJnHoMOvWoBPrmcr7e8ivENRSLU-x-j69tVq7l4ShbsgOyIsA-wO3PRRYhTDZAdJl38FPFp6RNFm_uIkAAcyYaj8rAFnwOnnqZoNsMQCJ1P7Bpnf33O2bhCOk6W9QqMWuEehFB15WMrOFID43CMhbWad-1UoFlwM0CTZqZw2P0hB3pVq54q8MTssSDJ2d7CuLtgc5pCG-Qhkq6VM=&c=ctg_bMtDyvagNPwpqNei_wuoXEB3fcTiaurSnEiol7E2eoKbxOhgeA==&ch=CgXENvwPEDUI3-E4RPnratQOjnwpjP7HgOjV-VXUe7yaVgIaWEGzAQ==)
---

But none of this comes easy. This is the result of months of hard work from me and my team, doing the outreach, laying the groundwork, and reaching people outside of the mainstream media.
Which brings me to the central question I get in every interview: where is Boebert?
The only public outreach Boebert does is puff pieces on MAGA shows like Russia propagandist Tim Pool or NewsNation - but never shows up on local media to talk policy.
All the while, people here need help from our member of Congress, and she is instead too busy embarrassing us in D.C., attending parties for felon George Santos, or using campaign funds to attend Kid Rock concerts.
Boebert has got to go. We can fire her for good. Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Will you help me continue to outwork and outperform Lauren Boebert? Right now, we need to hit our fundraising goals before 2026 starts in earnest. Can you donate any amount to my campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00197HkeLdWBBShVvh2a7AT8iAB_yZuJnHoMOvWoBPrmcr7e8ivENRSLU-x-j69tVq7l4ShbsgOyIsA-wO3PRRYhTDZAdJl38FPFp6RNFm_uIkAAcyYaj8rAFnwOnnqZoNsMQCJ1P7Bpnf33O2bhCOk6W9QqMWuEehFB15WMrOFID43CMhbWad-1UoFlwM0CTZqZw2P0hB3pVq54q8MTssSDGLqlZGmpTrBXgEwr2h8Jds=&c=ctg_bMtDyvagNPwpqNei_wuoXEB3fcTiaurSnEiol7E2eoKbxOhgeA==&ch=CgXENvwPEDUI3-E4RPnratQOjnwpjP7HgOjV-VXUe7yaVgIaWEGzAQ==)

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: Meet our new Executive Director, Joey Czajkowski
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121606747/589999106/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251219_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlN2MxNDYtZjhkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GpDxMkeiaT6M-8g-swvP5Rjil0n11OWpLRiDN1uolqI=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121606748/589999107/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251219_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlN2MxNDYtZjhkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GpDxMkeiaT6M-8g-swvP5Rjil0n11OWpLRiDN1uolqI=) Friends, I want to share some news — and be very honest with you about what this moment requires. I’m thrilled to announce that I’ve been asked to serve as the next **Executive Director of the Arizona Democratic Party!** I officially begin in January, but after more than a decade of working in Arizona politics and national Democratic fundraising, I know this much is true: **[How we finish this year will determine how well we can compete in 2026, and we have ground to make up. Can you step up to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121606749/589999108/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251219_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlN2MxNDYtZjhkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GpDxMkeiaT6M-8g-swvP5Rjil0n11OWpLRiDN1uolqI=)** I’ve spent my career helping Democratic campaigns and organizations build the financial and organizational muscle they need before Election Day, from serving as Finance Director for the Arizona Democratic Party back in 2018, to running national fundraising for Secretary Julián Castro’s presidential campaign, to most recently leading fundraising for the Democratic Mayors Association, supporting Mayoral races across the country. And right now, I need to be direct with you: **We are behind where we need to be heading into the end of the quarter and the end of the year.** Arizona is a battleground state. We win by organizing early, investing early, and refusing to fall behind. That’s how we’ve protected statewide offices. That’s how we’ve flipped seats. And that’s how we will do it again, _if we have the resources in place._ Even though I don’t officially start until next year, I’m asking you to step up now to help us close this gap and kick off 2026 from a position of strength. We have so much work to do. clean_body: | = = Friends, I want to share some news — and be very honest with you about what this moment requires. I’m thrilled to announce that I’ve been asked to serve as the next Executive Director of the Arizona Democratic Party! I officially begin in January, but after more than a decade of working in Arizona politics and national Democratic fundraising, I know this much is true: = I’ve spent my career helping Democratic campaigns and organizations build the financial and organizational muscle they need before Election Day, from serving as Finance Director for the Arizona Democratic Party back in 2018, to running national fundraising for Secretary Julián Castro’s presidential campaign, to most recently leading fundraising for the Democratic Mayors Association, supporting Mayoral races across the country. And right now, I need to be direct with you: We are behind where we need to be heading into the end of the quarter and the end of the year. Arizona is a battleground state. We win by organizing early, investing early, and refusing to fall behind. That’s how we’ve protected statewide offices. That’s how we’ve flipped seats. And that’s how we will do it again, if we have the resources in place. Even though I don’t officially start until next year, I’m asking you to step up now to help us close this gap and kick off 2026 from a position of strength. We have so much work to do. From closing our voter registration gap with Republicans, to building a statewide communications and organizing team, to planning GOTV: none of it can wait. This is the moment where early supporters make the biggest difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your montly recurring donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I wouldn’t be reaching out if this weren’t urgent, and I wouldn’t be stepping into this role if I didn’t deeply believe that — when united — Arizona Democrats can accomplish anything. Thank you for your trust, your support, and your investment in the work ahead. name: Junaid Ahmed
subject: Tired of the status quo? Me too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
We’re taking the fight to Washington.
#
Peter,
This is Junaid Ahmed. I’m running for Congress in Illinois’ 8th District, and I'm so proud to have the backing of Justice Democrats.
I’d like to ask you a few questions:
📌 **Are you tired of your tax dollars being wasted on cruelty** , from ICE invasions to Israeli war crimes?
📌 **Are you tired of people who aren’t willing to fight** for our communities in Washington?
📌 **Are you tired of Congress neglecting** to put Trump in his place?
If you answered yes to any of those questions, **I want you to join me in this fight.**
**[Can I count on you to split a contribution to my people-powered campaign and Justice Democrats today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251219-ja.wiLKyl&refcode=em20251219-37289&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37289%2E1203867%2EO8nZe5)**
We will fight to create an economy that serves the people, not the billionaires. We will crack down on Trump’s overreach and stand against cruelty, at home and abroad. But I can’t do this without your help.
Our campaign has the momentum. Even as federal agents descend upon my city of Chicago, we were able to raise $500k last quarter, and we are showing the competition what a strong, people-powered campaign truly looks like.
**[Will you stand with me and donate $5, $15, or $25 today? Our primary is less than three months away. Some of my opponents are funded by those who don’t want a fair playing field, but I know my values. I am only funded by grassroots donors like you.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251219-ja.wiLKyl&refcode=em20251219-37289&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=37289%2E1203867%2EO8nZe5)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251219-ja.wiLKyl&refcode=em20251219-37289&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=22&akid=37289%2E1203867%2EO8nZe5)**
I’ve spent my life rolling up my sleeves—volunteering after natural disasters, distributing food to families in need, organizing, and fighting ICE and corporate greed.
I've also spent my entire adult life advocating for Palestinian rights. I believe in an immediate ceasefire with full humanitarian aid to Palestinians in Gaza, realizing the self-determination of the Palestinian people, and an end to the Israeli Occupation of the West Bank and Gaza.
I know how to stand up for my community. But I can’t do it alone. So, what do you say?
**[Are you with us?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251219-ja.wiLKyl&refcode=em20251219-37289&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=37289%2E1203867%2EO8nZe5)**
In solidarity,
Junaid

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251219-37289-footer&t=24&refcode2=37289_1203867_O8nZe5&akid=37289%2E1203867%2EO8nZe5)**

name: Andy Roth
subject: The Left is Trying to Hijack Oklahoma
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLdKeE_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerRwxjmxZJAa014-2B3wbEqT0qblUAYEzpzbHX8aWJQVl8Nmj-2FD1y1DR5V7uRTRzZ8SMxsOp8-2BgEawOvIDvR3yWGf-2F-2BR9r7HgsEqOyrzgV8ucPuiW00UE9hQ7-2FwR3BgI7Q6dV40b79qNt1kvvxUXN9PlkC2taqOqL4SOcpmsI-2FUWGFuEGmo9chZYXrL7yblQJ0pU-2FTg-2FaYLfbFDQbNFuf5HUdTV-2BGa4uM7CaW4hsqinwZEU-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, This is our final report for 2025. As the year comes to a close, we wish you and your family a joyful Christmas and Happy Hanukkah.We have two big stories to report. Let's get into it.
---
|
---
**OKLAHOMA** Every single county in Oklahoma went to Donald Trump in last year's election. No other state can say the same thing. So you would think that the Left would give up on the Sooner State. But because of their deep pockets - thanks to billionaires like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg - the Democrats are using the only tool they have to infiltrate red states - the ballot. Out-of-state left wing money is pouring into Oklahoma to get State Question 836 on the ballot. This would bring California-style elections to the state by ending closed primaries and forcing all Republicans, Democrats and third-party candidates to be listed on the same ballot in future elections. Had SQ 836 been law of the land in 2018, Republican Governor Kevin Stitt wouldn't have been elected. Instead, two Democrats - Drew Edmondson and Candace Johnson - would have appeared on the general election ballot because they secured the most votes in the primary. Right now, the only vocal opposition to SQ 836 is the Oklahoma Republican Party and your **Oklahoma Freedom Caucus**. They are urging voters to "decline to sign" the Left's petition to get their scheme on the ballot.The Left has until January 26. They need 172,993 signatures to qualify for the ballot - a mere 7 percent of all registered voters in Oklahoma. If you live in Oklahoma or have friends and family there, be sure to "decline to sign"!
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjrd0exsWZjNF89Z-2Fq4i1rGEWNrf-2BwI-2B0aU8OCDlEXXkR64VZrhFNMIiwGvoVvwkyWB7DiWkG2DgsxaFU6OjmqxU-3DE-ZJ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerRwxjmxZJAa014-2B3wbEqT0qblUAYEzpzbHX8aWJQVl8Nmj-2FD1y1DR5V7uRTRzZ8SMxsOp8-2BgEawOvIDvR3yWGf-2F-2BR9r7HgsEqOyrzgV8ucPsS-2FIYEm3L6BmopTRoNkzUEJWghEu6kcXQY0u8-2BNOVlQtwngv8hHvEW1cYEzi6o3CFUJH-2FOwkFxgNmWqVUlh-2FNVryworEnPNUCPzILuZrumW6T-2Foqxkz-2F7N-2FytxEI-2BCmMc-3D)
---
|
---
**GEORGIA** Our good friends at the **State Leadership Initiative** have been working closely with our various state freedom caucuses to expose the "Shadow Government" that is quietly pulling the levers of power in our state capitols. The scheme works as follows: Obscure non-profit organizations work with state bureaucrats to grow government and reward special interests with no accountability to the voters. Case in point - The National Association of Medicaid Directors (NAMD) is a group that is run by Georgia's own Medicaid director, Lynette Rhodes. The NAMD helped insert controversial DEI language into the questionnaire that Georgia gives to insurance companies. The companies that receive the highest scores then get large contracts to cover care under Medicaid. For example, insurers that have mandatory "implicit bias" training for their employees scored higher. Insurers that recommended transgender kids be connected to "faith-based organizations" as part of their therapy got penalized. You won't hear vocal opposition of this from the liberal Republicans in the Atlanta Swamp, but after the [_Washington Free Beacon_](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjneP-2F3601pWQkvsaSXnIFZIsqKc9dQNEwteFw6YVMfUgy-2Bj9VN-2BUuAecCvOuz2qy-2F33wGljC60m37mjjKcknvUubQXwMgvStwriTgqrYtbx7FbhyCtPb-2FW0xWAPFa-2BhZ6FvDxcHTDRDem4M9iBaQ66sPM3cIYRXMS7yMuBZW67oP6T9lECmvFvTDNh9L3Wgcbw-3D-3DoiEk_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerRwxjmxZJAa014-2B3wbEqT0qblUAYEzpzbHX8aWJQVl8Nmj-2FD1y1DR5V7uRTRzZ8SMxsOp8-2BgEawOvIDvR3yWGf-2F-2BR9r7HgsEqOyrzgV8ucPvlmfjvZV7ZFBTcMkvQg-2BYhhaTOFG8M5XZBdZblrDZ3VsgopxYwObE4Op-2FAYFtUa5mTlGA0xdmBmDDtt2k5R011bP-2BIeOP1-2FZtzk1wu5ToWQxcGozbNqwZUg-2FcOIjl68UA-3D) and [_The Federalist_](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjo14OgpGP35sI5vBCzgz-2Fk7hW8g0cDDVST3LsIifiZoZ7MGJdHVTmNTmOapaaauBjOBEsSqr5gk1lXizSBo90gMJ4UdcT-2FJ3oQsc7YPUXQknIyTSLoHzRdTpG4dVPiLJ3Gz1GupIZRCfQISiQYmySIw-3D4keR_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerRwxjmxZJAa014-2B3wbEqT0qblUAYEzpzbHX8aWJQVl8Nmj-2FD1y1DR5V7uRTRzZ8SMxsOp8-2BgEawOvIDvR3yWGf-2F-2BR9r7HgsEqOyrzgV8ucPsKxpkFm82apPesaQBtBRl25QwH4zvuW0AvTjsMF19ffBRIhRZgwK8MI3mqOA4R8XUCAJkwyy1LQMSnv1Xpu1IBx0d6KvH0eTBDaLqUfODNNhMvk1ZO4dzlHWlHI-2FRvWLk-3D) exposed this scheme with the help of SLI, the **Georgia Freedom Caucus** is demanding answers. clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, This is our final report for 2025. As the year comes to a close, we wish you and your family a joyful Christmas and Happy Hanukkah.We have two big stories to report. Let's get into it. | OKLAHOMA Every single county in Oklahoma went to Donald Trump in last year's election. No other state can say the same thing. So you would think that the Left would give up on the Sooner State. But because of their deep pockets - thanks to billionaires like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg - the Democrats are using the only tool they have to infiltrate red states - the ballot. Out-of-state left wing money is pouring into Oklahoma to get State Question 836 on the ballot. This would bring California-style elections to the state by ending closed primaries and forcing all Republicans, Democrats and third-party candidates to be listed on the same ballot in future elections. Had SQ 836 been law of the land in 2018, Republican Governor Kevin Stitt wouldn't have been elected. Instead, two Democrats - Drew Edmondson and Candace Johnson - would have appeared on the general election ballot because they secured the most votes in the primary. Right now, the only vocal opposition to SQ 836 is the Oklahoma Republican Party and your Oklahoma Freedom Caucus. They are urging voters to "decline to sign" the Left's petition to get their scheme on the ballot.The Left has until January 26. They need 172,993 signatures to qualify for the ballot - a mere 7 percent of all registered voters in Oklahoma. If you live in Oklahoma or have friends and family there, be sure to "decline to sign"! | GEORGIA Our good friends at the State Leadership Initiative have been working closely with our various state freedom caucuses to expose the "Shadow Government" that is quietly pulling the levers of power in our state capitols. The scheme works as follows: Obscure non-profit organizations work with state bureaucrats to grow government and reward special interests with no accountability to the voters. Case in point - The National Association of Medicaid Directors (NAMD) is a group that is run by Georgia's own Medicaid director, Lynette Rhodes. The NAMD helped insert controversial DEI language into the questionnaire that Georgia gives to insurance companies. The companies that receive the highest scores then get large contracts to cover care under Medicaid. For example, insurers that have mandatory "implicit bias" training for their employees scored higher. Insurers that recommended transgender kids be connected to "faith-based organizations" as part of their therapy got penalized. You won't hear vocal opposition of this from the liberal Republicans in the Atlanta Swamp, but after the and exposed this scheme with the help of SLI, the Georgia Freedom Caucus is demanding answers. They are calling on a full performance audit of the bureaucracy in charge of the state's Medicaid program and they are introducing legislation next year to fix the problem. | HELP US GROW Winter is here. Now is the time to help us expand into new states, while keeping our current states strong as our State Freedom Caucuses prepare for the 2026 legislative sessions. Every dollar counts and helps us ramp up pressure and ensure freedom flourishes across the country—especially now. Can we count on your support today? Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum. We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network | |

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm pissed
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=121825_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=121825_4]
Peter, I'm pissed!
Jack Schlossberg here — candidate for Congress in NY-12. Donald Trump just announced he's going to rename the Kennedy Center after HIMSELF.
Will you help send me to Congress to stand up to his dictator B.S. by splitting a donation between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=121825_4]
This isn't the first time Trump has tried to erase my grandfather President Kennedy's legacy, and it won't be the last.
I want to fight for the things that ACTUALLY matter in Congress — things like health care, the environment, and affordable housing. I'll have zero part in propping up Trump's narcissism.
Send me to Congress to smoke these fools! I won't be intimidated or back down. Join the momentum and split a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 between myself and The Real Texas PAC right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=121825_4]

Our campaign represents everything Trump can't stand or defeat, and that makes me proud as hell.

Jack

| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=279a09061d004065b56aa86a5464ad0c&_e=66FALt5-cKORhyHStDkj8PoP0pqDV0PWwiW_MHyfbCej94mwZH7o2Ol2ziyB0RlBiF9LFAsZdCWDcRw1jMCNTD7dgGPqNKDiQt_KAuFEJ4oFmuYICY3frwKC0o5W3ph2hnrhdxudLyeixsNfeSbHJ7bYoLZQai1nscjtjLpKAWUecDc9yShTKlHVGD7jAaNIe8T_GU-oZriZfzlz-ixCJBren6D28NKIyA4a8nhSTZD3B1EGlwVqS8vI6SAKxrCGAn8SJNi8IcQ5BZXyXDPjPFRYrjHbXZU4XY5xkSu9oLcqNcQbJjSshRP1U7RDx01UC5a-AxunQeRKvAz0PX_sjDw6hekGO29Yp7I-xSrYWJZwiuAIWnCkzhTmuCyDG3Rj62CTjjED-Jiv9pn1XdPo8RbG1i9r0XFt2xpNtZf3L8zyIHt9aCWFtXKfrMuNuLHlsk_9w1Rwp5BvI8sSw9xA4hDIZobGGKxES0MJT1rTpahqPPcmMz58WgGGIMupKk58rHX_Laav-af1dTv7I0hWBoqSewadLVjriN6adaK_2UDJ7IZsLGhcKRVy_XgEEqvPEN4TTOvkYrhEIHrO2vY5dwGTrVas5o44ZiJfmb71iRDx13mSqbSmE5SxeWuHd8aH1Ou_RiMraCqiG7O3R7RmcRNsBJfFU_t2b3HA2meiScpCosOrcCj67g4yi2JQ-Lvc)**

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE PENNSYLVANIA DEMOCRATIC PARTY AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609310/590008231/1489846760?refcode=email_header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) Peter, we’ll cut right to the chase: [**Trump and Republicans know that Pennsylvania could be the deciding factor in the 2026 elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609312/590008234/1707305619?amount=15&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) They also know that despite all odds, Pennsylvania has stood firm against their extreme agenda. They’ve seen Governor Shapiro and Democrats’ progress in Harrisburg — and they’re panicking. So when Donald Trump jetted into Pennsylvania last week, we were disturbed, but not surprised. [**Donald Trump came here to kickstart his plans for a total MAGA takeover in Pennsylvania. He thinks he can drown us out — but we won’t let that happen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609314/590008243/-1661492220?amount=15&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) [_**Here’s our plan: We’re calling on supporters across the Commonwealth to step up, and usher in a historic wave of Democratic support to send Trump the UNMISTAKEABLE message that Pennsylvania is not up for grabs next year. Can we count on you to chip in $15 and join our fight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609316/590008253/1707305619?amount=15&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) For the past year, Donald Trump has made Pennsylvanians’ lives worse. With the help of his sinister administration and MAGA majority in Congress, he has: Jacked up costs, slashed healthcare, threatened good assistance, and dismantled our federal government. He doesn’t care if our children go hungry. He doesn’t care if our grandparents lost their healthcare. He doesn’t care about working class families putting food on the table. Peter, Democrats in Pennsylvania are standing their ground against Trump’s extremism and working around the clock to protect our Democratic progress. [**But the truth is, Governor Shapiro is one of the last statewide Democrats left in Pennsylvania — and one of the only things standing between a total MAGA takeover.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609318/590008260/-1661492220?amount=15&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) [_**We can’t ignore what’s in front of us. But we can be proactive and ensure our Democrats have the resources necessary to conquer Trump’s red wave next year. Can we count on you to chip in $15 to help Democrats win big in 2026, defeat extremism, and protect our Commonwealth for years to come?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609320/590008268/1707305619?amount=15&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | ****** ** | ****** ** | ****** ** | ****[Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121609323/590008272/-1661492220?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=email_121925_terrified&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQ0ZGNlMi1mY2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPKcbxAITSc7NpxPAHtN1Vlo6mGGFaTF39FJdlNrzZg=)****

clean_body: = Peter, we’ll cut right to the chase: = They also know that despite all odds, Pennsylvania has stood firm against their extreme agenda. They’ve seen Governor Shapiro and Democrats’ progress in Harrisburg — and they’re panicking. So when Donald Trump jetted into Pennsylvania last week, we were disturbed, but not surprised. = = For the past year, Donald Trump has made Pennsylvanians’ lives worse. With the help of his sinister administration and MAGA majority in Congress, he has: Jacked up costs, slashed healthcare, threatened good assistance, and dismantled our federal government. He doesn’t care if our children go hungry. He doesn’t care if our grandparents lost their healthcare. He doesn’t care about working class families putting food on the table. Peter, Democrats in Pennsylvania are standing their ground against Trump’s extremism and working around the clock to protect our Democratic progress. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **** | **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** | **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** | **** | **** | **= ** | **= Thank you, PA Dems | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Reflecting on the year’s successes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,

With the new year just around the corner, we wanted to take a moment to reflect on the Democratic successes we’ve seen this year.

Across the country, voters delivered a clear message: it’s time for change. Democrats flipped 21 percent of all previously Republican-held seats, winning decisive victories in communities that had long been Republican strongholds.

Here in Massachusetts, we saw big wins in legislative special elections bringing two new Democrats in Hannah Bowen and Lisa Field to the statehouse. In our local elections, we welcomed six new Mayors-elect and celebrated Boston Mayor Michelle Wu’s historic win.

The momentum carried nationwide, with victories in Virginia with Governor-elect Abigail Spanberger and New Jersey with Governor-elect Mikie Sherrill.

Wins in major municipal and state elections only add to the story, with New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani taking in over 50 percent and Miami Mayor-elect Eileen Higgins drawing an overwhelming 60 percent of the vote. Pennsylvania Democrats held strong, retaining three state Supreme Court Judges and electing the first-ever Democratic district attorney in Bucks County. In the Virginia House of Delegates, Democrats flipped more than 12 seats, increasing their majority to a historic 64 seats.

In the New Jersey General Assembly, Democrats expanded their majority, with their largest margin of victory since 1973. And in states like Iowa, Mississippi and Georgia, Democrats won critical races, breaking Republican supermajorities and flipping seats by wide margins.

But just as important as who voters chose to lead was the issues they chose to support. Across the country, we had ballot question wins in California that will ensure transparency in governance and in Maine to protect how and where people cast their ballots.

All together, these victories around the nation, and with our six new democratic Mayors here at home, reflect a growing desire for fairness, equality and truth. And in 2026, we must continue to capture this energy and build upon it.

This momentum doesn’t sustain itself. If you’d like to help us continue organizing, building and winning, please consider making a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/massachusetts-democratic-state-committee---federal-account-1] today.

These victories wouldn’t have been possible without your support. Thank you for the hours you’ve spent knocking doors, making phone calls and engaging with voters across our Commonwealth and our country.

Together, we will make 2026 an even brighter year.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]

Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]

Again, this momentum won’t continue on its own. If you want to help us keep organizing, building, and winning, please consider making a donation today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/massachusetts-democratic-state-committee---federal-account-1] .
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Have you been to an OLCV Lobby Day?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn]
Dear Peter,
This year, for the first time since the pandemic, we were able to host an in-person Lobby Day. Not only was it fun to return to hosting this important event in-person, but it was a meaningful and impactful experience for our volunteers. Here is a testimonial from OLCV volunteer Rick Reynolds from West Linn:
I've been so impressed by OLCV and their Lobby Days. The expert trainers do a remarkable job of quickly preparing us to engage with our legislators productively. We've all had so much fun, too, and I look forward to the next events!
These Lobby Days are only possible with your generosity .
It costs $4,000 to host an OLCV Lobby Day, and all of these funds come from our generous donors. If we could get 40 donors to give $100 right now, we can fund a future OLCV Lobby Day. Peter [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2] , will you help us continue our meaningful Lobby Days, so our volunteers have the chance to lobby their elected officials? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Help us host another Lobby Day! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn]
Why is Lobby Day so important? It gives our volunteers not only the chance to speak directly to their legislators on issues they care about, but also to receive training, tips, and tricks on how best to lobby their elected officials. If we are going to win this fight, our legislators need to hear from their constituents.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn]
Our Lobby Day provides a sense of community when things feel gloomy — it’s exactly what our members need now.
Keep Lobby Day going! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=0yzHFpLXlF/cIiAPnZifXoEjNlYbAlxInIjmi0LvnioUYLWHkCqtoTvZ3LBKcCO1V2oM/uZNZVr2ADh9oOiYWNc10RUIO67ilyatB/CKydkLGkHTfARh/WKrZ+FKz7Bn]
Will you give a generous gift of $100 now so we can host another Lobby Day? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Thank you for what you do,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director

body:
Did you get a chance to take George’s priorities survey?

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=PM18duy%2FfJ36pIg0qFpvaJr2oL2W3tlvOtliyT%2FNFCPnIjowv%2FlmRKVCTZt9dEVBDK%2BVO5daz8Xb8x6WgMSOoVsuRh%2FsWJUKiiMGPTJ8ig1JeqNBvSefUQTP0xeeFQkuI4EeOP2OLTIRNo53QbAyOeyzdnxBq4Vg3tmL%2BlkwxnOpryxs70BjjCLIa9WbkfWhKVG64JmOiy4f26cKfL3ESOdpdDvmY2F7U%2FuW9DMdqS1y8hywnAqIK2uJTQ9R5nuQe7nLr9sWvRgWHdpapn7cGGknzvfrxK3ZtTcnBjStISM07rrFvJL5MTcVPCBWW655yGs6SZlqWzdfLa7pfl6SoxmOZyK6XgtsK8PNMh49Ph674ds6GWE9JxldIioIj6KAkZvehjQHqAV%2BiC7gqrMXRypSMoAvDdmo9UrdqV6%2BPaiqlzJQeaBqv2YxJ9IrZP5I)

Hi Peter. Team Latimer here — we just wanted to make sure you saw George’s latest message. He’s been hard at work in Congress and meeting with families, small business owners, and community leaders across NY-16 — but he wants to hear directly from you about what matters most right now. [If you haven’t yet, please take a moment to share your thoughts in George’s short priorities survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611448/590015370/859997585?source=SBD_GL_EM_SURV_121925_Prioritiesfwd_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5NTg5MWUtZmZkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YLjIvl0VQ2GDEONcxDOorIXd4LBweiNS7lpbIOQLds=&emci=76ce4440-62d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&emdi=cd95891e-ffdc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=21388742) | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611454/590015375/859997585?source=SBD_GL_EM_SURV_121925_Prioritiesfwd_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5NTg5MWUtZmZkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YLjIvl0VQ2GDEONcxDOorIXd4LBweiNS7lpbIOQLds=&emci=76ce4440-62d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&emdi=cd95891e-ffdc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=21388742)

* * *
_Begin forwarded message from George Latimer:_
Peter,
Since being sworn into Congress almost one year ago, I’ve met with families, small business owners, and community leaders across NY-16 — and I’m reminded every day that the most important part of my job is listening to folks like you.
Washington may be noisy, but our work is about real people — keeping healthcare affordable, protecting our democracy, strengthening schools, and making our communities safer and more affordable.
[That’s why I’m reaching out today: I want to know what’s on your mind and how I can best serve you. Will you take a moment to share your priorities with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611458/590015380/859997585?source=SBD_GL_EM_SURV_121925_Prioritiesfwd_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5NTg5MWUtZmZkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YLjIvl0VQ2GDEONcxDOorIXd4LBweiNS7lpbIOQLds=&emci=76ce4440-62d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&emdi=cd95891e-ffdc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=21388742)
[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611463/590015384/859997585?source=SBD_GL_EM_SURV_121925_Prioritiesfwd_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5NTg5MWUtZmZkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YLjIvl0VQ2GDEONcxDOorIXd4LBweiNS7lpbIOQLds=&emci=76ce4440-62d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&emdi=cd95891e-ffdc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=21388742)
---
Through the highs and lows, hearing directly from New Yorkers about what matters most to them is what renews my commitment — and reminds me why I got into public service in the first place: to fight for our community and build a better future together.
[So if you have a few minutes to spare, I’d be so grateful if you could take my end-of-year Priorities Survey and let me know how I can best serve this community.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611471/590015389/859997585?source=SBD_GL_EM_SURV_121925_Prioritiesfwd_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5NTg5MWUtZmZkYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YLjIvl0VQ2GDEONcxDOorIXd4LBweiNS7lpbIOQLds=&emci=76ce4440-62d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&emdi=cd95891e-ffdc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=21388742)

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: Did you get a chance to take George’s priorities survey? George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter. Team Latimer here — we just wanted to make sure you saw George’s latest message. He’s been hard at work in Congress and meeting with families, small business owners, and community leaders across NY-16 — but he wants to hear directly from you about what matters most right now. | Your input helps guide George’s work in Washington and ensures he’s focused on the issues that matter most to New Yorkers. Thank you for making your voice heard. — Team Latimer Begin forwarded message from George Latimer: Peter, Since being sworn into Congress almost one year ago, I’ve met with families, small business owners, and community leaders across NY-16 — and I’m reminded every day that the most important part of my job is listening to folks like you. Washington may be noisy, but our work is about real people — keeping healthcare affordable, protecting our democracy, strengthening schools, and making our communities safer and more affordable. Through the highs and lows, hearing directly from New Yorkers about what matters most to them is what renews my commitment — and reminds me why I got into public service in the first place: to fight for our community and build a better future together. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with me, Peter. George Latimer | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: In Wisconsin, family traditions mean a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251219-930&t=1&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)
In Wisconsin, family traditions mean a lot.
Whether it’s decorating for the holidays or sitting down to a meal at the end of a long day, these moments remind us what we’re fighting for.
Judge Chris Taylor carries those same Wisconsin values with her every day. She’s a mom, a judge, and a lifelong fighter who believes our courts should protect families, fairness, and the freedoms we pass down to our kids.
That’s why this race for the Wisconsin Supreme Court matters so much. One seat can decide whether our courts work for everyday people or for the powerful corporate interests trying to buy influence.
[**If you’re able, chip in $10 today to support Judge Chris Taylor and help keep this race people-powered.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251219_1_ak.rlhZwj&amount=10&refcode=em20251219-930&t=3&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)
**[Donate ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251219_1_ak.rlhZwj&amount=10&refcode=em20251219-930&t=4&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)**
**As a thank you, we’ll send you her grandma’s famous snowball cookie recipe — a holiday favorite that’s been in her family for generations.**
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251219_1_ak.rlhZwj&amount=10&refcode=em20251219-930&t=5&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)
Every grassroots donation helps counter dark money, protect our rights, and build a future where Wisconsin families come first.
— Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251219-930&t=6&refcode2=930_294397_hsisdU&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=930%2E294397%2EhsisdU)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

Dear Peter, [We filed a lawsuit this week demanding that the Trump administration release all internal communications about its plans to destroy at least $10 million in unexpired, taxpayer-funded contraceptives.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121611536/590015485/1141910609?sourceid=1151046&utm_campaign=26emjge-1211aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTBjM2NmZC1mZWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsb9SW0whqB5xzl9uhfDtmMG1URBodwizK4LZk80DDc=&emci=68486cec-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=690c3cfd-fedc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237) | [5X MATCH: FIGHT BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121611537/590015486/1141910609?sourceid=1151046&utm_campaign=26emjge-1211aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTBjM2NmZC1mZWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsb9SW0whqB5xzl9uhfDtmMG1URBodwizK4LZk80DDc=&emci=68486cec-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=690c3cfd-fedc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

These supplies are meant for people in low-income countries who urgently need access to basic reproductive health care. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request months ago seeking more information, which the U.S. Department of State ignored.
[We are suing to expose the truth, demand accountability, and stop this senseless destruction of essential health care. And right now, your gift can go 5X further to support this fight! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121611538/590015487/1141910609?sourceid=1151046&utm_campaign=26emjge-1211aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTBjM2NmZC1mZWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsb9SW0whqB5xzl9uhfDtmMG1URBodwizK4LZk80DDc=&emci=68486cec-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=690c3cfd-fedc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)
If these contraceptives are destroyed or left to expire, the consequences will be devastating:
* 362,000 unintended pregnancies
* 110,000 unsafe abortions
* 718 preventable maternal deaths

[This is not just government waste. It is cruelty—deliberate, ideological, and deadly. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121611539/590015488/1141910609?sourceid=1151046&utm_campaign=26emjge-1211aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTBjM2NmZC1mZWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsb9SW0whqB5xzl9uhfDtmMG1URBodwizK4LZk80DDc=&emci=68486cec-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=690c3cfd-fedc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)
Multiple aid organizations and foreign governments have offered to purchase and distribute the supplies. The administration refused. Officials have even falsely claimed the stockpile was already destroyed and mischaracterized the contraception as “abortifacient”—despite containing no abortion-inducing drugs.
[5X MATCH: GIVE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121611540/590015489/1141910609?sourceid=1151046&utm_campaign=26emjge-1211aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTBjM2NmZC1mZWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsb9SW0whqB5xzl9uhfDtmMG1URBodwizK4LZk80DDc=&emci=68486cec-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=690c3cfd-fedc-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

clean_body: We’re suing to expose a cruel, wasteful decision | | | Dear Peter, | These supplies are meant for people in low-income countries who urgently need access to basic reproductive health care. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request months ago seeking more information, which the U.S. Department of State ignored. If these contraceptives are destroyed or left to expire, the consequences will be devastating: 362,000 unintended pregnancies 110,000 unsafe abortions * 718 preventable maternal deaths Multiple aid organizations and foreign governments have offered to purchase and distribute the supplies. The administration refused. Officials have even falsely claimed the stockpile was already destroyed and mischaracterized the contraception as “abortifacient”—despite containing no abortion-inducing drugs. With you in the fight, Center for Reproductive Rights | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=95f1ba0db8ff4a4897a7e9c9eac9a88a&_e=aniIGYrKocFD3FOhT0SQj40lAJg_RiKAQku4BxZqhgr1pTCWenxQ1HG-yj8lWJda5uLZfhq3P8S2GHv74V8WNyGqY16nFDNeRlg5l0t7kZ4bPmS7LIOuz3M13-e5Xz33xCh-Fe2GLuVC0GJDuO5f5iROeN37ihCc72TAIPtAYXV00Kpyubg29Km37jDAmTygVv0N3qnjplmF3lhg9HW53ab5XDGZqmzjSJYxAWJqu4aaRaPMPm3ts2MGYHDh3wkgOokwkLLHQTVMC4NmppLFiNMNEmWf1HsNh5UhV7C4jURceOXLulXPr7zWuiMs6cvraP9vR6nYVu0-QjZwmcnOU4bV57fAWh_UPOFNorKvm6RjBlQ5cImMIzcfkKC2J116WI96X0tVRmijHtLMhDPOIgwh6KzznVamzyVCQjdCVx_OaJCIbfHohIRBILZ3jpKPgQZef2Ze1mRrYMFZubg0PC_PBJ17FUizF76iSZpHMBJG88Y8bg0d-R3e0jZ6DqxwzVZJXgSA6Legy7oj0d0knNRw0cGmmGtV6kQvrTqFLaTsYlSu6iZGrKWeXrTpXe8eGEHQidFc8hnlHMZtR1fY7w2gh9RYKGiSAAtI_gAT2TgYCN4ipZlSTtwaJhnhS62iLNbHfTLGg2SEevf8eYKXNlRiMp6zvPFEMJVKq1T6kdERfl3SMZSCYg3CseQfC6F-f_hHniWB_30kTT10qBd6GGtjfCXHuU_INS-dOf-tBS6T2ObfI6P2TUxUi5Z1TBdSknkzkvbNihgsNKq2y_1lbuwtH4wWbzjMSgZFN7QicP2uvFkK8UwZdPiykmWOJr3s)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

subject: It’s expensive to be poor

body:
Every family deserves to have a fair shot.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=5poF6cTix74gnkxsEf1BQxLIrP%2BpTvFFo2jGbp8d755BGjj%2BUs5YDkYNYmvh3C6b%2BiJ1E2W2WZLtiWIb9LrEqG6toY2VZlz00D99mjnLbPqdl6g0YuBJwY%2FmEHPP415%2FZQLDQANdy5VCfmXfP7DgrfzUfWL5zK%2BB5MHvbZ%2FuoQ4SyNchF7umtaL9xDdwj8ObhUZn2z9FAHKKLHzQYRsjWyzAkPl3OtUsSe%2B2ZVzXaQjGWP4ySMh7xznUynrCpo2wAPfRV3GH%2F4QSxktdfysJhFu%2BEliKcEV3Kzx7CixvSznkybBwABRZMfRjbedL1PdiB8bLjbTXuOzraHtZ6MeZ8PCHLeHMPiJwdxrktWLuQ3e2ZPL46RbtugDJ4t7u0rG5aitZyrULRJGXqStuj%2B6eRsaLwWoQbqj00FSqAurpFpA6BWWy2el7oPX9g5chwFF9)

---
Hey Peter — it's Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well. About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor. That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. **This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611910/590016662/469876810?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121925_HAALANDSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWQxNjlmZS1mZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09k6x1nrPSscDXzZUgTcTIGX4zkYQ2OgLf4WWNL2Lw=) Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. [This campaign is about giving every family in New Mexico the fair shot they deserve. If you’re able, will you split a donation of $10, or anything you can, between The Democratic Party of Georgia and our campaign to help us keep New Mexico moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611912/590016664/469876810?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121925_HAALANDSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWQxNjlmZS1mZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09k6x1nrPSscDXzZUgTcTIGX4zkYQ2OgLf4WWNL2Lw=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611914/590016666/469876810?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121925_HAALANDSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWQxNjlmZS1mZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09k6x1nrPSscDXzZUgTcTIGX4zkYQ2OgLf4WWNL2Lw=)**
---
I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone.
Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. [So please, can I count on you to split $10, $25, or whatever you can comfortably spare between The Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121611916/590016668/469876810?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121925_HAALANDSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWQxNjlmZS1mZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09k6x1nrPSscDXzZUgTcTIGX4zkYQ2OgLf4WWNL2Lw=)

clean_body: Every family deserves to have a fair shot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey Peter — it's Deb Haaland. When I think about the holiday season, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well. About fifteen years ago, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: It’s expensive to be poor. That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. It shouldn’t be this hard. = Peter, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. = | | = I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On Day One, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone. Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to Deb Haaland and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | = | = | = | = | = | = Be fierce, Deb | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard. But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing. If you'd like to donate, please = | = | = | | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
