name: Haley S.
subject: Have you had a chance to add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Help me keep up my record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 40 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: Here's what I’ve heard from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10627?t=4&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 37% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10627?t=8&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=1682%2E49239%2EfPQPFX)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Team WFP
subject: We’re winning — and 2026 is next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Please read: a message about what comes next | | | Hi Peter, We wanted to share this note from WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell because it reflects just how much we’ve accomplished together this year. 2026 is shaping up to be a huge year, which is why we've set an ambitious goal to raise $100,000 before the end of the year so we can lay the groundwork for even bigger wins ahead. Keep reading if you want to learn more about all that we were able to achieve this year, together. **[Then chip in to help keep this momentum going in 2026 and beyond.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RHFRMJadK4SAlVm97RH0_5nfxa8xoEPQ07eIhJyr4q1_t3ltjO0WS0F7KnZ2joh_OkP49T_Wzq9r5DMYWRNJESqVI9NFXyoMkLDV897dfZYbgzoDs9TI20B4gaXLdSHPBHC1l9Zv91WpoishVFKsYuGhCSZSkM6UCGQ_Ps7fPmegWTbiR2nbwxB6qJodghZXh1A6Mqa__W0HIb8tnYBFnOUUrGaD-j0Cf2h10sfM2Lypnm6yCZcbeQrMOtBOuHTP_QCEI6uF5N5zQZG-MpTU0O_1qewMvPH5TqNHkQ9iTuPFw/4mk/eaifoXzwQtu9XQN33N9z1A/h0/h001.Mg3eP6IewcA7Iz5tu27IlfslrsBzfQkeZ6WT_tU949w)** — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party**
Date: Dec. 5, 2025
Subject: 2025 has been one of our biggest tests ever Dear Peter, it’s Maurice Mitchell, National Director of the Working Families Party. 2025 has been one of our biggest tests ever. Immigrant communities are under constant attack by masked kidnappers. Our cities are being occupied by military personnel. And millions of families are facing food and health care crises more severe than any other time in modern US history. **But in the face of MAGA’s nonstop attacks, not one of you buckled under the pressure. We rose to the occasion and fought back.** We have taken to the streets, time and time again, to protect our neighbors. We have won _historic_ political victories all across the country, electing true working class champions like **Zohran Mamdani, Adelita Grijalva, Katie Wilson, Shenise Turner-Sloss, and more** to all kinds of offices. And support for the Working Families Party — and our vision for a new political party that doesn’t surrender to the GOP — is higher than it's ever been. **All of that, and more, is thanks to you. And you’ll be the key to our work in 2026, too.** Not only are we going to continue to fight Trump’s agenda with everything we’ve got, but we also have spring primary elections — including **WFP champions like Brad Lander, Nida Allam, and Randy Villegas** — fast-approaching, and the chance to kick MAGA out of power in the midterm elections in the fall. That’s why we’re setting an ambitious fundraising goal to close out the year strong, and be well-equipped to take on these challenges _and win_. **Between now and midnight on December 31st, we need to raise $100,000. And I sincerely hope you can help push us past that goal.** **[Please make a contribution today and help the Working Families Party reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. We’re building an alternative vision of how the government should work and _who_ it's supposed to serve, and your support gives us the resources we need to win.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RHFRMJadK4SAlVm97RH0_5nYzJ-qT8VW95CUXYbjX3QQbffeYJKLC_pKZidSvgP4RyQSLFaqPdugD86jTI_Y7PqywNmwRM_xzDsKVOnWZbmcAFu83qH-o7EbtmSkdg0o_nYj-2POiKJcuCt-T-StofgowcrxXloa7YAJo7kgmyprjK-_q5ZW7G-bqwwAHCrEoL34zWEPGRVZ--Es9b_hBsNiCx3SHm5huD8jo2Z9-BHBTLO0eFWSDmBwcJJncrwHMtHNNgdmdIFaKpcdOyARm_vqWM6O_lGMnPelAMVpDQNaQ/4mk/eaifoXzwQtu9XQN33N9z1A/h1/h001.N-9hE7wM4V7VJwfsyWuKQUfEYFvyMKqyAskbw7Ye35Q)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RFoundyEMxh3-VNgN7UjfpV0g0JhfxtPvsYYhxh9LDV4YDRPdZKa6T6iMyqonLF333oO9h7raeTXYDmg3I_Zrdc0wut0F7zzr2JRt1-bl_NNm74HyfEHkNySKp5WfA_1QNLfRNifB9j_8pxsZfL-OGIPFFDrYZgPpC9Dz9yxieh_wGX248AtZ_q5qZuCy2FQ7fqQEwJ-onGw6MtmtnrQzbTXETNMKuwLEDywv3ZkkF8A7cax1dZjXodd_EUSL4FSDt2g0Vna9MrU_2tAw2rO9jSepyHHVklLytDbVJ8L_z1_A/4mk/eaifoXzwQtu9XQN33N9z1A/h2/h001.Dwo8FMV3w8WE71_T2cMDAQ2C8QxXeZCyq7cnoAdEPvk)** A year ago, after Donald Trump’s victory left us all reeling, I wrote about the challenges we were facing, and the work we had in store for us:
> _Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. Because the easy response to this is to point fingers and blame voters. Or simply retreat, shut down, and tune out. **But we can't wait around for the system to change on its own.** Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. The bottom line is this: **having hope is a choice.** _
Despite how terrifying much of the last 12 months has been, I can’t express my love and gratitude enough for how you’ve shown up for your friends, your neighbors, and strangers alike. This movement that we’re building is proving, day in and day out, that solidarity is a verb, and it is a powerful one. We’re proving that when we stand shoulder to shoulder with one another, not only can we hold our ground against authoritarian bullies, **we can beat them.** So please, stay involved. Help keep your communities safe. **[If you can afford to, pitch in to support our work here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RHFRMJadK4SAlVm97RH0_5npjlOV3P-GRA9o41PYnDq1eGHq1jp0NkwddjJUrnPxdkRyie-9e6JgXJl0NylkQgxm_ouyFyVcgnn_Z22tez58t6ZX0bOjnRAG62jvbC9Jw5JhLCxTpuUdg1Zewt_wu6zz742H5qir6wgD0OGtcYlNBDC8J7WPIuMoUXTuIqE4kn8eRAUX79d61T2bW-Zj6HtzY2d7qyBLaQDdFIo_dg0UJtPsHAs4Awb5QUuXJsTenkGfZCotRrnJijyTUZkZVmxge_Lm1c1Tqa4lcidUILv3g/4mk/eaifoXzwQtu9XQN33N9z1A/h3/h001.VriA0S1-getnoMA7L-zCMtsFmahRZvFxCa8TRAJB1FM)** And above all else, continue to lend a hand to those around you. Sincerely, Maurice Mitchell
National Director

clean_body: Please read: a message about what comes next | | | Hi Peter, We wanted to share this note from WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell because it reflects just how much we’ve accomplished together this year. 2026 is shaping up to be a huge year, which is why we've set an ambitious goal to raise $100,000 before the end of the year so we can lay the groundwork for even bigger wins ahead. Keep reading if you want to learn more about all that we were able to achieve this year, together. — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party Date: Dec. 5, 2025 Subject: 2025 has been one of our biggest tests ever Dear Peter, it’s Maurice Mitchell, National Director of the Working Families Party. 2025 has been one of our biggest tests ever. Immigrant communities are under constant attack by masked kidnappers. Our cities are being occupied by military personnel. And millions of families are facing food and health care crises more severe than any other time in modern US history. But in the face of MAGA’s nonstop attacks, not one of you buckled under the pressure. We rose to the occasion and fought back. We have taken to the streets, time and time again, to protect our neighbors. We have won historic political victories all across the country, electing true working class champions like Zohran Mamdani, Adelita Grijalva, Katie Wilson, Shenise Turner-Sloss, and more to all kinds of offices. And support for the Working Families Party — and our vision for a new political party that doesn’t surrender to the GOP — is higher than it's ever been. All of that, and more, is thanks to you. And you’ll be the key to our work in 2026, too. Not only are we going to continue to fight Trump’s agenda with everything we’ve got, but we also have spring primary elections — including WFP champions like Brad Lander, Nida Allam, and Randy Villegas — fast-approaching, and the chance to kick MAGA out of power in the midterm elections in the fall. That’s why we’re setting an ambitious fundraising goal to close out the year strong, and be well-equipped to take on these challenges and win. Between now and midnight on December 31st, we need to raise $100,000. And I sincerely hope you can help push us past that goal. A year ago, after Donald Trump’s victory left us all reeling, I wrote about the challenges we were facing, and the work we had in store for us: Now more than ever, we must build community — to protect each other from harmful attacks, to fill the gaps where our government falls short, and to build lasting power for the future. Because the easy response to this is to point fingers and blame voters. Or simply retreat, shut down, and tune out. But we can't wait around for the system to change on its own. Both major parties have failed working people, and it's time to build independent political power — one that centers solidarity, and focuses on winning victories that families can see and feel. The bottom line is this: having hope is a choice. Despite how terrifying much of the last 12 months has been, I can’t express my love and gratitude enough for how you’ve shown up for your friends, your neighbors, and strangers alike. This movement that we’re building is proving, day in and day out, that solidarity is a verb, and it is a powerful one. We’re proving that when we stand shoulder to shoulder with one another, not only can we hold our ground against authoritarian bullies, we can beat them. So please, stay involved. Help keep your communities safe. And above all else, continue to lend a hand to those around you. Sincerely, Maurice Mitchell National Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Adam Schiff
subject: What I shared on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9318%2E5257348%2EZrkPSM)
Hi Derek,
I recently gave my “maiden speech” in the Senate, reflecting on my first year as a United States Senator.
I want to share a part of that speech with you — **[but first, I am humbly asking you to chip in to help power our continued work to deliver for every family, every Californian, and every American on a promise of a better, fairer future.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251219_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9318%2E5257348%2EZrkPSM)**
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251219_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9318%2E5257348%2EZrkPSM)
---
_Let me tell you a little about who I am that may differ from the version many Americans see on Fox, or in the President’s social media feed, and what I have done to introduce myself to my 40 million new constituents._
_Because I intend to be a Senator for all Californians. In the red areas and the blue, and everywhere else in between. That’s one reason I sought to join the Senate Agriculture Committee — the first time in more than 30 years that our nation’s largest agriculture-producing state has had a seat at that table._
_I have traveled the state on planes, trains, automobiles, and even boats, visiting nearly half of California’s 58 counties — including some of the most conservative parts of our state. I’ve toured almond orchards and cilantro fields, health clinics and food banks, and affordable housing developments._
_I even took part in an ill-advised game of dice at a bar in Los Baños — while drinking a bitter Dutch liqueur — which I will not be repeating._
**_Wherever I go, I’ve asked Californians the same question: how can I help?_**
_Now it is certainly true, depending on where I am in the Golden State, that sometimes I have to break through the caricatures of me on right-wing media, and that can be a challenge. But it is one I very much enjoy. There is nothing more fun in politics than upsetting people’s expectations._
_I knew, for example, that I was making progress when a farmer in conservative Butte County told me after an hour-long meeting: “I don’t know why the President calls you ‘watermelon head.’ You have a perfectly normal-size head!”_
_And that comes from a farmer who knows a thing or two about melons._
**_Traveling across California has only underscored that it is the honor of a lifetime to serve the state I so deeply love in the Senate._**
One year down, much more work to go. But there is no job I love more than serving the people of California. I wake up every morning so deeply grateful for the opportunity to meet with people across the state, asking, “how can I help?”
**Your support has made this work possible, Derek. For that, I am forever grateful.**
Thank you for having my back,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9318%2E5257348%2EZrkPSM)

name: Jason Crow
subject: This creed is the foundation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hi there, serving in the United States Army was one of the greatest honors of my life. I’ve never forgotten the creed I lived by when I served as an Army Ranger:

“My country expects me to move further, faster, and fight harder than any other.”
“I will shoulder more than my share of the task, whatever it may be, 100% and then some.”
“Under no circumstances will I ever embarrass my country.”

My service taught me a lot about respect, working under pressure, and the value of selfless service to others.

As a leader, it was on me to set an example — to be the last one to eat, the first one to jump out of the plane, and model the behavior I expected from others.

Right now, our president is the antithesis of this creed. He’s called for members of Congress — including me — to be imprisoned and killed, all for speaking out about his extremism.

He’s weaponizing the FBI against me, launching bogus federal inquiries against those who are putting the oaths we swore to the Constitution over the whims of this president.

I signed up to serve to protect our rights and freedoms. I ran for office to make a difference in people’s lives. Now more than ever, it’s clear: we need more leaders who are ready to do the hard work to defend the rule of law against all odds.

Can you pitch in $10 right now to help me bring a new generation of leadership to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=10]

Jason

clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] Hi there, serving in the United States Army was one of the greatest honors of my life. I’ve never forgotten the creed I lived by when I served as an Army Ranger: “My country expects me to move further, faster, and fight harder than any other.” “I will shoulder more than my share of the task, whatever it may be, 100% and then some.” “Under no circumstances will I ever embarrass my country.” My service taught me a lot about respect, working under pressure, and the value of selfless service to others. As a leader, it was on me to set an example — to be the last one to eat, the first one to jump out of the plane, and model the behavior I expected from others. Right now, our president is the antithesis of this creed. He’s called for members of Congress — including me — to be imprisoned and killed, all for speaking out about his extremism. He’s weaponizing the FBI against me, launching bogus federal inquiries against those who are putting the oaths we swore to the Constitution over the whims of this president. I signed up to serve to protect our rights and freedoms. I ran for office to make a difference in people’s lives. Now more than ever, it’s clear: we need more leaders who are ready to do the hard work to defend the rule of law against all odds. Can you pitch in $10 right now to help me bring a new generation of leadership to Congress? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 NOW [] DONATE $25 NOW [] DONATE $50 NOW [] DONATE $100 NOW [] DONATE $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Mike Collier
subject: My top priority as Texas’ next Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Collier for Lt
body:
I’m ready to go to work for the people of our great state.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121617626/590035761/-1348150339?MC4TX_EM_FR_121925=MC4TX_EM_FR_121925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RhNjVmNi0wY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g3PGdIx6rZ--6Hl5BKL6N7BtaKl1jSFubuHO5Xjj6M=&emci=edcc6497-5cdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a3da65f6-0cdd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=7689298)
---
Friend, I'll tell you this: my top priority as Texas' next Lieutenant Governor will be to save our public schools. Everything starts with education — it's the backbone of our economy, our communities, and our future. But our current Lieutenant Governor, Republican Dan Patrick, is trying to defund our public schools. I'm running to stop him, and I'm ready to fully fund our public schools, respect our teachers, and make sure every child in Texas has a chance to succeed. **[If that's the type of leadership you believe in, chip in now to help put me in office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121617627/590035763/1701809040?amount=25&MC4TX_EM_FR_121925=MC4TX_EM_FR_121925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RhNjVmNi0wY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g3PGdIx6rZ--6Hl5BKL6N7BtaKl1jSFubuHO5Xjj6M=&emci=edcc6497-5cdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a3da65f6-0cdd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=7689298)** | [DONATE $25 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121617628/590035765/1701809040?amount=25&MC4TX_EM_FR_121925=MC4TX_EM_FR_121925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RhNjVmNi0wY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g3PGdIx6rZ--6Hl5BKL6N7BtaKl1jSFubuHO5Xjj6M=&emci=edcc6497-5cdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a3da65f6-0cdd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=7689298)
---
To say the least, public education is a white-hot issue right now in Texas.
Everywhere I go, people tell me the state is actually working against our public schools, not helping them in the difficult and vital work they do.
And when people talk about the school voucher situation, they ask why this agenda was rammed down our throats by Dan Patrick - let me be clear, I'm all in on protecting our neighborhood public schools.
It speaks to a larger issue, where Texans just don't feel seen and heard by politicians in Austin.
The two-party system has failed to deliver what people are actually asking for. So I'm running as an Independent, and I'm ready to be a rock-solid fighter for public schools. **[But I need this team's support to keep growing our campaign and getting our message out to more voters. Can I count on you to pitch in today and help deliver the leadership our state truly needs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121617629/590035766/1701809040?amount=25&MC4TX_EM_FR_121925=MC4TX_EM_FR_121925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RhNjVmNi0wY2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g3PGdIx6rZ--6Hl5BKL6N7BtaKl1jSFubuHO5Xjj6M=&emci=edcc6497-5cdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a3da65f6-0cdd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=7689298)**
Thank you,
Mike

subject: Running into some problems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to say this in no uncertain times

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121618098/590037511/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTgzMjAzNy0wZGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u8F1TtGbZa6_QH8zhof4ARlFjt6_trZZj3RIxGTj_VA=) We’ve run into a bit of a problem: See, a lot of people think gerrymandering is over in Kansas. They think, since Kansas Republicans called off their special legislative session last month, everything’s settled. Sharice Davids won, and National Republicans lost. So we want to say this in no uncertain terms. **This fight is _not_ over. If anything, Kansas Republicans are more emboldened, more determined than ever to gerrymander our state’s maps and kick Sharice out of Congress.** _In fact, they’ve already set a date: January 12th._ Here’s the extra problem: since a lot of people believe the Kansas GOP’s gerrymander is a thing of the past, our donations have slowed at the worst possible time. We’re just weeks away from the regular legislative session... and these emails are only raising a fraction of what they raised a few months ago. ****_[This is one of our biggest problems right now. It’s not that Kansans don’t care._They just don’t know._ Please, help us spread the word and get our fundraising back on track while we still have time. clean_body: We need to say this in no uncertain times = We’ve run into a bit of a problem: See, a lot of people think gerrymandering is over in Kansas. They think, since Kansas Republicans called off their special legislative session last month, everything’s settled. Sharice Davids won, and National Republicans lost. So we want to say this in no uncertain terms. This fight is not over. If anything, Kansas Republicans are more emboldened, more determined than ever to gerrymander our state’s maps and kick Sharice out of Congress. In fact, they’ve already set a date: January 12th. Here’s the extra problem: since a lot of people believe the Kansas GOP’s gerrymander is a thing of the past, our donations have slowed at the worst possible time. We’re just weeks away from the regular legislative session... and these emails are only raising a fraction of what they raised a few months ago. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ** | **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** | **** | **= ** | **= Thank you so much for stepping up. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Races we have to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
In each of these 26 states, the results from these Secretary of State elections will determine not just who holds those offices but how future elections are run and the shape of our democracy as a whole.
We must make sure that pro-voter, pro-democracy, anti-suppression candidates win everywhere we can. RUSH $25 or more right now to give us the resources we need to push all year to register and turn out every eligible voter >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
These types of elections always fly under the media's radar, Team, but in 2026, 26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race.
Opponents of voting rights already know this, which is why they’re already pouring money into these elections – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. Check out this map:
Map of Key Secretary of State Races in 2026 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121925_2&amount=25]
The work to increase voter participation and turnout for these races has to start now, not next summer. We have to build the infrastructure to defend pro-voter initiatives in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, at the same time as we work to flip the script in key battleground states like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa.
Team: None of it happens without your support. Fuel our work for next year's elections with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121925_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121925_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121925_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121925_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121925_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121925_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121925_2&amount=35]
Opponents of voting rights have been working on these objectives for years. They've targeted state legislatures and key statewide offices to control the rules around voting and that's why they've been in a position to follow up on the "Big Lie" with bill after bill suppressing the vote. They've played the long game to pick and choose their voters and protect their own power.
Most people don't know that their Secretary of State is the state official who runs their elections, let alone who the current office-holder in their state is. But they are the last line of defense against voter suppression and diminished ballot access , which is why we need to invest in voter information, registration, and participation in these critical races.
2025 has been a tough year but we're not backing down. Our right to vote is too important and too much is at stake for our democracy, our fellow Americans, and the direction of our country. Driving pro-voting rights voters to the polls in 2026 is the best possible response to all that we've been forced to live through the last decade.
Your gift -- $5, $10, $25, or more -- helps provide the resources we need to keep voters apprised of what is at stake and get them out to vote for pro-democracy policies. Please, chip in what you can today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121925_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121925_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=JkQawkJ6YME7FBe0lxT98H1cipP6qv1T1pN%2F2IPq%2FV3BQg4h1P8gCdgsBbvlJLHHSKaRDZiDuRdnmx2larGcqqC5Ut2Tzn55CKVvAoqSfgWTHqAYuxOs1VqRRwSHzgDRiTZxu%2F8Zgz5SvzO07i%2FXrkEb460l9TAe8evqqpNPbdLF4m2upg9nx4BWkzvBMxMcmvCTf584w2RqfaM%2BqRARMnFveTtTMfAJP51nAPfvS0cLjva2k%2BkfG7QrANIGXDOCJvMIId2LtnZUBb3As9aOdcxnrqr2BsP%2BClmpKp1D0fmmod85O%2FpvRFC5B1Ezub6Xchsb1s8Rx62s%2BZsG0Y8MpcQ5JVyg6VBHGf73WzLRTZL3oo31vkdMV17iZwa9E8AlsjIeGBAXvzqjOyKYXkGceszkHe58kbmvnxnXbtLpPZQ%3D .

name: Team Cooper HQ
subject: We just got a new opponent… She called for Roy's execution
body:
She called for executing Democrats.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=196%2E124072%2EpqxO8s)
Peter — there’s a new extreme right-wing candidate in the race for U.S. Senate. _Michele Morrow is a Q-Anon conspiracy theorist who called for EXECUTING Democrats, including former Presidents Biden and Obama, and even Roy Cooper._ Look, in 2024, Morrow ran for Superintendent of Public Instruction here in NC. Now, she’s back for seconds and she only lost last year’s race by two points. **[Morrow’s entrance is sure to shake things up in the GOP race, so we need your help to stay prepared. Can you rush in a contribution ASAP to help take on whatever the far-right throws at us?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3194?t=7&akid=196%2E124072%2EpqxO8s)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3195?t=8&akid=196%2E124072%2EpqxO8s)

---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3200?t=13&akid=196%2E124072%2EpqxO8s)
---
Morrow is just the latest extreme right-winger to eye this Senate seat. Our opponent Michael Whatley – Trump’s HANDPICKED Senate candidate – just like Morrow, has made it clear that he’d rubber stamp the GOP agenda no matter how extreme it is. _Like slashing health care and banning abortion._
Both Morrow and Whatley went all in on Trump’s 2020 election denial conspiracy theories. They’re both ready to give the greenlight to far-right radicalism no matter who it hurts.
And NEITHER of them has the experience to lead this state or our country. We can’t let them win.
**[No matter which GOP extremist is on the ballot, we know that this race will be the MOST competitive Senate contest next year. We can’t win without your help. Donate right away to help Roy keep up the fight>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3194?t=14&akid=196%2E124072%2EpqxO8s)**

Team Cooper

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121618482/590038935/-31663778?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.19_OTS-The-Funding-Gap_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTc5OTI5Mi0wZWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrIXkZu274F90tybl2q2HdR_mw8HWEqqUKvnYrARKU=) I just got off a call with my team, and honestly... It wasn't good. **We’re not on track to hit Off the Sidelines’ $50,000 End-of-Year fundraising goal.** This is the kind of moment where I feel the weight of what we're trying to build together. Every woman we recruit, every race we invest in, every seat we have a chance to flip next year... none of it matters if we can’t hit our fundraising goals. Trump's allies are already pouring money into key battleground Senate races. They're recruiting candidates, running polling, booking ad time and locking down the resources they need to defend their vulnerable seats. They learned their lesson from past cycles — start early, spend big and don't give Democrats an inch. And if we don’t hit this goal, our candidates in states like North Carolina and Georgia won’t have the resources they need to fight back and win. They'll be outspent, out-organized and outmaneuvered before they even have a chance to make their case to voters. **_[So please, chip in whatever you can today. We only need another $4,392 before midnight to get back on track!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121618483/590038936/-31663778?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.19_OTS-The-Funding-Gap_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTc5OTI5Mi0wZWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrIXkZu274F90tybl2q2HdR_mw8HWEqqUKvnYrARKU=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121618484/590038937/-31663778?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.19_OTS-The-Funding-Gap_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTc5OTI5Mi0wZWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrIXkZu274F90tybl2q2HdR_mw8HWEqqUKvnYrARKU=)

name: Cori Bush
subject: Same dark money, same lies, same fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]
Trump is really out here talking about: “We need to save St. Louis.”
Yes. From him.
In Trump’s America, our families are being priced out of our communities. Our neighbors are forced to choose between putting food on the table and keeping the lights on, while the rich get richer. That is not the version of St. Louis’ future that I fight for. And the problem is most certainly not you.
When I’m back in Congress, I’ll continue my work to lower the cost of housing, groceries, healthcare, utility bills, and everything else that keeps climbing. I’ll keep pushing to raise the minimum wage and make sure St. Louis gets the investment we deserve.
We need:
* Homes that regular people can afford
* Wages that actually rise with the cost of living
* Medicare for All, healthy food in every neighborhood, and more good union jobs for workers of every skill set
My opponent and his dark-money donors continue pushing misleading rhetoric, funded by the same folks trying to take away SNAP, raise costs for families, and line their own pockets. Meanwhile, we’re building this campaign from the ground up, with people power.
With only 12 days until our end-of-year deadline, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act] our only FEC deadline of the cycle, we have to show them that our campaign can and will win with grassroots support. Every call, door knocked, and donation makes the difference between letting dark money define the race or proving that communities, not billionaires, decide the outcome.
Chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to help us finish the year strong and make sure our movement is ready to win in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]
In solidarity,
— Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251219_SaveSTL_act]

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Tennesseans deserve leaders, not pandering extremists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Extremism benefits no one
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KCW0VP8QWAWAT4J7A4654GG5_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KCW0VP8QWAWAT4J7A4654GG5_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter,

Recent elections across the country, and even more recently in Tennessee, have evidenced growing frustration with the extremism plaguing our government at every level. Tennesseans want leaders who are willing to work together, find common ground and use a little common sense to improve everyone’s quality of life.

Tennessee families are facing real challenges - underfunded public schools, poor roads and growing traffic congestion, increased costs of living, and limited access to healthcare. These problems cannot be solved if everyone stays in their own corner.

**Tennessee deserves real leaders - leaders who do the work, understand the issues and focus on families. ** We are working to elect more leaders who will represent Tennessee, not special interests, and provide the type of real leadership that our families expect and deserve.
---
| | [ Help us today $25 ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KCW0VP8QWAWAT4J7A4654GG5_2)
---
| The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
---

---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_

subject: A bold new economic plan — and why we need you

body:
| Hi Peter — this is Team Bera reaching out with an important update.

Democratic leaders have rolled out a new economic initiative focused on lowering everyday costs — from groceries to housing to health care — and pushing back against policies that have made life harder for working families.

It’s a bold, people-first plan that aligns closely with what Rep. Ami Bera has been championing for years.

**But here’s the challenge: ambitious economic plans don’t succeed on ideas alone.** They need political strength, grassroots engagement, and the resources to communicate our vision clearly and consistently with the American people.

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Demand “Trump-Kennedy Center” Rename Be Reversed NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Congress Reject “Trump-Kennedy Center” Rename](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f74704f-33b7-4862-ba7b-1dc1441b1d97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **_([Click here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdfb0c2b-9bac-4a86-a1eb-1b3a6777450b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) if you want to go straight to the petition)_** The Kennedy Center is a national cultural treasure — a place meant to celebrate art, creativity, and freedom of expression. **But Donald Trump — a national cultural embarrassment — is trying to force through a name change to “Trump-Kennedy Center” **([story](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f76bc2d-a716-44ea-86ea-6e3c2a022911/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) **[Don’t let this happen. Congress has the power to reject this. Sign the petition, and demand they use that power and stop this move ASAP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bd23d96-70c2-45d8-b330-2bac38eec219/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Donald Trump isn’t just a horrible president, he may well be the single worst enemy of the arts and free expression in America. He has repeatedly attacked and bullied artists, journalists, and cultural institutions, and rallied his supporters to do the same. **Renaming one of America’s most respected cultural institutions after him would be an insult to the artists, audiences, and history the Kennedy Center represents.** This is not about honoring culture. It’s about rewriting history and turning a shared national institution into a monument to one man’s supersized ego. Trump’s hand-picked (and utterly unqualified) newly installed Kennedy Center board just approved the change. But they don’t have the power to do this — Congress does. And they must reject it immediately, before Trump starts ripping apart the place, so he can install a wing dedicated to fart jokes. **[Sign the petition, and demand Congress reject this NOW:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03edabfe-b240-4093-acf1-b3eec4d43106/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **“We demand Congress immediately reject any effort to rename the Kennedy Center after Donald Trump.”**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f9cd426-cc1f-49b0-9c70-eace134a79ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3aaaaeb5-851c-42b6-a5f1-14419e2a3689/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T607569c7-c2ed-41d3-b4d1-3efe565e921c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Donald Trump is launching a targeted attack on Colorado, and I'm fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I will fight these politically motivated attacks on our state every step of the way.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121619991/590044239/-2054079050?refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc1Y2YzYy0xM2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svmbUrcE54ofsAAfNjl135zM2tX1HkxhRkrQwyTgClI=)
---
Let's get one thing clear, friend: **The** **Trump administration is launching a targeted attack on Colorado because we won't bend to his corruption.**
Over the last few days, Trump has:
* Dismantled the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR)
* Rescinded over $700 million in Department of Transportation and Energy grants
* Launched an investigation into Colorado’s housing voucher program

And we know more attacks are coming. Why?

Trump is enraged that Colorado won't release Tina Peters: the former clerk of Mesa County, Colorado, serving nine years in state prison for voting machine tampering during the 2020 election.
**That’s why I am blocking the government funding bill from moving forward until NCAR is fully funded and this reckless decision is reversed.**
Let me be clear: Under no circumstances should Tina Peters be released to Donald Trump and his corrupt Department of Justice.
She committed a crime and was found guilty by a jury of her peers.
At this truly unprecedented time in Colorado's history, we will not solve our greatest challenges by giving in to Trump’s reckless agenda. Our state needs a leader who will stand up to Donald Trump.
**So my vow to you today is that as Colorado's next governor, I will fight these politically motivated attacks on our state every step of the way. I will stop at nothing to make our state an example of how to best fight back against Trump's reckless, power-hungry extremism.**
But to make any of that happen, friend, I need your help to win this race.
**_[So please, friend, will you help me make good on this promise – and keep Colorado a nationwide blueprint for upholding our free and fair democracy – with a donation of any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121619992/590044242/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc1Y2YzYy0xM2RkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svmbUrcE54ofsAAfNjl135zM2tX1HkxhRkrQwyTgClI=)_**

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Every child deserves a quality education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Every child deserves access to a quality education, **but Donald Trump is working overtime to make sure that doesn’t happen.** From the moment he took office, the Trump regime has been busy selling out our children’s futures — attempting to close the Department of Education, firing half of the Department’s staff, slashing funding for federal education programs, and creating the first-ever national school voucher program that will undermine public education. On Tuesday, I held a spotlight forum with teachers, parents, and education leaders to shine a light on how this regime’s attacks on education will harm students across the country. **[Our students deserve better, Peter, which is why I’ll continue working with my colleagues and anyone else I can to protect public schools and ensure every child has access to a quality education. name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: This was a difficult decision
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g636GEMVHPBe7pA5vhhplhi6O7f5y2HPUgOSlHHzZLxRyaSzbTu5NiOLsfQzvndZAEKjw3mQ-RQwvb9GiEVjhy6vu0p6QJ93vE7bx5TyWQEcbQs8fqi5RHprsCFAXyi-lrlBSSnVTTv-o__D2_ljFP8XzlyvIR6SDqvN2yAiJmri2g2vmeBDCveRliXHuu4vR81VlPlq8ZBVjr20PZ0v_ajBsfZUmMbPTb1qZ-vzVvE=&c=W6OUu4gIdPxLsl6WRE8M3ImHe-9uXgfXCouGHIdbK9Py4Sy0_hrHqQ==&ch=u4fGQbengyYpgN7DwciUruTn_Gp957Ea_H9HP3Ij1aIzJC5CYLXuag==)
---
|
Peter,
I didn't make this decision lightly, but after discussions with our team, we officially had to make the difficult call to pull our canvassers off the streets.
Winter has officially hit Chicago and it's off to a brutal start. The snow has been nonstop and the wind chill is dangerous. We have a massive dedicated team of volunteers who would walk through fire for our movement, but I'm not going to ask them to walk through ice.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g636GEMVHPBe7pA5vhhplhi6O7f5y2HPUgOSlHHzZLxRyaSzbTu5NiOLsfQzvndZAEKjw3mQ-RQwvb9GiEVjhy6vu0p6QJ93vE7bx5TyWQEcbQs8fqi5RHprsCFAXyi-lrlBSSnVTTv-o__D2_ljFP8XzlyvIR6SDqvN2yAiJmri2g2vmeBDCveRliXHuu4vR81VlPlq8ZBVjr20PZ0v_ajBsfZUmMbPiNIoBOqukps=&c=W6OUu4gIdPxLsl6WRE8M3ImHe-9uXgfXCouGHIdbK9Py4Sy0_hrHqQ==&ch=u4fGQbengyYpgN7DwciUruTn_Gp957Ea_H9HP3Ij1aIzJC5CYLXuag==)
---
|
But here is the hard reality: Election day is only a few months away.
We cannot afford a single "snow day." If we lose a day of voter contract now, we might not make it up in time.
So we have to change tactics immediately.
We are shifting our resources from field to paid communications. If we can't knock on voters' doors, we need to land in their mailbox, on their social media feeds, or on their phones.
This pivot costs money we didn't plan to spend in December and we desperately need your support to keep up our momentum.
[Please, will you rush a donation of $25, $15, or whatever is meaningful to you to help us keep reaching voters?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g636GEMVHPBe7pA5vhhplhi6O7f5y2HPUgOSlHHzZLxRyaSzbTu5NiOLsfQzvndZf5CX-CNB96fhzJm6OOTsfJeDuA8DjFWTM6IKfJ0MD9A1E86xAvMN52HlJ8Glqo3u3Wg734KRiK-bwYpQKcDHP9Tt2eajrwJtvvi_D56lktntVEQm0FYqDks0fO44mfGtuPQu1nsrWufAwsSXoORtBKlQM7APSc5RECbLxe1Dru_9D3eE1-ZzmA==&c=W6OUu4gIdPxLsl6WRE8M3ImHe-9uXgfXCouGHIdbK9Py4Sy0_hrHqQ==&ch=u4fGQbengyYpgN7DwciUruTn_Gp957Ea_H9HP3Ij1aIzJC5CYLXuag==)
---
|
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
---
| | [Donate $5](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g636GEMVHPBe7pA5vhhplhi6O7f5y2HPUgOSlHHzZLxRyaSzbTu5NiOLsfQzvndZ_Sko2FnVzRCFNUU465boVVbdF7Tb0HocY9sg8UGCH8SJf93fGiuviYqUXwvSL8UDTi0nAt7Yrk5keKSUsrL_wgv7SKlJG9Accs-FcW6HOr3sJhrwUguENfGSHa6gZC_Y_QzS5jz9QdHn5XL7A-QaUA3vMiruJfaIlx_H2_eYpeciwik0pdaT9zP8exhH65yuyfQtwy9y_A59Ls9v3ubeSmAWOsGtKPdrZ2bYwZm7x6A=&c=W6OUu4gIdPxLsl6WRE8M3ImHe-9uXgfXCouGHIdbK9Py4Sy0_hrHqQ==&ch=u4fGQbengyYpgN7DwciUruTn_Gp957Ea_H9HP3Ij1aIzJC5CYLXuag==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, I didn't make this decision lightly, but after discussions with our team, we officially had to make the difficult call to pull our canvassers off the streets. Winter has officially hit Chicago and it's off to a brutal start. The snow has been nonstop and the wind chill is dangerous. We have a massive dedicated team of volunteers who would walk through fire for our movement, but I'm not going to ask them to walk through ice. | | == | But here is the hard reality: Election day is only a few months away. We cannot afford a single "snow day." If we lose a day of voter contract now, we might not make it up in time. So we have to change tactics immediately. We are shifting our resources from field to paid communications. If we can't knock on voters' doors, we need to land in their mailbox, on their social media feeds, or on their phones. This pivot costs money we didn't plan to spend in December and we desperately need your support to keep up our momentum. == | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | The weather may have changed, but our mission hasn't. Help us keep moving. | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

I'm not asking for money, just your name. I believe in **earning every vote** , and I certainly **don't take your support for granted.** But if you agree that my 20-plus years of public service from the legislature, the Department of Corrections, and as Alaska's Lieutenant Governor is a record that shows I'm ready to lead, **[__then I invite you to join my team officially today.__](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=d11b39dafa80450eaa7edb1e9fa3e8bc&_e=vZ9ovEubW1WDT11ZvdH2cbEC-GvSLDtc58wsFRE9Cl1KaZkyz_vFI7Nh0C63pxCvrEyum1mfq6dYPkUAHus38C3w8FgxK0ItAxKHkt4AL9Mqyx5prFbaKWImDm4VW07lHYHjE91s4qreKBROSyI2Wxgom4nEeNYByqHml-uJOMcpwdJTRtmFBdq1F4iYX24Rpf8nMBITMKWjvnq0-UpS6RPZDnrihkkEzvsng0y34KsiDbUzXwyQ271sSGXLTTMKwH_AP1TVZ8gjnSTUYT_rtUqJZnLOG_7c2EA_JH3MBRGQdOQCsk7eUAf9xeNdPxlT7dZb9UTjMXBbz83ND5ndA_e3WPLDZ28FPojZ9i6bufPDnAFs6of5K92xYvWZUlLJmdo9Wq46IiEBTyug5UlziJiTDQpRzrThp9tY0ny40KsKdvuOy_GgAafFd66ItLXMq1YOzfeapWmpKToCdrLqy8aWqNiaASXYQRc2-NzyFJ8om2W85bPduJrg_ok9wBcGNLDte2SiIz9Cs9G4t55ADo1m2p5yg0Pf95Q6mcVriafnLGoFdy3QHBDS-KfAAL9dLnBcEq6gN9NpfGIlm7glYU7Mv2KBez5HqL36qP6fAhd9GArnKxZIXU576SON5LJKL0GTZhuH2L_AL2IY2TkKxA%3D%3D)** President Trump has called me a **_"Proven Fighter,"_** and I can't wait to prove him right every day, fighting for YOU while we work together to usher in Alaska's Golden Age. clean_body: I'd be honored to have your personal endorsement.| | | Click here if you wish to unsubscribe Peter, the race to be Alaska's next governor is going to come down to two fundamental questions : 1) Who has the experience to lead our state in these complicated times? 2) Who will work best with President Trump to unleash Alaska's full potential? I'm not asking for money, just your name. I believe in earning every vote , and I certainly don't take your support for granted. But if you agree that my 20-plus years of public service from the legislature, the Department of Corrections, and as Alaska's Lieutenant Governor is a record that shows I'm ready to lead, President Trump has called me a "Proven Fighter," and I can't wait to prove him right every day, fighting for YOU while we work together to usher in Alaska's Golden Age. Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725, Eagle River, Alaska 99577

subject: Two big updates you need to see before 2026:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
FIRST Peter,

We have two important updates as we prepare to close out the year.

**FIRST:** The new 2026 House Forecast shows Democrats with a 60% chance of flipping the House blue.

**SECOND:** We're staring down our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year, and every dollar we raise before midnight on December 31 will be made public for everyone to see.

This report is one of the first big tests of strength for Wesley's campaign for 2026. It's our chance to show voters, National Republicans, and their deep-pocketed allies that Democrats have what it takes to save our democracy.

Wesley is fighting every single day to represent the voices of St. Louisans and solve the problems you actually care about. But to compete in a race this important, we need to show strong grassroots support heading into 2026.

**[If you’re able, will you chip in to Wesley's reelection campaign before our final FEC deadline of 2025? Friend, it's Heidi's team here.
When we say that 3 men (one Republican, one former politician, and a doctor who represents an entirely different district) all plotted to switch districts after Prop 50 to advance their political careers, we aren't exaggerating.
Republican Congressman Kevin Kiley met with these candidates and is practically trying to choose his opponent in this race.
Friend, Heidi wasn't invited to this conversation because they know that she isn't in this race for the wrong reasons.
She's in this race to actually fight for working families, bring the unique voice of our rural communities to Congress, and end the cycle of toxic politics that stops us from seeing real change occur.
And as one of the only candidates refusing to take money from corporate PACs or billionaires, Heidi needs your help.
Our final Fundraising Deadline and public filing deadline of the year are in just two weeks, and with so much at stake, we can't miss a beat. Will you please donate what you can today to help power Heidi's campaign and show our opponents that she has the most grassroots support in this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251219_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]

In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251219_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251219_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:

Grass Valley, CA 95945

name: Chris Pappas for Senate
subject: In the New Year

body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4116%2E582294%2ESoMIbF)
**_Our end of year fundraising deadline is ALMOST HERE._**
In the new year, our GOP opponents will go over our financial reports with a fine-tooth comb to see if we have what it takes to win. They want to be able to say we don’t have support, so they can flood New Hampshire with millions to flip this seat red.
**[We need a show of strength before the end of 2025. Will you help prove we can win by chipping in any amount right now?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251219_2.Lg0yQK&refcode=em20251219-2&t=27&akid=4116%2E582294%2ESoMIbF)**
Chris has won tough races before — four times in one of the swingiest districts in the country. He has a record of fighting for working families, lowering costs, defending reproductive freedom, and standing up to MAGA extremism.
He’ll continue that record in the Senate — but _only_ if we build a grassroots movement strong enough to send him there.
**[If you’re with us, rush $5, $25, or any amount to Chris’s campaign before the end-of-year deadline to prove to national Republicans and their billionaire backers that this team has what it takes to win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251219_2.Lg0yQK&refcode=em20251219-2&t=28&akid=4116%2E582294%2ESoMIbF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251219_2.Lg0yQK&amount=5&refcode=em20251219-2&t=47&akid=4116%2E582294%2ESoMIbF)**
Let’s show them wrong and keep NH blue.
— Chris Pappas for Senate
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251219-2&t=48&refcode2=4116_582294_SoMIbF&akid=4116%2E582294%2ESoMIbF)**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump doesn’t get to silence us →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251219-1724-foote&t=1001&akid=1724%2E342411%2E1PcZzY ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Trump is back to doing what he does best: spewing hate and attacking the
very leaders who refuse to bow to him.

Trump called Ilhan “garbage” and added that immigrants like her are
“garbage” too.

Trump called Alexandria one of the “dumbest people in Congress.”

Trump called Rashida “vicious” and a “crazed lunatic.”

Trump called Ayanna and other members of the Squad “not very smart” and
told them to “go back” to where they came from.

These attacks aren’t just insults. They’re racist, xenophobic, dangerous,
and designed to intimidate the boldest progressive women in Congress —
leaders who have spent years fighting for working people, demanding
justice, and refusing to be silenced.

But here’s what Trump still doesn’t understand: He may be loud. But
together, we are louder.

Every time he targets the Squad, we respond with stronger solidarity and a
grassroots movement he cannot drown out — no matter how many lies he
repeats.

The Squad needs us in this moment. Because when Trump attacks them, he’s
attacking our movement and everything we fight for: social, racial,
immigration, and economic justice, and a government that works for all —
not the wealthy and powerful.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251219-movement.NSvv-X&refcode=em20251219-1724&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1724%2E342411%2E1PcZzY ]So we’re asking: will you stand with the Squad today and help us show
Trump that our movement won’t back down — not now, not ever?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251219-movement.NSvv-X&refcode=em20251219-1724&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1724%2E342411%2E1PcZzY ]Contribute ››

Let’s make our message unmistakable: Trump doesn’t get to silence us.
Trump doesn't get to divide us. Trump doesn’t get to decide who belongs in
this country.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1724%2E342411%2E1PcZzY

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:

| [_**Peter, please stop what you’re doing and watch this speech →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621675/590050158/-803653937?v=9asZmIDBUf4&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=&emci=cc6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442) Emily couldn’t stay silent in the face of hateful, dangerous rhetoric about LGBTQ+ kids and families from House Republicans. So, she spoke from the heart: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621676/590050159/-980638963?v=9asZmIDBUf4&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=&emci=cc6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442) This is why we worked so hard to send Emily to D.C. – so she could be a voice for those who are too often shut out of the halls of power. **Please take a few minutes to watch and share this speech. Every kid who feels unheard and every parent who lives in fear should know they have a champion fighting for them in Congress.** _**[🎥 Watch on YouTube →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621677/590050160/-803653937?v=9asZmIDBUf4&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=&emci=cc6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442)
[📸 Watch on Instagram →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621678/590050161/-1440352451?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=&emci=cc6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442)
[📘 Watch on Facebook →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621679/590050162/1009135976?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=&emci=cc6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf6b8ff4-15dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442)**_ And if this is the kind of bold, uncompromising leadership you want to see more of, [_**chip in $25 or any amount to support Emily and fuel our efforts to take back the House:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621680/590050163/-1712775502?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121621681/590050164/-1166083585?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.19_Speech_Actives_yt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjZiOGZmNC0xNWRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNkpDggGpXmF8hyDevdcB1jOsMab4juHYtc0fMb172k=) We’re proud to be on Team Emily today – we hope you are too! – the whole team at Emily Randall for Congress
* * *
**_FULL TRANSCRIPT:_** Mr. Speaker, I’ve been sitting here listening to the remarks on the floor, and I have to admit that I find myself torn between heartbroken tears and the urge to throw something — which I will not do, because I am a professional human being. But I have to wonder how many actual trans people and the families of trans kids anyone on the other side of the aisle knows. How many conversations anyone has had with parents who are staying up late, worried about whether that night is the night that their child is going to take their life because they feel so unsupported and so unloved, and are taking in the hatred from the floor of the House of Representatives. The kids and the parents in my community live their lives in terror. And they have it the best, because Washington State is a place where we have fought to protect healthcare access for LGBTQ kids and trans kids. We have fought to ensure that every young person has the ability to make healthcare decisions that are right for them in consultation with their parents and their doctors. It is medically directed care in consultation with a doctor. The American people have told us over and over that they don’t want politicians in the doctor’s office. They don’t want politicians making decisions about what kind of medical care they can access. That is what is happening right now. They are trying to strip away life-saving care from children who are moving to my state at higher and higher rates. Almost every week I hear of a family who has moved from Texas or Idaho or Florida because their parents want their children to survive. And this effort, not only to cut Medicaid coverage, but to try and ban access for children... this behavior is appalling. It’s dangerous. It’s evil. It is evil to seek to deny life-saving care from children who are more at risk than any others. I spend a lot of time in LGBTQ clubs in high schools talking to young people who are shocked when I come in and tell them that, as a queer woman, I’m a member of Congress. And they say, “Do you know any trans people your age?” Because they don’t believe that they will make it to 40. They don’t believe that they will make it to 50 or 60. They don’t believe that they have a future. They are watching the floor, and they listen to the words that come out of our mouths, and they know that half of the people in this chamber do not care if they survive. I think it’s very clear that I’m not going to vote for this bill, and I would urge all of my colleagues to join me.
