clean_body: Please take a few minutes to watch and share this speech. Every kid who feels unheard and every parent who lives in fear should know they have a champion fighting for them in Congress. | Emily couldn’t stay silent in the face of hateful, dangerous rhetoric about LGBTQ+ kids and families from House Republicans. So, she spoke from the heart: This is why we worked so hard to send Emily to D.C. – so she could be a voice for those who are too often shut out of the halls of power. Please take a few minutes to watch and share this speech. Every kid who feels unheard and every parent who lives in fear should know they have a champion fighting for them in Congress. And if this is the kind of bold, uncompromising leadership you want to see more of, = = We’re proud to be on Team Emily today – we hope you are too! – the whole team at Emily Randall for Congress FULL TRANSCRIPT: Mr. Speaker, I’ve been sitting here listening to the remarks on the floor, and I have to admit that I find myself torn between heartbroken tears and the urge to throw something — which I will not do, because I am a professional human being. But I have to wonder how many actual trans people and the families of trans kids anyone on the other side of the aisle knows. How many conversations anyone has had with parents who are staying up late, worried about whether that night is the night that their child is going to take their life because they feel so unsupported and so unloved, and are taking in the hatred from the floor of the House of Representatives. The kids and the parents in my community live their lives in terror. And they have it the best, because Washington State is a place where we have fought to protect healthcare access for LGBTQ kids and trans kids. We have fought to ensure that every young person has the ability to make healthcare decisions that are right for them in consultation with their parents and their doctors. It is medically directed care in consultation with a doctor. The American people have told us over and over that they don’t want politicians in the doctor’s office. They don’t want politicians making decisions about what kind of medical care they can access. That is what is happening right now. They are trying to strip away life-saving care from children who are moving to my state at higher and higher rates. Almost every week I hear of a family who has moved from Texas or Idaho or Florida because their parents want their children to survive. And this effort, not only to cut Medicaid coverage, but to try and ban access for children... this behavior is appalling. It’s dangerous. It’s evil. It is evil to seek to deny life-saving care from children who are more at risk than any others. I spend a lot of time in LGBTQ clubs in high schools talking to young people who are shocked when I come in and tell them that, as a queer woman, I’m a member of Congress. And they say, “Do you know any trans people your age?” Because they don’t believe that they will make it to 40. They don’t believe that they will make it to 50 or 60. They don’t believe that they have a future. They are watching the floor, and they listen to the words that come out of our mouths, and they know that half of the people in this chamber do not care if they survive. I think it’s very clear that I’m not going to vote for this bill, and I would urge all of my colleagues to join me. I yield back. | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: What does the New York State Comptroller do anyway?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adem for New York
body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
https://spectrumlocalnews.com/nys/central-ny/politics/2025/12/16/adem-bunkeddeko-discusses-bid-for-n-y--state-comptroller [https://spectrumlocalnews.com/nys/central-ny/politics/2025/12/16/adem-bunkeddeko-discusses-bid-for-n-y--state-comptroller]
Peter,
This week, I joined Capital Tonight in Albany to answer a question I hear everywhere: “What does the New York State Comptroller actually do?”
The truth is: there is no other office in the country quite like it . The Comptroller oversees how public dollars move through our government and how nearly $300 billion is invested on behalf of retirees. It is one of the most powerful, yet most underused, offices in America.
And it’s time we put that power to work for New Yorkers. [Support our campaign today!] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1212weekemail]
Right now, our neighbors to the north offer a powerful example.
Canada’s CDPQ pension system co-owns energy transmission lines and transportation infrastructure—projects that strengthened their economy and delivered excellent returns for retirees.
We can do the same here.
The New York State Common Retirement Fund is one of the largest in the nation. With that kind of investment leverage, we could:
* Build renewable transmission lines that bring lower-cost power to Upstate communities
* Develop modern industrial parks in Buffalo, Rochester, Syracuse, and beyond
* Create family-sustaining jobs in clean energy and advanced manufacturing
* Deliver strong, steady returns for retirees
This is what disciplined, public-purpose investing looks like.
If you believe New York should lead—not lag—on this kind of forward-looking economic strategy, I’m asking you to support our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1212weekemail]
I’m running for Comptroller because fiscal discipline and public purpose don’t have to be at odds. We can deliver high-quality, long-term investments that strengthen the pension system and build a more affordable, dynamic New York.
Thank you, as always, for being in my corner.
Yours,
Adem
Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213

name: Carrie Anne Templeton
subject: Happy Holidays to our wonderful volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Party news you can use!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=1)
---
| Hello Forward Friends- I cannot believe it is the end of the year already! So much has happened, yet it went by so quick. We had an incredible off year election cycle, with 20 winners across 8 states, bringing our total of elected officials to **70**! We could not have achieved this much success without the help of our amazing volunteers. My favorite part of the year was launching the [National Volunteer Program](https://home.forwardparty.com/volunteer?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=2). Many of you participated in the events and trainings, and I am so grateful! Our incredible design team made the awesome digital badges for each area of focus, and you guys could earn that badge in pin form by completing activities. For next year there will be a point earning system you can redeem in our shop instead of the pins, but I do want to make sure that anyone who completed activities and feels like they earned a pin this year gets one. Please fill out this form so I know how many pins from each focus area to order! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Cau9QZYSrELuaBTd-UPVThbp_FW5mUCoVR6p6JlvFGrp-RIQNZMm0FHc4lNVkYQm&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=3 "SUBMIT YOUR FORM") [SUBMIT YOUR FORM](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Cau9QZYSrELuaBTd-UPVThbp_FW5mUCoVR6p6JlvFGrp-RIQNZMm0FHc4lNVkYQm&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=3)
---
Stay connected with us next year! Check out trainings and opportunities to engage below.
_Upcoming Events_
**Tues Jan 13th @ 7:30pm ET** -[National Volunteer Intro Call](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20260113?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=4)
Your first stop for volunteering with Forward. Learn about the party and how to get involved.
**Wed Jan 14th @ 7pm ET** \- [Welcome Team Training](https://home.forwardparty.com/welcome_team_intro_call_20260114?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=5)
For volunteers wanting to call and welcome new supporters in their state.
**Wed Jan 28th @ 630pm ET** \- [Elected Official Outreach Training](https://home.forwardparty.com/elected_official_outreach_training?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_2&n=6)
For volunteers wanting to reach out to their elected officials and introduce them to the party.
_Volu_ _nteer_ _Spotlight:_
ALL of our volunteers deserve the spotlight! I have met so many of you these last couple of months who were brand new to Forward and just dived right in to volunteer activities, or wanting to run for office. I'm so grateful for all of you. Sending text messages for our candidates, calling other supporters, and reaching out to your elected officials help us move the needle in a big way. Your energy and passion is what fuels this movement- and we are so thankful!
I hope everyone has an amazing holiday break, and am so excited for us to work together next year to get even more Forward candidates elected in all levels of office.
See you next year,
Carrie Anne Templeton

clean_body: Party news you can use! | | | Hello Forward Friends- I cannot believe it is the end of the year already! So much has happened, yet it went by so quick. We had an incredible off year election cycle, with 20 winners across 8 states, bringing our total of elected officials to 70! We could not have achieved this much success without the help of our amazing volunteers. My favorite part of the year was launching the . Many of you participated in the events and trainings, and I am so grateful! Our incredible design team made the awesome digital badges for each area of focus, and you guys could earn that badge in pin form by completing activities. For next year there will be a point earning system you can redeem in our shop instead of the pins, but I do want to make sure that anyone who completed activities and feels like they earned a pin this year gets one. Please fill out this form so I know how many pins from each focus area to order! | "SUBMIT YOUR FORM" Stay connected with us next year! Check out trainings and opportunities to engage below. name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Right now, your impact can go twice as far!
body:
Help us start 2026 strong.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9eafedb4f16/tockcw1cwy-225?e=81ab29c4d2)

| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | As we close out 2025, we’re looking at everything this movement has built together — new organizers stepping into leadership, communities uniting to support each other in spite of authoritarianism, and candidates rising up to build leadership that focuses on humanity.
And the truth is, **we’re just getting started.**
To launch the new year with the power we need, a generous supporter has stepped up with a $2,500 donation match — meaning every dollar you give today will be doubled to fuel our work on the ground.
[That means your $25 becomes $50. Your $50 becomes $100. And every contribution becomes twice the organizing, twice the action, twice the impact.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=7e013ccfee&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=3cff5e07ad&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | Movement for Freedom isn’t backed by corporations or billionaires. We are **powered by people like you:** grassroots donors who believe in building a future where justice isn’t optional, where communities come first, and where democracy works for all of us, not the wealthy few.
**This match is only available for a limited time,** and hitting it means we enter 2026 stronger, more prepared, and more powerful than ever.
[Rush a year-end donation now and double your impact.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=d96c7ccc7e&e=81ab29c4d2)
Let’s meet this $2,500 match together, and build the movement our communities deserve.
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g) [**🔴 THIS IS AN EMERGENCY 🔴**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=3&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)
* * *
We’re incredibly worried, team. As the 2026 Midterms approach, Republican gerrymandering is already shaping the outcome in favor of the GOP.

[**_This isn’t a drill. The 2026 Midterms are being gerrymandered away from Democrats as you’re reading this..._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=4&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)

If we don’t build a foolproof strategy to fight back, we can kiss our chances of taking back the House goodbye! [ **QUICKLY: Be [1] of just [5] Democrats in your city selected to take our EMERGENCY Gerrymandering Survey before midnight >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=5&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=6&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)
| [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=7&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)
---
Listen, we’re going to be SICK.

Republicans in Texas, Missouri, North Carolina and Ohio came together and gerrymandered Congressional maps to steal 9 SEATS from Democrats ahead of the 2026 midterms.

And other Red states are already gearing up to steal EVEN MORE Democratic seats!

Unless we fight back NOW, we’ll have to accept that _Democrats will never control the House ever again._

[**In light of this URGENT situation, we need you to take our emergency Gerrymandering survey RIGHT NOW to represent local Democrats as we prepare to fight back! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=8&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)
[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71120?t=9&akid=23751%2E4449941%2EFu38-g)
---
Don’t delay. Begin the survey right away.

We really need you,

Fight for Reform

name: Violence in Colorado
subject: On Jan 31 MAGA rioters plan to break Tina Peters out of a CO Jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
The next January 6th? MAGA plans to apply maximum force against Colorado until we budge on releasing Tina Peters.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012xdJPpnRyUk-idDz6Ey_lO32Qeva2-iVLonfFzkP9d0dFdsWFyySDggZS9u45VPUq70HcFRln70kbCSxNQUtpzindFIs5vJLBx27y7yC8eJFsGH2a7LFy7Fep8bClp0gbkJvGNHD4Z7_G9CGpS4rDBLTPHJMZGl_jBm2DnDCRPgKMK9pWm5o2ylD3SEOo0j_-UkLDop8spNMEmCjDiBVvmZeMCZD8-I1&c=pqIpspwMRBAKZO9L7n8M_2dmWtA3jxtM9Td9fz23-Snr5BI26PdKcA==&ch=WBtiTPwIrGhE8srSV6jc3_DlYHsm6DYWPWwRQuKu0jNq4njldEsnhg==)
---
|

Peter,
Last week President Trump "pardoned" Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk who was convicted by a Colorado jury for her role in a major security breach of her election equipment.
Trump however does not have the authority to have her pardoned. Since she was convicted at the state level, only the Governor of Colorado can do this. And because their fake pardon is going nowhere some are now suggesting violence is the next solution for freeing Peters.
On January 31, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, will attempt to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held. They are calling this planned rally - Bastille Day:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012xdJPpnRyUk-idDz6Ey_lO32Qeva2-iVLonfFzkP9d0dFdsWFyySDggZS9u45VPUq70HcFRln70kbCSxNQUtpzindFIs5vJLBx27y7yC8eJFsGH2a7LFy7Fep8bClp0gbkJvGNHD4Z7_G9CGpS4rDBLTPHJMZGl_jBm2DnDCRPgKMK9pWm5o2ylD3SEOo0j_-UkLDop8spNMEmCjDiBVvsSHsNrWMiTl&c=pqIpspwMRBAKZO9L7n8M_2dmWtA3jxtM9Td9fz23-Snr5BI26PdKcA==&ch=WBtiTPwIrGhE8srSV6jc3_DlYHsm6DYWPWwRQuKu0jNq4njldEsnhg==)
---

MAGA plans to apply maximum pressure, including the use of force, against Colorado until releasing Peters. Just yesterday it was reported that the decision to strip CO of the National Science Foundations' National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) was likely a decision driven by the Peters ordeal.
Lauren Boebert is Peters' fiercest champion: she dined with her on the day she committed her crime, encouraged her to do it, and is now rallying her base around the need to free Peters from prison, just like she rallied her base to storm the Capitol.
Violence in Colorado may be imminent and it is exactly what the Trump administration and Lauren Boebert, Peters' fiercest champion wants.
We can't wait for Coloradans to get injured or worse because of Boebert. We must take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin and is beyond vulnerable. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[We need your support to continue building the campaign that will defeat her. Please can you make a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to help Trisha Calvarese defeat Boebert and take away the podium that she is using to escalate American political violence?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012xdJPpnRyUk-idDz6Ey_lO32Qeva2-iVLonfFzkP9d0dFdsWFyySDggZS9u45VPUBNTkvtNa4WP2FuCJK0RRhQqLzCf6FPHrRzaOcDF_GaNL8TEX3wW57nemt4Dw0DnJ4VzgOPy4UuBfyiVbKzs6bKpq4VvzHoesGgepCS7R1g9odzGWyJguP7h0vLy4Uye3Dt4tQGqwnp4rmRhKBC1qZrkgqD-1-OHyngoZtNKu2dObl4QqamIvUw==&c=pqIpspwMRBAKZO9L7n8M_2dmWtA3jxtM9Td9fz23-Snr5BI26PdKcA==&ch=WBtiTPwIrGhE8srSV6jc3_DlYHsm6DYWPWwRQuKu0jNq4njldEsnhg==)
---

clean_body: The next January 6th? MAGA plans to apply maximum force against Colorado until we budge on releasing Tina Peters. | | | | | == | Peter, Last week President Trump "pardoned" Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk who was convicted by a Colorado jury for her role in a major security breach of her election equipment. Trump however does not have the authority to have her pardoned. Since she was convicted at the state level, only the Governor of Colorado can do this. And because their fake pardon is going nowhere some are now suggesting violence is the next solution for freeing Peters. On January 31, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, will attempt to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held. They are calling this planned rally - Bastille Day: | == MAGA plans to apply maximum pressure, including the use of force, against Colorado until releasing Peters. Just yesterday it was reported that the decision to strip CO of the National Science Foundations' National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) was likely a decision driven by the Peters ordeal. Lauren Boebert is Peters' fiercest champion: she dined with her on the day she committed her crime, encouraged her to do it, and is now rallying her base around the need to free Peters from prison, just like she rallied her base to storm the Capitol. Violence in Colorado may be imminent and it is exactly what the Trump administration and Lauren Boebert, Peters' fiercest champion wants. We can't wait for Coloradans to get injured or worse because of Boebert. We must take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence. Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin and is beyond vulnerable. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Lauren Boebert must be stopped and with your support we can do it. God speed, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**

clean_body: I’m counting on your support more than ever before = Friends, it’s Robert Garcia. California stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power. We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves. And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign. = = = I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises. My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank. This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors. And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning. = = Thank you, Robert = = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Violence in Colorado
subject: On Jan 31 MAGA rioters plan to break Tina Peters out of a CO Jail

body:
The next January 6th? MAGA plans to apply maximum force against Colorado until we budge on releasing Tina Peters.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00166Fbl3KVKj3NsTw7xOzVgdLodLyDyy20NRhhTtM_16SX9M2O3PiB0WQ58VOkBb7U8CsYMal06gB0pdJ7CWci7wl3kqyDB-ll0dgjQmvQUsnzTPfWgFXMSNyDeV_94-Y-aBe8Uvx2wEsv2ur6sV7UYfFM1h_WBI6_elHtZVKpbN0rxEyHzzhbtHNGnGng8DpBuucpArzSJXM3poW_YubC7LRiGOmfqzj7kkapWUZEOpQ=&c=8cgjeS6Jx31mGihPAYAaNXDG4b1Xq3pSqxj6yieq0tk7alxKwm5sdw==&ch=tM4--F7-YQllx5heSkgqBHn6RGW4eO2qMyB8TWNsFAUui76TaB4qdg==)

Peter,
Last week President Trump "pardoned" Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk who was convicted by a Colorado jury for her role in a major security breach of her election equipment.
Trump however does not have the authority to have her pardoned. Since she was convicted at the state level, only the Governor of Colorado can do this. And because their fake pardon is going nowhere some are now suggesting violence is the next solution for freeing Peters.
On January 31, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, will attempt to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held. They are calling this planned rally - Bastille Day:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00166Fbl3KVKj3NsTw7xOzVgdLodLyDyy20NRhhTtM_16SX9M2O3PiB0WQ58VOkBb7U8CsYMal06gB0pdJ7CWci7wl3kqyDB-ll0dgjQmvQUsnzTPfWgFXMSNyDeV_94-Y-aBe8Uvx2wEsv2ur6sV7UYfFM1h_WBI6_elHtZVKpbN0rxEyHzzhbtHNGnGng8DpBuucpArzSJXM3poW_YubC7IuLQ3HEMJaR2xo87aIV2v8=&c=8cgjeS6Jx31mGihPAYAaNXDG4b1Xq3pSqxj6yieq0tk7alxKwm5sdw==&ch=tM4--F7-YQllx5heSkgqBHn6RGW4eO2qMyB8TWNsFAUui76TaB4qdg==)
---

MAGA plans to apply maximum pressure, including the use of force, against Colorado until releasing Peters. Just yesterday it was reported that the decision to strip CO of the National Science Foundations' National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) was likely a decision driven by the Peters ordeal.
Lauren Boebert is Peters' fiercest champion: she dined with her on the day she committed her crime, encouraged her to do it, and is now rallying her base around the need to free Peters from prison, just like she rallied her base to storm the Capitol.
Violence in Colorado may be imminent and it is exactly what the Trump administration and Lauren Boebert, Peters' fiercest champion wants.
We can't wait for Coloradans to get injured or worse because of Boebert. We must take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin and is beyond vulnerable. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[We need your support to continue building the campaign that will defeat her. Please can you make a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to help Trisha Calvarese defeat Boebert and take away the podium that she is using to escalate American political violence?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00166Fbl3KVKj3NsTw7xOzVgdLodLyDyy20NRhhTtM_16SX9M2O3PiB0WQ58VOkBb7UiSMCYmYIIM5x8VSDleXpOkq-HEhKjgjJfZ2BHTt5fkf6kayjmlFfuj_freFHYAuL6C9W9JkLnAea4UW9QyxwqFoPrlcU07S16XFF2Krb_G_DNmMvHpVkY0r7IJcBdMP4Ek2Gjr8APcSYbAsxxIKYsfgkdzKx87n3LHT3Aau3FXLB9Hgibg5g4w==&c=8cgjeS6Jx31mGihPAYAaNXDG4b1Xq3pSqxj6yieq0tk7alxKwm5sdw==&ch=tM4--F7-YQllx5heSkgqBHn6RGW4eO2qMyB8TWNsFAUui76TaB4qdg==)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: 26.2 miles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Election Day is just the finish line of this race — it’s what we do now that will determine whether we win or lose.

| | |
---
Friend,
I’m emailing to ask you to **_[please make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico. Your early support will make a powerful difference.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2704?t=1&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)_**
Friend, I want to tell you something about myself that you might not know: I love to run. It’s a way that I honor my ancestors, those who serve our country and the landscapes that sustain us. It strengthens my spirit, and it’s one of the many things that have made me fierce.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2587?t=2&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
_When I ran the Boston Marathon in ‘21, my feet pounded the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, & the Pawtucket people._
In the 20 years since I started running, I’ve learned many lessons — some more literal than others. Good shoes matter. You fuel for mile seven at mile two. You must treat a marathon or an ultramarathon as what it is: 26 (or more!) miles.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2587?t=3&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
_I run because my ancestors gave me this ability._
You must be prepared, take things slow and put in the work well ahead of the race. Runners often say that the training cycle is the marathon, and race day is just the celebration of your preparation — and I believe that!
I know you see where I’m going with this, friend.
Running has taught me that winning will require endurance, preparation and strength. **The work we do together right now will be the defining factor in whether we’re prepared to defeat the MAGA forces already hard at work trying to flip New Mexico red.** It’s why I’m relying on early support from dedicated supporters like you to build a campaign strong enough to overcome the immense challenges that lie ahead.
**_[Winning this race isn’t something I can do without you. Will you donate $5 to power our campaign? Election Day may be the finish line, but what we do right now will determine whether we win or lose — because this race is about real results: making sure our children learn to read earlier, New Mexicans can see a doctor without long wait times, groceries and homeownership are within reach for every family and people in every community feel safe right where they live.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2587?t=4&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)_**
**Running has taught me what it means to be fierce, and that the things worth fighting for are worth working hard for.** Progress is earned through perseverance. It is realized by facing challenges head-on, whether it’s in a race that carries me many miles on my feet, or a run for Congress, or running an entire department as the United States Secretary of the Interior or running for governor of New Mexico.
**I’m running for governor to change the game for New Mexico.** **_[I would be humbled to receive your support in the form of $5 donation, especially right now before 2026, when it will make the biggest impact.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2704?t=5&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2588?t=6&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2589?t=7&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2590?t=8&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2587?t=9&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
With your support, I know we will cross that finish line together 💛
Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2708?t=10&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=11&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=12&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=13&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=14&akid=6313%2E400544%2EOZ1H6a)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Delivering for the Heartland
body:
Last year, we brought home over $700 million for our district. MAGA leadership is taking a wrecking ball to that progress

| |
---
Team, Last year, we brought home over $700 million in federal investments to our district. Those victories make a real difference in people's lives. They paid for... 🎓 New educational facilities
🧬 Cutting-edge research
✈️ Improvements to our railways, airports, cities, and bridges
💧 Conservation of our Great Lakes ecosystem
⚙️ Revitalizing Ohio manufacturing
⚕️ Investments in quality, affordable healthcare
🚀 Support for our military and aerospace facilities ...and so much more. Those aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. These wins represent transformative investments in our schools, our hospitals, our infrastructure, and our people. Many of them were possible thanks to significant bipartisan legislation we passed. _**But now, MAGA leadership is rolling back so much of the progress we've made. They've slashed infrastructure funding, canceled medical trials, and allowed healthcare costs to skyrocket for tens of millions of people.**_ As long as they're in power, they'll continue taking a wrecking ball to our government. We absolutely must retake the House in 2026, so that we can continue delivering for the Heartland. **[Will you help power that fight, friend? clean_body: Last year, we brought home over $700 million for our district. MAGA leadership is taking a wrecking ball to that progress | | Team, Last year, we brought home over $700 million in federal investments to our district. Those victories make a real difference in people's lives. They paid for... 🎓 New educational facilities 🧬 Cutting-edge research ✈️ Improvements to our railways, airports, cities, and bridges 💧 Conservation of our Great Lakes ecosystem ⚙️ Revitalizing Ohio manufacturing ⚕️ Investments in quality, affordable healthcare 🚀 Support for our military and aerospace facilities ...and so much more. Those aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. These wins represent transformative investments in our schools, our hospitals, our infrastructure, and our people. Many of them were possible thanks to significant bipartisan legislation we passed. But now, MAGA leadership is rolling back so much of the progress we've made. They've slashed infrastructure funding, canceled medical trials, and allowed healthcare costs to skyrocket for tens of millions of people. As long as they're in power, they'll continue taking a wrecking ball to our government. We absolutely must retake the House in 2026, so that we can continue delivering for the Heartland. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you so much. — Marcy | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . As a top supporter, you know I'm a fighter. I stood by President Trump when those we thought were patriots turned their backs on him. Yet, I refused to back down, and the Left will never forgive me for it.
But you've been with me every step of the way, patriot. Your support has been my shield against the RINOS and the radical Left. Now, they're coming at me with everything they've got with double the donors and double the dark money.

body:

# [#]
Peter,

This week was nothing short of devastating for Rhode Island. I am thankful that the people of our state stood together and supported one another in this terrible and frightening moment.

And I am grateful for the members of law enforcement who worked tirelessly to locate the now-deceased suspect in this tragic shooting.

While Brown University and Rhode Island will never be the same, I hope this new development can bring closure and healing to those impacted. In moments like this, our community’s resilience and ability to draw strength from one another shine through the darkness.

My heart continues to go out to the victims and their families, who will always stay in our hearts.

In solidarity,

Seth Magaziner

PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Magical thinking in a rambling speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Donald Trump is what happens when a system rewards the rich and powerful at the expense of everyone else.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2732%2E4032634%2E-3mUj9)
---
It’s never been more evident that our economy isn’t working for the majority of Americans. Just this week, Trump engaged in magical thinking in a rambling speech, claiming that his economy is “booming” and that affordability is nothing but a “con job” and a “hoax”. The economy where 1 out of every 2 Americans are worried they won’t be able to afford health care next year. The economy where nearly 10 million Americans are working multiple jobs to make ends meet — the highest share in 25 years. The economy where 1 in 4 American households lives paycheck to paycheck. Donald Trump and the GOP are working diligently to shovel more money to their billionaire friends at the expense of working people. **But here’s the truth: Trump is not the cause of everything that’s broken in America.** Don’t get me wrong, he has certainly poured gasoline on the fire. But blaming Trump for all of our problems is not going to put the fire out. There are systemic issues that led to someone like him getting elected in the first place. He is the worst symptom of a corrupt system that rewards the rich and powerful at the expense of everyone else. This system has plagued us for years. It’s a system where Reagan’s trickle-down experiment failed — and is still failing — America’s middle class. A system that has made it harder and harder to start and join a union. A system that says that companies donating exorbitant amounts of money to a political campaign is a form of “free speech.” A system where the government bailed out banks rather than homeowners after the 2008 financial crisis. A system that allows a family to go bankrupt because they dared to receive medical care. Look, we must call out and tend to the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy — the problems that existed way before Donald Trump rode down that elevator in 2015. That’s what I’m focused on while we also fight back against the harms the Trump administration brings us over the next four years. The Democratic party must, must, must fight back with defiant action instead of just pushing back with great reluctance — while also connecting the dots between today’s crises, yesterday’s systemic causes, and the solutions we’re championing. It’s going to take a lot of work to untangle this system — with political leaders fighting for the bold solutions and a strong grassroots movement calling for a better way forward. That’s why it’s so important for you to stay in this fight. **If Democrats can show the American people what it means for a government to actually work for working people — and draw contrasts between that and what the Trump Administration is actually doing — then we can lay a strong foundation for a new way forward in the midterms and beyond.** [**If you’re in a position to make a contribution, can you donate $28 or whatever you can to help build our grassroots movement and build a government that works for working people?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3291?t=8&akid=2732%2E4032634%2E-3mUj9)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/19/2025
body:
Protect Kids Colorado Pushes to Fund Signature Drive as Ballot Timeline Tightens
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Protect Kids Colorado is warning [time and funding are running out](https://link.email.joinrmv.) to qualify three citizen-led ballot initiatives for 2026, as organizers race to gather signatures on measures covering [medical interventions for minors, girls’ sports, and child sex trafficking](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Meanwhile, Gov. Jared Polis opted the state into a [new federal tax-credit scholarship program](https://link.email.joinrmv.) despite rising education spending and falling enrollment—prompting [backlash from teachers’ unions](https://link.email.joinrmv.) and setting up a fresh fight over school choice and whether education dollars should follow students.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** Former FBI Deputy Director [Dan Bongino’s departure](https://link.email.joinrmv.) reignited debate over the bureau’s leadership and direction, while the U.S. House passed Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s bill [targeting gender-transition procedures](https://link.email.joinrmv.) for minors. At the same time, [schools limiting phone use](https://link.email.joinrmv.) reported students rediscovering friendships and school spirit, bolstering arguments for stricter screen policies.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Commentary today reflects on how [COVID-era fear and coercion eroded trust](https://link.email.joinrmv.), exposes the small network of [activists and nonprofits steering Colorado policy](https://link.email.joinrmv.) from behind the scenes, and warns that the PUC’s Clean Heat rules will [drive up utility bills through forced electrification](https://link.email.joinrmv.) unless voters push back against unelected regulators.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 19, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Protect Kids Colorado Pushes to Fund Signature Drive as Ballot Timeline Tightens](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
Ballot deadlines are closing in, and organizers with Protect Kids Colorado have begun pushing harder on fundraising and volunteer outreach connected to three citizen-led ballot initiatives slated for the 2026 election.
The proposals deal with medical interventions for minors, girls’ sports and sex-based spaces, and penalties for child sex trafficking — areas campaign leaders say have evolved over time through legislation, court decisions, and regulatory guidance rather than direct statewide votes.
The three proposals are being circulated separately — so voters would weigh in on each one individually if they make the ballot. Organizers have acknowledged that legal and political challenges are likely, particularly around how medical regulation and civil rights law are applied. That challenge is compounded by the state’s initiative process itself.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[Inside the structure of Colorado’s Democrat-advocacy complex](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SCOTT JAMES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **A small Boulder-based network quietly drives Colorado policy:** The commentary lays out how a tight circle of climate nonprofits and government appointees—centered around groups like SWEEP and the Colorado Energy Office—now shape transportation, land-use, and energy rules statewide, often without voters realizing who is pulling the levers.
* **Advocacy and governance have blurred into the same machine:** Key figures rotate between activist organizations and official roles, crafting the very rules they once lobbied for, turning external pressure into internal control and replacing democratic debate with technocratic enforcement.
* **Public comment is stacked while rural and working communities lose out:** Coordinated “action alerts” flood agencies with pre-written supportive comments, allowing officials to claim public backing while everyday Coloradans—especially in rural, freight, and high-growth corridors—are sidelined by policies built for climate metrics, not real-world mobility or safety.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[COVID and the Collapse of Wisdom: How Fear, Certainty, and Coercion Broke Human Coexistence](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **COVID exposed how fear and false certainty replaced wisdom:** Leaders and institutions oversold confidence early, then quietly revised guidance as evidence evolved—undermining public trust by treating changing science as moral truth instead of honest uncertainty
* **Mandates crossed from persuasion into coercion:** Vaccine policies shifted from encouragement to force, with job loss, fines, and exclusion used to compel compliance—proving that government power, not consensus, became the primary tool during the pandemic.
* **Suppressing dissent fractured society and weakened freedom:** By labeling skepticism as immoral and disagreement as dangerous, institutions drove careful thinkers out of public life, leaving communities more brittle, polarized, and vulnerable to future crises.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Feds own the dams, but who owns the water?**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY GREG WALCHER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 18** _A couple years ago, I criticized the Bureau of Reclamation for draining Blue Mesa Reservoir without bothering to tell the people in Gunnison whose livelihood is affected. I got a little push-back for saying that while the Bureau owned the dam, it did not own the water. A close friend and water lawyer told me to be careful, that the Bureau does in fact own some water rights in the Gunnison River._
__
[**Good News or Fake News: Joy — Real News Worth Celebrating**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 18** _If hope helps us wait and peace helps us stand, then joy helps us move forward. Joy can sometimes be misunderstood. People often mix it up with happiness, think it’s just an emotion, or even brush it off as silly. But joy has its own special meaning!_ __
[**Delay as policy: A double standard Colorado must answer**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 17** _Colorado is asking a court to decide whether doing nothing can amount to doing too much. In its lawsuit over frozen federal funding, the state argues that agencies crossed the line when they allowed congressionally approved programs to stall through delay and inaction. At some point, Colorado contends, refusing to decide becomes a veto Congress never granted._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).

The proposals deal with medical interventions for minors, girls’ sports and sex-based spaces, and penalties for child sex trafficking — areas campaign leaders say have evolved over time through legislation, court decisions, and regulatory guidance rather than direct statewide votes. The three proposals are being circulated separately — so voters would weigh in on each one individually if they make the ballot. Organizers have acknowledged that legal and political challenges are likely, particularly around how medical regulation and civil rights law are applied. That challenge is compounded by the state’s initiative process itself. | BY SCOTT JAMES, A small Boulder-based network quietly drives Colorado policy: The commentary lays out how a tight circle of climate nonprofits and government appointees—centered around groups like SWEEP and the Colorado Energy Office—now shape transportation, land-use, and energy rules statewide, often without voters realizing who is pulling the levers. Advocacy and governance have blurred into the same machine: Key figures rotate between activist organizations and official roles, crafting the very rules they once lobbied for, turning external pressure into internal control and replacing democratic debate with technocratic enforcement. Public comment is stacked while rural and working communities lose out: Coordinated “action alerts” flood agencies with pre-written supportive comments, allowing officials to claim public backing while everyday Coloradans—especially in rural, freight, and high-growth corridors—are sidelined by policies built for climate metrics, not real-world mobility or safety. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | BY C. J. GARBO, COVID exposed how fear and false certainty replaced wisdom: Leaders and institutions oversold confidence early, then quietly revised guidance as evidence evolved—undermining public trust by treating changing science as moral truth instead of honest uncertainty Mandates crossed from persuasion into coercion: Vaccine policies shifted from encouragement to force, with job loss, fines, and exclusion used to compel compliance—proving that government power, not consensus, became the primary tool during the pandemic. Suppressing dissent fractured society and weakened freedom: By labeling skepticism as immoral and disagreement as dangerous, institutions drove careful thinkers out of public life, leaving communities more brittle, polarized, and vulnerable to future crises. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ GREG WALCHER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 18 A couple years ago, I criticized the Bureau of Reclamation for draining Blue Mesa Reservoir without bothering to tell the people in Gunnison whose livelihood is affected. I got a little push-back for saying that while the Bureau owned the dam, it did not own the water. A close friend and water lawyer told me to be careful, that the Bureau does in fact own some water rights in the Gunnison River. BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 18 If hope helps us wait and peace helps us stand, then joy helps us move forward. Joy can sometimes be misunderstood. People often mix it up with happiness, think it’s just an emotion, or even brush it off as silly. But joy has its own special meaning! BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 17 Colorado is asking a court to decide whether doing nothing can amount to doing too much. In its lawsuit over frozen federal funding, the state argues that agencies crossed the line when they allowed congressionally approved programs to stall through delay and inaction. At some point, Colorado contends, refusing to decide becomes a veto Congress never granted. __ Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share? Email mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com. | | 🍩 DID YOU KNOW? During Hanukkah, millions of jelly-filled doughnuts —known as sufganiyot—are enjoyed across Israel, honoring the miracle of oil that burned for eight days, which is why many traditional holiday foods are fried in oil. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Peace if possible, truth at all costs." – Martin Luther | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. # Friday, December 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** When you're truly excited for Christmas, sometimes you have to [take to the skies](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuxCAURE-DOyz4NrAuKNK427QpLQwfmwjDCshavn3kXCHNNCM9zbyv5_I0IYa0fZoDtd_80nxeEp41YmtYFsEYY2vM2bmcTAs51a2Y5I4FGAjKgfJpcSbEaxk7pz0i4NCh5kpKrh58ZN2uAbkavBofUkrLBsWcXLlgilkhJRe-C_qmceATcAZ86seHWIWcjFqlFesoyMjQhZZL_51Dajv6eOU3lt7mo4t6b-1VyfBBYCYwn-fZ88Gs9m4JzDebwMzhDkVgfoWYG_XxCmmj-afRNZ-3BLoVxERtQdOw0vvvO7SLVosJqbEl10rzHjKBuSvavc4QY6hSkZFthwnxb077t8e3ht8AAAD__7mBhTU) and draw the Nativity scene in the air--just like one Ohio pilot we feature below. Next week, there won't be a _Feel Good Flyover_ edition, as our staff will be spending the holidays with their families. Merry Christmas! Today's [_Feel Good Flyover Podcast_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz01u6yAUQOHV2LNY3Bv-PGDwJpaiKG_aIQJzcWgxRDZJ5N1X7Ra6gHOk7-Nmby7lVJb_biUTl2hbrLbQe8_UGm1WMMaYz7WGUItrqZZ92VwJq0WG4gR4gtEGl_JheR9MJEI692RASQlKA2f93YzAUUenZwCJnIPSkpyOgs-KO-1Fn8zPDRBGBIYwDlwLL-TolJez8Fx0nFFIrW7DZ02l3Snmo75oG-a69tncW3vs3flfh1OH01Gf7Tl46nA6XS55ul6_WLj1mwmPd8o57VJ1nC2rS_m3b3-Gvwx-BwAA__-CF2pT) explores _The Hope Post_ , a growing volunteer-led effort that will deliver more than 1,000 handwritten Christmas cards to seniors in care homes across British Columbia--many of whom might otherwise receive none. Host Amy Hess sits down with the women who started it all in an [exclusive interview](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOgyAYBOCnwVvNDwKWA4dNGpOm6V73SND_V9lFaJTW9O037ivscWaS7zBfd3f3IYY0ffqF7DiNrozZJdq3SKXQ6hQAQB9zRszJl5DTNq0-4eIECHXi4sSNQx_i28kK7UgkqKnI8lZr3p65hGq2oFAhHsEoORhuQCNxEFpTM3hsq2APjQtuBAfBTS3Pqlfa-LbXg-qlYhIIQ8lr_Z1DKjON8Z1ftNZDXqpo51IeG2s-mOiY6PZ9r9_5WZ49HfvR-DLMrOlerLmcrtfY3W4_gHcmdGHNRcNWrRYfe4gxbLplEqbFh_iHl3-_8rLiNwAA___yQnOF).
If you've been frustrated by thinning hair despite trying countless products, this new discovery from today's sponsor, [Pureance](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w), might finally explain what's been holding your results back.

## Sydney Residents Line Up to Donate Blood
In the days after the Bondi Beach attack, tens of thousands of Sydney residents found a simple way to help: [rolling up their sleeves](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSoyAUBeCnwQ4HbhCloNjGLttu6VwElQ1CFm908vY7ySv89Zk5c77z5z7dMaaY19-4B7usy0RLmXK4jhSIQp06IYRwqRTvS0aKJR9rxez3CQR0XAKXZvIY03tSjbdLCBBuTbCy11r2g1Si2ay4uSAAZo3GeEQTpJNuMHLulZkXrZpoP20SpAEpQJpWDZ3rtMHe6blzqmNKBB-p1PZviZm2sKR3OUNt57I3yW5Ez4PdfjEYGYzXdbWHOz5Ziy8G48fDYMRKcU6BwehK9pFTqLVUjkQ4P_i1IXEq_JHLxdGVF_E1njGv_MtnMC5qOF_6Xy-aav3ziinFQ_dMiXXHmL5T6Mcfnhb-BwAA__9JJIaW). At donation centers across the city, waits stretched up to seven hours as people queued to give blood, with Australian Red Cross Lifeblood reporting nearly 50,000 donation bookings nationwide in response. Many donors told reporters the [wait didn't matter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSrCAUheHVYIYFV0ANCF5i1i-d0AK5KFPI7VKmrd79VHfQG5gNnPq_83Wbby7lVNb_bkcb1zjXSHPB68xYKx6zFkIIn4lCoOJqonKuhythn0GA5hK4HOfgUn7Oqgk2IgJ2DVrZGyP7QSrRbDYO49DroDqIY-i0EsZE4zEuwjv0KJtkX2sS5AhSgBxbNWivzeh6bxbtlWZKYEiVjvabUqkbxvykBx7tQnuT7Vbr_WTdPwYTg-m6rtb5pS1YW_fDYHp5GEyfYs1g8lRC4udGVFNZ-UYXr8Q3zHe-uJx5pIO_3fwDZzBJYaSCwajmsOF-pZzTaXqmxLq7lN819c83Piz8BgAA__9HL4S0), saying it was "all we can do" in the face of tragedy, according to reports. Lifeblood officials urged Australians to keep donating in the coming weeks, noting that blood supplies are needed long after headlines fade. [Watch a news report here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAYBOCnwW4N_w-iFhTX2O21VxKQH5c9hI0SvX37i_cK100yyZfMfN3N3cYU8_JpV9JhCaaGYjKde6JaaTMd55y7VIr3JdsaS96XzWa_GuTY3QBvMBpvY3ob2XgdiJBEQxp6paAfQPLmoUWQQvpg-1mCt7ODoCxaMVihAAbhmqgvDRBGBI4wtnLoXKdG2zs1d052THLysZatfZaY64NCepeDtnYua5P0o9bXzsQHw4nhdJ5n69x8dQynawzD6YieyhVmuXw_OdLPKEuzaf86Y0pxVz2TfFltTH9m_fcZh8bfAAAA___wUXIr).
## Grandma Stands Offer Heartfelt Help
The Grandma Stand started in 2012 with a simple, slightly strange idea: if you're hurting, [maybe you should talk to a grandma](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuxCAQheHT4M4WzALGBUUad5s2JcIwtokwrMxorb19lEQ5QYrXftL7P-7u7lNOZXv3B9p1Wx2t1RW8WkYiPJ3inPMl1xpjLZ5SLW07fYmHAw6qF9CLyUWf8svJLtoVEfDWoRWj1mI0QvJutyiNCdMajJERDWoFk1Ycgo9cKB-WLtlvTYCYQHAQ0yCNWpSe_LjooBapmOQYE9Vz-Kyp0I5rftUnnkOoR5ftTvRo7PbGYGYwX9c1bLXGvw2hMpj9SSlkbAxm2rH_feH7Rr7EvrxCd9r4uFLOqemRSb4dPuUfn_4d5mnhKwAA__8rOHgP). New Yorker Mike Matthews first connected strangers with [his grandmother, Eileen](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7Fu6yAUxvGngS0WnAA2A8NdsuWuHdHBgE2FIbJPY-Xtq7SP0P3TT9__4-7vWGppy3_ckstL9pS7b-k8aiJKu9dCCBFq7zH2hlR6O5YdW9w8CNAXCRdpfcRSX17x6HJKkK48OTkaI8dJKsFXZ1QIYYJJTyZqM8sxG6lEzFdhEbO2vLi3JkFakAKkHdSkgzYWx2BmHZRmSqRYqO_DZy-N1pTrqz_TPsx949WtRI-DXf8xuDG4nec5_J7Eg7DF94jBDUP_Ir67-DhLreUwI1Ni2bDUH4X-nP908B0AAP__9o5uMw), through FaceTime, setting up a laptop at a lemonade stand so she could talk with passersby from her living room in Washington state, lifting the spirits of thousands of people until her death in 2018 at age 102. After a pause, Matthews revived the project to honor her legacy, painting the stand purple--her favorite color--and inviting other grandmothers to step in. [Watch a news report here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVusyzUYMzBUirKl6lCpIwJzbVNhiGwSK336Kn2FrudI3_B_Xe3VxRTz_O5WMtM82ToVm-nYE9VKm5UAAD6VEkLJrsaS93lzOawWAeWJ44lrG1xMTyuaYCYipK4hw1XfczVwAc1iwHvSKnSSj-h0EIRe0QjKT10vhYMmmpfGkWvkgFy3YpBe9top34_SC8kEUIi1bO13ibkuNKVnedDWjmVtkllqve2se2N4YXg5jqN9lnu9e3r9r8XVcWHd5cG6sz7P54_w-TP4odlMuB0xpbj3igmYVxfTH1n_3eJh8DcAAP__mO1x7w). Today, rotating groups of volunteer grandmas pop up in cities around the country, offering free, nonjudgmental conversation to anyone who sits down. Each stand posts a prompt to break the ice, with questions like, _" What do you wish you had a second chance at?"_ or _" What's something you haven't told anyone yet?" _[See photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGunCAYhZ8Gdxj4BR0XLOxNbLqYdtFJujQoP0qLMAE6xj5947zCXZ7k5OR836_7dNfOu7B-1zsqu9qp2DgFPLLHUjBNkjHGZh-jMTHo4mLIa9LB7BMwkJQD5f1ktPPnJCqjLCJgU6HiXdvy7sYFqzbFpW0bNIucbQPd0nDdaL4sfTP3WugeKqeuNQ68B86A97W4yVm2ve7mdpGzkEQwNK7EVP-OLpQNrT_jC1O9xL3yaivlmUkzEBgJjMdx1PlvCGf-c_67GgTG2ceVwCgY3AiMjw3p1zeGpj-LDoZ-y_RLcmF1YaUfcbcxFToEQz9iCLhc3PRHwCu-MOW3CDoUOtCH27FKyjwP573LbUcEW3ft_Pta-bTTl4L_AQAA__-hKIvT). The goal isn't therapy--it's human connection, one grandma at a time. Find a [grandma near you or get involved](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1u7CAUxfHVQDcWXPNhCorXuJvXpkRgLjYRhomNxprdR5MsIf3RT-f_cXd3n0uu63-_o01rcj01V_E6C_aOh5OMMRZKazG26ntu9VwPX-PugIG8cbhx46LP5eUEjTYhAo4ULddKcT1xwehmDUY1LWmRwkQmNXiRUhA4aa70EtRIs31rHLgBzoCbQUwySGW8DmqRQUgiGMbc2zF8tlz7hqm82hOPYWk7LXbr_XGS8R-BmcB8Xdfwe9Kf3df4HhGYk_-ih42PK5eST6WJYOvuc_kx-p_jnxa-AwAA__9ojW27).
## 'Bus Stop Ozzy' Wins Hearts Online
A loyal German shepherd from rural Manitoba, Canada, has gone viral for [walking two young siblings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE9jd1jwjP8KijTbbdqUCMzDkMWwArJobx85V8iUo9Fovvm6y7vywcfjU50o7GFltUlGbCVgrZjlRCmlOqRkTIqq-hTLkVU0pwQKE2FA2CaN8uEteW-ERQQcexRsmWe2rIzT3onZ7kpbq-0CdDYL2BX4yA1HjsZMoHovrjYGbANGgW0DXyc9zZta9LxPmk8dp2h8TXn4Tj5Whza80wvzsKezD8LV-izd-NHBrYNba224EBri4wp0cHOpkQPzqSIpDp8OsyFVPbCQ4vXFX0jZXUqB6J_LizsSoDCSl88qEHYJ2NpnYZ7Nh-DLvHScHqfy4W9D_fd5LwG_AQAA__8_kYQd) to their school bus every morning--and waiting until it pulls away. Ozzy, age 9, escorts Oakes and Winnie to the end of their driveway, rain or shine, and hasn't missed a morning in two years. [See Ozzy here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2CAQhJ_G7rBgz78FRRp3lzaltcBib4TBAs7WvX3kvMK1o9Fovu_P5_aJHDjuv_Ek7Xe_VZ-2SE8JVCvlbZBSShNSci5FrJxi2TNGd24gYRAKhFo2hxy-t7512hMBfbSk1TSOappVL9tDL9PgrTQjmtmZcbYT-AkB3GI8grJ9y_pdU6AWUBLU0vXzYIZxwcmMdjD90PSSHNeUu7-JYz3Ih-90U-5sOtugj1qv0nz8amBtYH2ep7P1fik6i2_AMfJFewMr5so2UANrpJuyOLkUcgLFmXLkuIsTI9dkUFxfl9gTFXFzxiB8yqIcdB2U3dsrbF5vRdQkzFcRpaargbXN2l0Ph8BlnJpe7idy-P-y_ljvreFfAAAA__-XQZJh). A video of his daily send-off has drawn nearly 3 million views and earned him the nickname "Bus Stop Ozzy." His owners say he's just doing what comes naturally by looking out for his kids. [Watch it here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUgOGnwVuswwlgMzDcqysvV-lQqeqIsDk4tBgijOLm7av0Fbr_-ob__WIvLqaY1xe3kQlrsC0Um-nYE7VG1UoAgDmV4n3JrsWS97W67DeLgPLE8cS19S6mhxWdN4EI6dyR4YNSfBi5gO5qtNILhAXmQaoFx4E4gZYBhKRllEhdNE-NI9fIAbnuxShnqbQbZrXIWUgmgHxspfYfJeZ2pZAe5U61X8rWJXNt7baz8x-GE8PpOI4-5r25tbrtWTCcKlHaGU7_Xt_o67__HNVfhlNXjb8dMaW4q4EJWDcX04_Zfj3jbvA7AAD__6MKcdU).

| Flying together with our sponsor [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w) **The 15-Second Ritual That Could Save Your Thinning Hair** Something I learned during my 25 years studying women's hair loss changed everything I thought I knew about why hair gets thinner. I was reviewing the latest research on scalp health when I noticed my office plant looking wilted. I poured water on its waxy leaves, watching it bead up and roll off instead of absorbing. **[That's when it hit me](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w).** The breakthrough studies I'd been reading showed the same suffocating pattern was happening around hair follicles in women experiencing thinning. Your follicles aren't dying from age or hormones like everyone thinks. **[They're literally being suffocated](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w).** And those expensive shampoos promising thicker hair? They might actually be making this suffocation [worse](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w). See, your scalp is skin is [delicate skin](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGNpGnppImToiYx42LTYWJrHy91WqSv2A7qc76T7O5tyHGJbx0s-o_ehN8cksuG8RS8FsBKWU2piSc2npS0jLNuZ-cbMBCuLA4MCUcX2ID8Mrpz0iYFOhZq2UrD0yTqtJ-5YjAAiujpJZpyTzDZWD88555YWvgn7aGDAFjAJTNT8KK6TqWysHYbkgnKILJeX6M4WlTOjjI90x10Oaq6inUtaNNC8EOgLdvu91sOvES_56AgQ6eFdnoVoC3dv19XK5PsGm29ItD2iCI81pWGcCcrtZRprTr_3vQ5W1W_cQY9hkSzgd5z7En3j597W7hu8AAAD__6m-f4w) housing over 100,000 follicles that need expert care. Yet, we often wash it with ingredients that create waxy buildup, slowly choking your follicles. It's no wonder that so many treatments don't work.

clean_body: In the days after the Bondi Beach attack, tens of thousands of Sydney residents found a simple way to help: . | | | | | | Friday, December 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! When you're truly excited for Christmas, sometimes you have to and draw the Nativity scene in the air--just like one Ohio pilot we feature below. Next week, there won't be a Feel Good Flyover edition, as our staff will be spending the holidays with their families. Merry Christmas! Today's explores The Hope Post , a growing volunteer-led effort that will deliver more than 1,000 handwritten Christmas cards to seniors in care homes across British Columbia--many of whom might otherwise receive none. Host Amy Hess sits down with the women who started it all in an . If you've been frustrated by thinning hair despite trying countless products, this new discovery from today's sponsor, , might finally explain what's been holding your results back. | Sydney Residents Line Up to Donate Blood In the days after the Bondi Beach attack, tens of thousands of Sydney residents found a simple way to help: . At donation centers across the city, waits stretched up to seven hours as people queued to give blood, with Australian Red Cross Lifeblood reporting nearly 50,000 donation bookings nationwide in response. Many donors told reporters the , saying it was "all we can do" in the face of tragedy, according to reports. Lifeblood officials urged Australians to keep donating in the coming weeks, noting that blood supplies are needed long after headlines fade. . Grandma Stands Offer Heartfelt Help The Grandma Stand started in 2012 with a simple, slightly strange idea: if you're hurting, . New Yorker Mike Matthews first connected strangers with , through FaceTime, setting up a laptop at a lemonade stand so she could talk with passersby from her living room in Washington state, lifting the spirits of thousands of people until her death in 2018 at age 102. After a pause, Matthews revived the project to honor her legacy, painting the stand purple--her favorite color--and inviting other grandmothers to step in. . Today, rotating groups of volunteer grandmas pop up in cities around the country, offering free, nonjudgmental conversation to anyone who sits down. Each stand posts a prompt to break the ice, with questions like, " What do you wish you had a second chance at?" or " What's something you haven't told anyone yet?" . The goal isn't therapy--it's human connection, one grandma at a time. Find a . 'Bus Stop Ozzy' Wins Hearts Online A loyal German shepherd from rural Manitoba, Canada, has gone viral for to their school bus every morning--and waiting until it pulls away. Ozzy, age 9, escorts Oakes and Winnie to the end of their driveway, rain or shine, and hasn't missed a morning in two years. . A video of his daily send-off has drawn nearly 3 million views and earned him the nickname "Bus Stop Ozzy." His owners say he's just doing what comes naturally by looking out for his kids. . | The following story is featured exclusively on The Feel Good Flyover Podcast. Clicking the link will take you directly to this story: ➤ Amy Hess interviews the founder of The Hope Post, a volunteer-powered project sending handwritten Christmas cards to seniors in care homes. () ** | Flying together with our sponsor The 15-Second Ritual That Could Save Your Thinning Hair Something I learned during my 25 years studying women's hair loss changed everything I thought I knew about why hair gets thinner. I was reviewing the latest research on scalp health when I noticed my office plant looking wilted. I poured water on its waxy leaves, watching it bead up and roll off instead of absorbing. . The breakthrough studies I'd been reading showed the same suffocating pattern was happening around hair follicles in women experiencing thinning. Your follicles aren't dying from age or hormones like everyone thinks. . And those expensive shampoos promising thicker hair? They might actually be making this suffocation . See, your scalp is skin is housing over 100,000 follicles that need expert care. Yet, we often wash it with ingredients that create waxy buildup, slowly choking your follicles. It's no wonder that so many treatments don't work. | ➤ Nearly two decades ago, Ted Lasso star Jason Sudeikis organized a backyard barbecue to help a close friend afford a prosthetic leg. That event has evolved into an annual concert in Kansas City that has provided prosthetic limbs to more than 2,000 amputees nationwide. () ➤ An Ohio pilot flew a five-hour, 500-mile route tracing a Nativity scene in the air. The plane sketched Mary, Joseph, and baby Jesus across the state. () ➤ A New York City dog lover is helping shelter dogs find homes by carrying them through the city in a backpack labeled "Adopt Me," turning ordinary subway rides into joyful encounters that help busy New Yorkers pause and smile. () ➤ An empty Kansas mall shop turned into a moving holiday tribute after a husband rented the storefront to showcase his late wife's beloved Christmas decorations. The snowman village featured curated displays, twinkling lights, and easels displaying her obituary and life story. () ➤ New York's coolest residents aren't Gen Z, they're octogenarians and nonagenarians taking over the city's nightlife, fashion scenes, and social media. () ➤ Jack's Bravery Bears is a 9-year-old's mission to bring comfort and courage to hospitalized children through stuffed animals. The bear drive has turned his parents' Ohio home into "Teddy Bear HQ," with hundreds already collected and a goal of sending out 500 bears. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ gives you all seven forms of magnesium in one gentle formula. Most supplements only contain one or two forms, which is why many people may not notice the benefits of this essential mineral. Magnesium Breakthrough supports better sleep, stress management, and overall relaxation--perfect for unwinding after a long week. Takes 30 seconds before bed and comes with a . | It's always an honor with the dog chooses you. video via @thegoldenboyranger - Instagram | | Flying together with our sponsor You can't grow healthy hair in a suffocating environment. Just like mature skin needs different care than young skin. Your changing scalp needs the same sophisticated, organic approach... After 25 years of studying hair loss, I can confidently say that is one of my favorite ways to address these issues at the source. Every day you wait, more follicles could become suffocated. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country.
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | Folks, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me, please: [**Split a donation between Kristen McDonald Rivet and me. | | My name is Tom Perriello and I am proud to announce my campaign for Congress to represent the 5th District of Virginia.

[_**Will you join me with a contribution of any amount – split between my campaign and Mark Warner’s – to flip this seat from red to blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121624176/590058637/-983349743?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PerrielloSplit_251219_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk0YjJiOS0xZGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk2KJdI7Hak6r0ikIJVUoE2-9PUCYIW9EZgYAA6tLQk=) **********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121624181/590058642/-983349743?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PerrielloSplit_251219_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk0YjJiOS0xZGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk2KJdI7Hak6r0ikIJVUoE2-9PUCYIW9EZgYAA6tLQk=)********** I’m running because families in our community are being squeezed from every direction. From the skyrocketing cost of groceries and housing to the burdens of healthcare and childcare, too many people are working harder than ever and still falling behind. Affordability isn’t just an issue—it’s the issue—and it will be at the heart of everything I fight for in Washington.

But this moment demands more than economic solutions alone. Our democracy itself is being tested. The Trump administration and its allies continue to undermine democratic norms, chip away at critical protections, target immigrants, and put the interests of billionaires above those of working families. The stakes have truly never been higher. We need leaders who will defend our democratic institutions and our Constitution with clarity and courage.

I have had the honor of previously representing the 5th District, and I did so with integrity, independence, and a steadfast commitment to serving all of my constituents—no matter their party or background. I have built a record of standing up for what is right, even when it wasn’t easy, and of working to deliver real solutions for all people.

This community shaped me. I was born and raised in Albemarle County, and the values I learned here—hard work, fairness, and a belief in the power of community—continue to guide me every day. I am ready to fight for this district again, and I am ready to win.

[_**But I can’t do it without your help. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Warner’s to win in VA-05 and all across the Commonwealth?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121624184/590058645/-983349743?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PerrielloSplit_251219_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk0YjJiOS0xZGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk2KJdI7Hak6r0ikIJVUoE2-9PUCYIW9EZgYAA6tLQk=)

With gratitude and determination,

Tom Perriello **********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121624185/590058649/-983349743?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PerrielloSplit_251219_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk0YjJiOS0xZGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk2KJdI7Hak6r0ikIJVUoE2-9PUCYIW9EZgYAA6tLQk=)**********

What if I told you that not one, but _two_ polls show me with a slight lead in this race?
What if I told you that experts at _MSNBC_ say the Senate is “in play,” and that Ohio is one of the states we must win?
What if I told you that _The Cook Political Report_ has increased our odds of flipping this seat – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions to defeat me?
**The momentum is behind our grassroots movement. But misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves, and whether we’re able to counter the smears and reach voters with the truth depends on folks like you.**
**[So please, will you chip in $5 – or even $10 – split with Wes Moore to fuel our campaign, protect our lead in the polls, and win in Ohio?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251219-2.Js3u_L&refcode=em-20251219-2&t=3&akid=1091%2E1086043%2Em1O0Z3)**

Sherrod

Shabbat Shalom, friend.
My husband, Larry, and I will be sitting down for Shabbat dinner soon, but I wanted to share something with you before logging off.
**I’ve always been guided by the Jewish principle of “Tikkun Olam” – acting with kindness to repair the world. That hasn’t changed just because President Trump and the GOP are making it harder.**
Like you, I couldn’t be more concerned about what’s being done to make the lives of hardworking Americans worse. But I know that we can still build a better tomorrow for our kids and future generations if we stand together now.
That’s why I want you to know what a blessing it is to have you on my team, friend. When Democrats take back the Senate and repair the damage from Trump’s time in office – it will be thanks to dedicated people like YOU standing with us at this critical time.

name: Team Pramila
subject: We want to start 2026 off strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There are less than two weeks until 2025 comes to a close.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251219-5723-footer&t=1&akid=5723%2E420207%2EpWRGPQ)
Peter,
With less than two weeks until 2025 comes to a close, Team Pramila is working hard to reach our campaign fundraising goals and make sure we’re in a strong position heading into the midterms in 2026.
And early next year, we’ll have a chance to prove the strength of this movement. **Our next FEC reporting deadline is December 31st** , after which we’ll have to publicly report _everything_ we’ve raised over the last quarter.
The numbers we report will demonstrate that we’re heading into the midterms with momentum, as well as shape what we can do next. They’ll determine our ability to plan budgets, hire and retain organizers, keep paying the tools we need, and invest early in the work that has to happen long before Election Day next year.
This is especially important because fundraising _always_ drops off during the holiday. **But Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress aren’t pressing pause on their authoritarian agenda** , which means we need to do everything we can to meet our goals and continue fighting back.
Pramila does things differently, Peter. She doesn’t take corporate PAC money, so the strength of this movement is measured by the number of people who choose to show up and pitch in, even if it’s just $3 at a time.
**[So if you’re able, would you consider pitching in $3 today to help us head into the new year with the resources we need to keep fighting back?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251219.Kx42eY&refcode=em20251219-5723&amount=3&t=2&akid=5723%2E420207%2EpWRGPQ)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251219.Kx42eY&amount=3&refcode=em20251219-5723&t=21&akid=5723%2E420207%2EpWRGPQ)**
Thank you for being a part of this team!
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251219-5723-footer&t=22&refcode2=5723_420207_pWRGPQ&akid=5723%2E420207%2EpWRGPQ)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

While California passed Proposition 50 and secured new maps that counteracted Texas’ Trump-ordered gerrymander, we still have towin the seats. Republicans like Rep.
