name: Breaking News Oregon
subject: REPORT: DOJ sues Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We need to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251219em-bnor-rs-fr]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.
Tobias Read for Oregon
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Pre-Christmas Update from Ernest Lineberger, December 19, 2025 ​
body:
[image: image.png]

Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

Merry Christmas! Happy Holidays! Good Tidings for a Better Future!
I wish you all the many blessings of this holiday season. A time for
reflection, rest and hopefully quality time with those closest to you.

*Less than Three Months from Primary Election Day 2026! Our campaign is
ready to go! Please join us when it works for you.*

*Volunteer opportunities:* I have sent out emails separately to those who
have asked to be on our volunteer list. Here is the condensed version.

*Block Walking* is the number one voter engagement activity that actually
brings in voters to the campaign. It’s fun to get out and share our
positive message in our neighborhoods.
Saturday, Dec 20, Noon to 3 PM, Meet at the WINCO Lewisville parking lot at
noon. We’ll form teams, have a quick briefing, and go do it. Wear
comfortable clothes and shoes, bring a fully charged cell phone.

Future dates include most Saturdays in January and February, but some will
be Sunday. Details will be announced.

[image: image.png]

*Placing Campaign signs* is a simple way to help increase name recognition,
message reach and reinforce that our campaign is asking for votes. We have
a Signup Genius where you can take responsibility to help put signs out
where they will be seen. This is in addition to signs in people’s yards,
but they are mostly the same style of signs. Easy to install!
https://www.signupgenius.com/go/805084DA8AD2DA64-61283442-lineberger#/

[image: image.png]

*Bumper Magnets:* This is a great way to help increase name recognition
and alert more voters to the upcoming election. These new and improved
magnets will last 3 to 5 years outdoors. They are all Blue on a white
background. Find me in person or send your contact information to arrange
to get one. Then you can help spread our message while you drive safely
around the district.

[image: image.png]

*Post Cards:* So, here’s the post card plan. If you would like to write
post cards for Lineberger for US Congress, please email back to me the
number of cards you are willing to do. Remember that this includes you
providing the postage at about $0.61 each. That can add up to $61 to mail
100, so factor that in to how many you are willing to do.

Once we get enough pre-orders, I’ll send the order to the printers.

When they arrive, we’ll arrange to get them to you, along with enough names
and addresses.

Then you write a few personal lines on each card. It can be the same on
every card or you can mix it up. You can write the name and address on
each card or use labels. Attach the postage and then return them to me.

I hope to get them in the mail by February 10th so that they have a week to
get there before early voting.

So, for now, your job is to reply to me with how many post cards you can
manage. Thanks!

*Events like our Cooke County Congressional Town Hall:* This event was very
successful. We couldn’t have done it without volunteers to help staff the
event. Help is always needed to sign in attendees, offer them campaign
information, greet people at the door and make them feel welcome, and
more. We can always use help finding venues where we can host events (at
very low cost). Join our volunteer group to make things happen.

[image: image.png]

*What’s Next?*

The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February
17, 2026 (~60 days away). We are going to push hard in primary season to
take every opportunity to get our message out.

*How To Get Involved - Volunteer! *

Thanks to those of you who have signed up already. Remember, there is no
obligation on your part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer
list.

>From time to time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send
out an email to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that,
you reply directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part.
No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note.

To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this
email with your preferred contact info.

We have a few champion volunteers now in continuing campaign roles. They
are helping to make events happen and finding more ways to reach more
voters. We always need help with schedule planning, social media coverage,
and more. It’s all part of being part of the solution.

*Donations!*

This is a real need. We are doing all we can to run a strong campaign on a
tight budget, but it still takes money. Votes, not money, will defeat
Brandon Gill in November. But it takes money to get our message out to
voters. Many of you have already donated. Thank you! To donate again or
to help someone else donate, use my main campaign website:
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/

*A Decision on Redistricting in Texas*

- We will be using the new and worse gerrymandered districts for the
2026 election.
- For CD26, this means the following:
- Cooke County stays 100% in district – no change
- In Denton County, we *gain* five precincts that were in CD32 at the
very South East corner of Denton County. Three are in the city
of Dallas,
precincts 2100, 2101, 2102. Two are in Carrollton, precincts 2103, 2109.
- In Denton County we *lose* the only seven precincts that we had
that were part of the city of Frisco, half of what we had that was in
Ponder, and three more precincts in the South West portion of the city of
Denton, precincts 4178, 4179, 4187.
- In Wise County, we keep what we had and *gain* Bridgeport, Chico
and Lake Bridgeport, essentially the triangle West of Decatur North of
highway 380 and South of highway 181.
- So, some real changes, but nothing we can’t deal with by doing some
strong outreach.

*Happy Holidays!*

Whether you have big plans or not. Keep it safe. Take care of yourself in
travels and at home. Remember to reflect on our many blessings and be a
blessing to others.

Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the
2026 election fall in the favor of the people.

Putting People’s Needs First,

Ernest Lineberger

Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)

LinebergerforUScongress.com <http://linebergerforuscongress.com/>

To unsubscribe simply reply “stop” to this email address

If you would like to write post cards for Lineberger for US Congress, please email back to me the number of cards you are willing to do. Remember that this includes you providing the postage at about $0.61 each. That can add up to $61 to mail 100, so factor that in to how many you are willing to do. Once we get enough pre-orders, I’ll send the order to the printers. When they arrive, we’ll arrange to get them to you, along with enough names and addresses. Then you write a few personal lines on each card. It can be the same on every card or you can mix it up. You can write the name and address on each card or use labels. Attach the postage and then return them to me. I hope to get them in the mail by February 10th so that they have a week to get there before early voting. So, for now, your job is to reply to me with how many post cards you can manage. Thanks! Events like our Cooke County Congressional Town Hall: This event was very successful. We couldn’t have done it without volunteers to help staff the event. Help is always needed to sign in attendees, offer them campaign information, greet people at the door and make them feel welcome, and more. We can always use help finding venues where we can host events (at very low cost). Join our volunteer group to make things happen. [image: image.png] What’s Next? The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February 17, 2026 (~60 days away). We are going to push hard in primary season to take every opportunity to get our message out. How To Get Involved - Volunteer! Thanks to those of you who have signed up already. Remember, there is no obligation on your part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer list. From time to time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send out an email to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that, you reply directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part. No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note. To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this email with your preferred contact info. We have a few champion volunteers now in continuing campaign roles. They are helping to make events happen and finding more ways to reach more voters. We always need help with schedule planning, social media coverage, and more. It’s all part of being part of the solution. Donations! This is a real need. We are doing all we can to run a strong campaign on a tight budget, but it still takes money. Votes, not money, will defeat Brandon Gill in November. But it takes money to get our message out to voters. Many of you have already donated. Thank you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main campaign website: A Decision on Redistricting in Texas - We will be using the new and worse gerrymandered districts for the 2026 election. - For CD26, this means the following: - Cooke County stays 100% in district – no change - In Denton County, we gain five precincts that were in CD32 at the very South East corner of Denton County. Three are in the city of Dallas, precincts 2100, 2101, 2102. Two are in Carrollton, precincts 2103, 2109. - In Denton County we lose the only seven precincts that we had that were part of the city of Frisco, half of what we had that was in Ponder, and three more precincts in the South West portion of the city of Denton, precincts 4178, 4179, 4187. - In Wise County, we keep what we had and gain Bridgeport, Chico and Lake Bridgeport, essentially the triangle West of Decatur North of highway 380 and South of highway 181. - So, some real changes, but nothing we can’t deal with by doing some strong outreach. Happy Holidays! Whether you have big plans or not. Keep it safe. Take care of yourself in travels and at home. Remember to reflect on our many blessings and be a blessing to others. Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the 2026 election fall in the favor of the people. Putting People’s Needs First, Ernest Lineberger Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26) LinebergerforUScongress.com <> To unsubscribe simply reply “stop” to this email address

Guess what, folks—they designed the “Unaffordable Care Act” to fail, and we aren’t going to let them get away with it.

Fellow American, when it comes to protecting our kids, there's never too far.

That's why, when The Satanic Temple wanted to hold events at our State Capitol, we made sure that didn't happen - two years in a row.

We MUST protect our kids from the dangerous agenda of the radical Left.

**That's why I am running for Governor.**

_Everything we love about Iowa didn't happen by accident_. President Trump and Governor Reynolds have proven that the only way anything good happens in this country is when people stand up and fight for what's right.

I've already fought and won, and I am ready to win again next year.

But this isn't about me. It's about hard-working families who struggled under the Biden administration. It's about Iowa farmers who are up before dawn to put in a hard day's work. It's about parents who want to protect their children so they can grow up safe and strong.

That's why I'm running. It's about the future every Iowan deserves.

**[Fellow American, can I count on you to join me in this fight?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8cf6643780b74a888a27759399047ffc&_e=flCLVNyJCJGmWUYOYlK83icuyHL319qm_qXIeUR-F2LbNzl4ZRdRjQXAk8nq_xR2egpT_o3AJZWNt67MDKf8UyxrrTXgH3VsU44LM154Wg1zEcITeVCRjblLMgvoFjUgzpZT5T2namIASOMRaK_8gFqpq2_7IOKbQdexk1_ked_RzJL342Ci1U0PxM1ppybHJBIyOy03jMwbzfRZ-JLzTqzZ0cMgauyHwREMtLP1-dLVKA1aZCd6piiJDnl74SYIjfw4ku1lTrvGUPWP5sF2SxjdAyBlZhDzMnjtsrKGra0uX6779HTFclmplK2TAYEEO_oxPh_eaXOiHjvagvcAgftUps4U9BTYCjKVqla0QVOu0Ym6j6oow5KPhx8DIXZ0qC-sTbTH80E0taCPsKjk5c5HobDGSgfa1Pb4qqseNf01F_K_F7WZYDJW2N6muwCrFkKMESO2A5ObsVQ_bP2fw3jDOxYRaJUgjRbQngc0LKYOiOgh2PjYe3V1eYKr1827dgzlQ_82iJgwVSgNL06fgsv8IgJnMEi-czPrrBwo6Xhd4thZv7cyFtxIgXZxGYzQvmfc8GWb6gJNhIhruiQCGgnNn6DGme0x-IkqCzxCIukBtadB-iZKJKiIwFY2PSmaZSJMm30vUH5pMZ0mJVbN_M1XwsGOw4k8OkRyyi2WVNys95ChOpoGoCJaa92VjO8l)**

It doesn't take much. Even just $3 or $5 helps build this campaign, one patriot at a time.

**[Before 2025 is over, I set an aggressive goal with our team. clean_body: I want you to hear directly from me, Fellow American. I am running for Governor of Iowa. | Fellow American, when it comes to protecting our kids, there's never too far. That's why, when The Satanic Temple wanted to hold events at our State Capitol, we made sure that didn't happen - two years in a row. We MUST protect our kids from the dangerous agenda of the radical Left. That's why I am running for Governor. Everything we love about Iowa didn't happen by accident. President Trump and Governor Reynolds have proven that the only way anything good happens in this country is when people stand up and fight for what's right. I've already fought and won, and I am ready to win again next year. But this isn't about me. It's about hard-working families who struggled under the Biden administration. It's about Iowa farmers who are up before dawn to put in a hard day's work. It's about parents who want to protect their children so they can grow up safe and strong. That's why I'm running. It's about the future every Iowan deserves. It doesn't take much. Even just $3 or $5 helps build this campaign, one patriot at a time. Thanks for joining me in this fight, Adam Steen Conservative for Iowa | | Paid for by Adam Steen for Iowa Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Turning Point PAC
subject: Losing is NOT an option.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
We're turning Charlie's warning into the votes that save America
| | | | [View as Web Page](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5609339/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvV2hVcVpFU1Jlcw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsZEFEdUxFWQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQnZ1NjNBVERXQlpscw/gaUXCIw/sbv1fc452d7)

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5609339/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsZEFEdUxFWQ/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmNsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfZnRkMQ/gaUXCIw/s2k2745555d)
| | Patriot,
---
Charlie always said conservatives lose because we bring signs to a ballot fight.

**No more.
**
For too long, the radical left has dominated the ground game—building massive operations to identify disengaged voters, register them, chase their ballots relentlessly, and cure any issues to ensure every possible vote counts.

They've had a decade-long head start, pouring billions into these efforts while conservatives relied on rallies and enthusiasm alone. **[That ends now.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5609339/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsZEFEdUxFWQ/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmNsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfZnRkMQ/gaUXCIw/s2k2745555d)**
In 2026, Turning Point PAC is deploying _**thousands of paid ballot chasers**_ across every key battleground state—the largest and most sophisticated conservative ballot-chasing operation ever built.

We're not just matching the left; we're surpassing them with better data, cutting-edge technology, and patriots who truly love this country.

**Here's exactly how we're doing it:
**
\- **Identifying low-propensity America First voters:** Using advanced targeting to find every patriot who supports our values but doesn't always vote.
\- **Registering unregistered conservatives:** Getting them signed up and ready to make their voices heard.
\- **Building authentic, one-on-one relationships:** Through millions of door knocks, phone calls, and texts—prioritizing personal connections over impersonal blasts.
\- **Chasing and tracking ballots:** With our proprietary first-of-its-kind mobile app that provides optimal routes, detailed scripts, early ballot detection, and real-time tracking to ensure submissions.
\- **Curing issues relentlessly** : Following up on every problematic ballot until it's fixed and counted.
[KEEP AMERICA GREAT FOREVER >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5609339/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsZEFEdUxFWQ/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmNsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfZnRkMQ/gaUXCIw/s2k2745555d)
This is the hard, gritty work: door-to-door mobilization, call after call, text after text—securing power the way the left has for decades, but faster, smarter, and with unwavering conviction.

Just look at what we proved in 2024: We launched the first truly robust conservative ballot-chasing program, deploying thousands of chasers and perfecting our data and tech.

_In Arizona alone, we chased over**315,000** ballots and built more than 400,000 voter relationships. We turned the tide in key states—and now we're scaling it even bigger for 2026.
_
We're laser-focused on the decisive swing states: AZ, GA, NV, PA, WI, and MI. Operations are expanding every single week, building the permanent grassroots infrastructure needed to dominate elections not just in 2026, but in 2028 and beyond.

**This is how we construct the unbreakable Red Wall—a fortress of banked votes that no Democrat can ever breach again.
**
The left is already panicking. They know what's coming: a conservative machine that's finally playing—and winning—the ballot game on their terms.

[_**Be the patriot who can say you helped fund this historic turnaround.**_**
**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5609339/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsZEFEdUxFWQ/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmNsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfZnRkMQ/gaUXCIw/s2k2745555d)

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Trump’s DOJ sues Georgia county for 2020 ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121625246/590061316/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEzZDZjZC0yMGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R69dK-k36fwSM1JPsdKuhFBm4Ecb0Jo23TGL_j2Il-I=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ is now suing Fulton County for 2020 election ballots** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121625247/590061317/-248329304?refcode=em-12.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEzZDZjZC0yMGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R69dK-k36fwSM1JPsdKuhFBm4Ecb0Jo23TGL_j2Il-I=)
* * *
Friend, The Trump administration’s Department of Justice is taking its dangerous legal campaign even further — this time by suing Fulton County, Georgia for access to ballots and election records from the 2020 presidential election. This lawsuit isn’t really about election security. DOJ lawyers are demanding “all used and void ballots, stubs, signature envelopes, and corresponding digital files” from that election, five years after it was certified and after repeated recounts and audits confirmed the results. At the same time, **the DOJ has already filed or pursued lawsuits against at least 18 states for voter registration data** — including full lists with names, addresses, driver’s license numbers, and parts of Social Security numbers — as part of an unprecedented push to centralize sensitive voter information. **This is a full‐on escalation of Trump’s longstanding, baseless claims that the 2020 election was “rigged”** , claims that have been repeatedly debunked in court and by multiple audits. Democratic Secretaries of State are one of the last remaining checks on this authoritarian agenda. They don’t answer to the president. They answer to the people. If we don’t fight back, this will become the new normal. That’s why we need your support right now: **[Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help elect and defend Democratic Secretaries of State who will protect our elections against this kind of federal overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121625248/590061318/-248329304?refcode=em-12.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEzZDZjZC0yMGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R69dK-k36fwSM1JPsdKuhFBm4Ecb0Jo23TGL_j2Il-I=)** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121625249/590061319/-248329304?refcode=em-12.19.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEzZDZjZC0yMGRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R69dK-k36fwSM1JPsdKuhFBm4Ecb0Jo23TGL_j2Il-I=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ is now suing Fulton County for 2020 election ballots = Friend, The Trump administration’s Department of Justice is taking its dangerous legal campaign even further — this time by suing Fulton County, Georgia for access to ballots and election records from the 2020 presidential election. This lawsuit isn’t really about election security. DOJ lawyers are demanding “all used and void ballots, stubs, signature envelopes, and corresponding digital files” from that election, five years after it was certified and after repeated recounts and audits confirmed the results. At the same time, the DOJ has already filed or pursued lawsuits against at least 18 states for voter registration data — including full lists with names, addresses, driver’s license numbers, and parts of Social Security numbers — as part of an unprecedented push to centralize sensitive voter information. This is a full‐on escalation of Trump’s longstanding, baseless claims that the 2020 election was “rigged” , claims that have been repeatedly debunked in court and by multiple audits. Democratic Secretaries of State are one of the last remaining checks on this authoritarian agenda. They don’t answer to the president. They answer to the people. If we don’t fight back, this will become the new normal. That’s why we need your support right now: = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | =** Democratic Secretaries of State are standing up for privacy, state authority, and election integrity, but they cannot win this fight alone. subject: We made you this personalized link:

You helped Democratic candidates across the country win historic victories this year, and your support will be crucial to helping Democrats win again in 2026. That’s why we’re reaching out. We need to make sure that we head into the new year with a fully replenished war chest, so that we can hit the ground running as we work to win back control of Congress. name: Mayor Paige Cognetti
subject: I was on MSNBC recently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Rob Bresnahan is the kind of corrupt politician voters are sick and tired of.
Hi, it's Mayor Paige Cognetti.
**Recently, I joined Symone D. Sanders on The 11th Hour on MSNBC to talk about why Rob Bresnahan isn't fit to serve in Congress.**
[****](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251219-1.3LEwRc&refcode=em20251219-2602&t=1&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)
We talked about Rob Bresnahan’s 600+ stock trades worth millions after promising to ban congressional trading — even how he dumped Medicaid provider stocks right before voting for the largest Medicaid cuts in history.
**Symone asked me directly:_Make it make sense._**
My answer was simple — it doesn’t. This is the exact kind of corruption people are sick and tired of.
I ran as an independent for Mayor of Scranton when I saw a corrupt local Democratic Party. I’m _still_ running as Paige Against the Machine in Scranton. We go after corruption wherever we see it, and sadly, Rob Bresnahan has brought that to Northeastern Pennsylvania.
**Voters cannot trust someone who lies about his stock trading and votes against their interests while enriching himself.**
The national media is paying attention to this race because Rob represents everything wrong with Washington corruption. When politicians break their promises and trade off the pain of the people they represent, it's a story that matters everywhere.
But media attention only goes so far. We need resources to reach voters directly with this message. [**Can you split a $10 donation to my campaign and Congresswoman Sarah McBride to help us get the word out about Rob's corruption?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1358?c0=mcb-em-20251219-1.iO1Ifl&refcode=em20251219-2602&t=2&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)
**[Donate $10 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1358?c0=mcb-em-20251219-1.iO1Ifl&refcode=em20251219-2602&t=21&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)**
The spotlight is on us. Let's make the most of it.
Mayor Paige Cognetti
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251219-1&t=22&refcode2=2602_21716_76BQIx&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2602%2E21716%2E76BQIx)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Brianna For Colorado
subject: Important Power Outage Resources & Information
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/69db181afaf0/important-power-outage-resources-information?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=a6c00aef7c&e=8249791cac)
| | Hi everyone. I know this is not a regularly scheduled newsletter, but I felt it was important to get one out regarding the ongoing power outages.
I know this is an incredibly frustrating and discouraging time. Our office has received an influx of outreach from constituents. Please be patient while we work to get back to you and know we are working hard to find some type of solution to the current system.
If you need anything, please contact me via my email brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov, my office phone at (303)-866-2962, or my personal cell at (720)-213-6660.
Click here to skip to important resources and here for contacts.
---
|
---
| |
# GENERAL INFORMATION
---
| |
Our office has been in constant contact with Xcel Energy to keep our district informed and advocated for.
This is the latest communication we received from them:

_Xcel Energy enacted a Public Safety Power Shutoff (PSPS) for customers in Boulder, Clear Creek, Gilpin, Jefferson, Larimer and Weld counties. Weather conditions are expected to be severe, and the National Weather Service has issued a Particularly Dangerous Situation (PDS) designation.__While some residents may not experience dangerous winds, the electric lines likely travel through communities that do.____Due to the latest forecasts, extreme fire weather conditions are now expected to persist until at least 8 p.m. to 10 p.m. Friday evening, with high winds, causing additional outages, persisting beyond 10 p.m. Even though the high winds will end, power will not be restored immediately. Xcel Energy expects this to be a very severe weather event with unplanned outages expected to significantly exceed the number of customers affected by a PSPS.____Restoration activity cannot begin until weather conditions improve, and includes crews visually inspecting lines, assessing and remediating damage, repairing equipment and safely reinitiating power. This process can take hours and days depending on the full and actual scope of damage._ _Since Wednesday, Xcel Energy crews have restored power to over 200,000 customers. As the winds subside late Friday night, hundreds of crew members will be ready to begin restoration through the weekend. Customers may not have power restored for several days. The safety of our crew members is paramount as they work in your neighborhood to restore power. We ask our customers to help keep our crew members safe as they work diligently to restore power as quickly as possible.____PSPS events reduce the risk of wildfires and protect public safety. Xcel Energy uses weather forecasts and other data sources to decide how to best protect the customers and communities it serves. Key factors in calling for a PSPS event include high winds, low relative humidity and dry ground conditions and all are present today._ _**Particularly Dangerous Situation**_ _The National Weather Service issued a Particularly Dangerous Situation (PDS) alert associated with today’s Red Flag Warning in Colorado. Conditions are expected to be especially dangerous at elevations between 5500 and 9000 feet in Jefferson and Boulder Counties. This is the most extreme categorization for risk the NWS has, and it is used in rare weather events.____Turning off the power is not a decision made lightly, and restoration will begin as soon as it is safe for crews to begin working. This effort could take several days to complete. Crews must inspect power lines and repair damage before they can be safely re-energized. As crews restore power, the public is reminded to give them the space they need to do their job safely and efficiently.____Xcel Energy reminds customers there will be unplanned outages outside of the PSPS event due to high wind. Customers should stay clear of any downed power lines and report them, as well as any damage they see to Xcel Energy.____Customers who live in areas where power lines are underground, or do not see damage in their immediate area can still be impacted by a PSPS or power outage due to how their neighborhood connects to the larger grid._
Additionally, Xcel Energy has recommended that to help ensure you receive timely updates, please make sure your communications preferences are up to date by logging on to [My Account](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b8b8b3ae8e&e=8249791cac). If you live in Arvada, the city has created a [news page](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=ad0174beac&e=8249791cac) with updates on the situation and links to resources, including Xcel's outage map.

* [Nearly 100,000 across Colorado lose power due to wind, planned Xcel shut-offs that could take several days to restore](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=2bb4e548b1&e=8249791cac)
* [Schools west of metro Denver close Friday due to power outages amid winds](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=3013f19944&e=8249791cac)
* [NWS in Colorado issues rare ‘particularly dangerous situation’ red flag warning as winds could reach 100 mph](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=8490aba259&e=8249791cac)
* [Power outages: How long is food, medication safe without refrigeration?](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=df1e334ff6&e=8249791cac)

---
| |
# RESOURCES
---
|
---
| |
**Jefferson County Extreme Wind Power Outage Information** Jefferson County has created a page to provide the latest information on power outages, weather conditions, fire restrictions, and transportation impacts during the current high-wind and fire-weather emergency. These links are extremely important for staying informed!
* General Information [Webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=2aec0eb89c&e=8249791cac)
* Caution with Food and Medication [Webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=0964073a5d&e=8249791cac)

**City of Arvada Information**
[ News page](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=df955bb345&e=8249791cac)
**American Red Cross** Main Phone Number: 800-733-2767, available 24/7
**Emergency Shelter**
The Xcel Energy Red Trucks will also be at the resource centers providing support and information to customers. Individuals who need food assistance can use the [Find Food Map](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=345b9e5bca&e=8249791cac "https://www.foodbankrockies.org/find-food/") to find a Hunger Relief Partner in communities across the Colorado.
* Evergreen Library – 5000 County Hwy 73, Evergreen, CO 80439 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m.)
* Servicios de la Raza – 3131 W. 14th Ave., Denver, CO 80204 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 12:30 p.m.)
* Belmar Library – 555 S. Allison Parkway, Lakewood, CO 80226 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m.)
* Gilpin County School – 10595 Highway 119, Black Hawk, CO 80422 (Open Until Further Notice)
* Wellspring Catholic Academy - 1100 Upham Street, Lakewood, CO 80214 (Open Until Further Notice)
* Health and Wellness Center - 1969 Miner Street, Idaho Springs, CO 80452 (Open Saturday 9 a.m. to 4 p.m.)

**Boulder County Charging Locations**
* North Boulder Library – 4500 13th St., Boulder. (Open until 7 p.m. on Dec. 18)
* Gunbarrel Library – 6500 Lookout Rd., Gunbarrel. (Open until 7 p.m. on Dec. 18)
* Superior Community Center –1500 Coalton Rd., Superior – this location has 2 EV charging spots. [More info](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=8e1d32341f&e=8249791cac)
* Superior Civic Center – 2250 Main St., Superior – this location has 10 EV charging spots. [More info](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=3fdf1049cd&e=8249791cac)
* Nederland Community Center –750 CO-72 Nederland – No EV charging spots at this location. [More info](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=65d6779919&e=8249791cac)
* Louisville Recreation & Senior Center – 900 West Appia, Louisville – this location has 2 EV charging spots. [More info](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6c0c640013&e=8249791cac)
* Louisville Public Library – 951 Spruce St., Louisville – this location has 2 EV charging spots. [More info](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=7f9bfb3181&e=8249791cac)

For the latest updates, visit [http://BoulderODM.gov](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=51f41455e4&e=8249791cac) or sign up to receive text updates by texting BOCOinfo to 888777.
**City of Arvada Durable Medical Device Charging Location**
* Tentative Hours: Friday, December 19, from 1 - 6 PM.
* Lake Arbor Community Police Station - 8110 Vance Dr, Arvada, CO 80003
* City Hall - 8101 Ralston Rd, Arvada, CO 80002

**General Charging Location**
* Tentative Hours: Friday, December 19, from 9 AM - 8 PM
* Evergreen Fire Protection District, 1802 Bergen Pkwy, Evergreen, CO 80439

---
|
---
| |
# CONTACTS
---
|
---
| | **Report Xcel Electric Outages** Report your [outage online](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=487531a5d7&e=8249791cac).Phone: 800-895-1999.Text OUT to 98936 to report an electric outage. Text STAT to 98936 to check the status of your outage online.[Xcel Newsroom Webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=697f4943e0&e=8249791cac)
**Colorado Public Utilities Commission** PUC’s 911 and electrical incident reporting hotline: 303-894-2528
**Colorado Division of Homeland Security & Emergency Management**Public Information Line: 720-432-2433
**CDOT Road Closures** The Colorado Department of Transportation is urging motorists to prepare for dangerous travel conditions as high winds are forecast to impact the Front Range. Monitor CDOT on [X](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=f6589b0a76&e=8249791cac) for the most up-to-date closures.
**CORE Electric Cooperative** Members in Clear Creek, Jefferson, Park, and Teller counties are currently without service. CORE crews and multiple contractor teams continue to repair broken poles, downed power lines, and equipment damage. Monitoring High Wind Event [Webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=042916a3ec&e=8249791cac)Frequently Asked Questions [Webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=0f8a193bfe&e=8249791cac)
**Greater Arvada Chamber of Commerce** If your business has immediate needs or concerns, please reach out directly to kami@arvadachamber.org or info@arvadachamber.org. They want to understand how these outages may impact your operations and will do their best to support you.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi everyone. I know this is not a regularly scheduled newsletter, but I felt it was important to get one out regarding the ongoing power outages. I know this is an incredibly frustrating and discouraging time. Our office has received an influx of outreach from constituents. Please be patient while we work to get back to you and know we are working hard to find some type of solution to the current system. If you need anything, please contact me via my email brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov, my office phone at (303)-866-2962, or my personal cell at (720)-213-6660. Click here to skip to important resources and here for contacts. | | | GENERAL INFORMATION | | Our office has been in constant contact with Xcel Energy to keep our district informed and advocated for. This is the latest communication we received from them: Xcel Energy enacted a Public Safety Power Shutoff (PSPS) for customers in Boulder, Clear Creek, Gilpin, Jefferson, Larimer and Weld counties. Weather conditions are expected to be severe, and the National Weather Service has issued a Particularly Dangerous Situation (PDS) designation.While some residents may not experience dangerous winds, the electric lines likely travel through communities that do.__Due to the latest forecasts, extreme fire weather conditions are now expected to persist until at least 8 p.m. to 10 p.m. Friday evening, with high winds, causing additional outages, persisting beyond 10 p.m. Even though the high winds will end, power will not be restored immediately. Xcel Energy expects this to be a very severe weather event with unplanned outages expected to significantly exceed the number of customers affected by a PSPS.Restoration activity cannot begin until weather conditions improve, and includes crews visually inspecting lines, assessing and remediating damage, repairing equipment and safely reinitiating power. This process can take hours and days depending on the full and actual scope of damage. Since Wednesday, Xcel Energy crews have restored power to over 200,000 customers. As the winds subside late Friday night, hundreds of crew members will be ready to begin restoration through the weekend. Customers may not have power restored for several days. The safety of our crew members is paramount as they work in your neighborhood to restore power. We ask our customers to help keep our crew members safe as they work diligently to restore power as quickly as possible.PSPS events reduce the risk of wildfires and protect public safety. Xcel Energy uses weather forecasts and other data sources to decide how to best protect the customers and communities it serves. Key factors in calling for a PSPS event include high winds, low relative humidity and dry ground conditions and all are present today. Particularly Dangerous Situation The National Weather Service issued a Particularly Dangerous Situation (PDS) alert associated with today’s Red Flag Warning in Colorado. Conditions are expected to be especially dangerous at elevations between 5500 and 9000 feet in Jefferson and Boulder Counties. This is the most extreme categorization for risk the NWS has, and it is used in rare weather events.Turning off the power is not a decision made lightly, and restoration will begin as soon as it is safe for crews to begin working. This effort could take several days to complete. Crews must inspect power lines and repair damage before they can be safely re-energized. As crews restore power, the public is reminded to give them the space they need to do their job safely and efficiently.Xcel Energy reminds customers there will be unplanned outages outside of the PSPS event due to high wind. Customers should stay clear of any downed power lines and report them, as well as any damage they see to Xcel Energy.Customers who live in areas where power lines are underground, or do not see damage in their immediate area can still be impacted by a PSPS or power outage due to how their neighborhood connects to the larger grid. Additionally, Xcel Energy has recommended that to help ensure you receive timely updates, please make sure your communications preferences are up to date by logging on to . If you live in Arvada, the city has created a with updates on the situation and links to resources, including Xcel's outage map. | | RESOURCES | | | Jefferson County Extreme Wind Power Outage Information Jefferson County has created a page to provide the latest information on power outages, weather conditions, fire restrictions, and transportation impacts during the current high-wind and fire-weather emergency. These links are extremely important for staying informed! General Information Caution with Food and Medication City of Arvada Information American Red Cross Main Phone Number: 800-733-2767, available 24/7 Emergency Shelter The Xcel Energy Red Trucks will also be at the resource centers providing support and information to customers. Individuals who need food assistance can use the "" to find a Hunger Relief Partner in communities across the Colorado. Evergreen Library – 5000 County Hwy 73, Evergreen, CO 80439 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m.) Servicios de la Raza – 3131 W. 14th Ave., Denver, CO 80204 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 12:30 p.m.) Belmar Library – 555 S. Allison Parkway, Lakewood, CO 80226 (Open Thursday from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m.) Gilpin County School – 10595 Highway 119, Black Hawk, CO 80422 (Open Until Further Notice) Wellspring Catholic Academy - 1100 Upham Street, Lakewood, CO 80214 (Open Until Further Notice) Health and Wellness Center - 1969 Miner Street, Idaho Springs, CO 80452 (Open Saturday 9 a.m. to 4 p.m.) Boulder County Charging Locations North Boulder Library – 4500 13th St., Boulder. (Open until 7 p.m. on Dec. 18) Gunbarrel Library – 6500 Lookout Rd., Gunbarrel. (Open until 7 p.m. on Dec. 18) Superior Community Center –1500 Coalton Rd., Superior – this location has 2 EV charging spots. Superior Civic Center – 2250 Main St., Superior – this location has 10 EV charging spots. Nederland Community Center –750 CO-72 Nederland – No EV charging spots at this location. Louisville Recreation & Senior Center – 900 West Appia, Louisville – this location has 2 EV charging spots. Louisville Public Library – 951 Spruce St., Louisville – this location has 2 EV charging spots. For the latest updates, visit or sign up to receive text updates by texting BOCOinfo to 888777. City of Arvada Durable Medical Device Charging Location Tentative Hours: Friday, December 19, from 1 - 6 PM. Lake Arbor Community Police Station - 8110 Vance Dr, Arvada, CO 80003 City Hall - 8101 Ralston Rd, Arvada, CO 80002 General Charging Location Tentative Hours: Friday, December 19, from 9 AM - 8 PM Evergreen Fire Protection District, 1802 Bergen Pkwy, Evergreen, CO 80439 | | | CONTACTS | | | Report Xcel Electric Outages Report your : 800-895-1999.Text OUT to 98936 to report an electric outage. Text STAT to 98936 to check the status of your outage online. Colorado Public Utilities Commission PUC’s 911 and electrical incident reporting hotline: 303-894-2528 Colorado Division of Homeland Security & Emergency ManagementPublic Information Line: 720-432-2433 CDOT Road Closures The Colorado Department of Transportation is urging motorists to prepare for dangerous travel conditions as high winds are forecast to impact the Front Range. Monitor CDOT on for the most up-to-date closures. CORE Electric Cooperative Members in Clear Creek, Jefferson, Park, and Teller counties are currently without service. CORE crews and multiple contractor teams continue to repair broken poles, downed power lines, and equipment damage. Monitoring High Wind Event Asked Questions Greater Arvada Chamber of Commerce If your business has immediate needs or concerns, please reach out directly to kami@arvadachamber.org or info@arvadachamber.org. They want to understand how these outages may impact your operations and will do their best to support you. | | | | | | [Virtual Office Hours]()** 💻 | | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone. Calendly! | | | Can't make it to any of my scheduled events? Don't hesitate to reach out if you have something on your mind or need help finding local resources. I'm just an email or phone call away! mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body= | cell: 720.213.6660 | office: 303.866.2962 | | | FIND ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA! Follow me to stay up to date with news, photos, bill details, events, community resources, and much more! 📲 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The legislative session is over, but my work for you doesn’t stop. This summer, in addition to researching my next round of bills, I’ll be starting my campaign forstate treasurer**! name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Behind closed doors at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251219-61009&t=1001&akid=61009%2E1407376%2EOrlIoW ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251219-61009&t=1002&akid=61009%2E1407376%2EOrlIoW ]Demand Justice PAC

Trump is actively hacking the legal system to hammer in his extremist
agenda through the Supreme Court's emergency docket.

The emergency docket is for emergency cases. It’s in the name.

Yet Trump has the Supreme Court so far in his back pocket that he’s turned
it into a loophole — a fast-track to override lower courts, dodge
accountability, and get whatever outcome he wants, whenever he wants it.

If Trump doesn’t like a ruling, he doesn’t follow the law. He runs to the
Supreme Court and demands an instant decision in his favor behind closed
doors. It’s manipulation plain and simple.

And while shadow docket rulings are supposed to be temporary, their
consequences are anything but. It’s nearly impossible to undo mass
deportations, firings without cause, and racial profiling in immigration
cases.

This is how authoritarian power consolidates — quietly, quickly, and most
alarmingly, with the Court’s blessing.

Demand Justice is calling this out relentlessly. We’re exposing these
abuses and making it impossible for the Court to rubber-stamp
authoritarian power grabs. But this fight only works if our grassroots
movement is strong enough to confront a captured Court. So we’re asking:

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251219.Ymg357&refcode=em20251219-61009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61009%2E1407376%2EOrlIoW ]Will you stand with Demand Justice today by pitching in
$5 right now to help us force transparency, raise the
political cost of these rulings, and defend the rule of law?

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251219.Ymg357&amount=5&refcode=em20251219-61009&t=1022&akid=61009%2E1407376%2EOrlIoW ]Donate $5 ››

No president gets to rewrite the rules, defy the courts, and rule by
emergency decree.

In solidarity,

Demand Justice PAC

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re demanding Dems stop confirming Trump’s cronies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Sign the petition now.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251219-1&t=1&akid=2964%2E587540%2E23MOr_)
Peter, a new report from Demand Justice revealed something disturbing:
_Every single one of Trump’s 2025 judicial nominees when asked has refused to tell the truth about the 2020 election and the January 6th attack on the Capitol._
We’ve come to expect this from Republicans, but it’s somehow even worse that **18 Senate Democrats have voted to confirm at least one of these Trumpist cronies.**
**[Will you add your name to the petition demanding Democrats grow a spine and STOP confirming Trump judges who lie about the 2020 election and January 6?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3947?t=2&akid=2964%2E587540%2E23MOr_)**
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3947?t=3&akid=2964%2E587540%2E23MOr_)**
We’ve been saying it from the start, Peter. As Democrats, we need to offer a real alternative to the authoritarian-friendly GOP. But too many of our elected officials are failing the most basic of tests, unable to stand up and fight when it counts.
We’re building a pipeline of young progressives who are ready to take the torch, but this work takes time. So in the meantime, we need to apply as much pressure as we can to incumbent Democrats who are refusing to push back against Trump.
**Leaders We Deserve is joining Demand Justice to call out this cowardice and tell Senate Democrats that we won’t accept anything less than real opposition.**
**[Sign the petition if you’re with us — demand Democrats oppose Trump judges!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3947?t=4&akid=2964%2E587540%2E23MOr_)**
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3947?t=5&akid=2964%2E587540%2E23MOr_)**
Thank you for adding your voice,
David Hogg

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/2f6759f4-ff9d-4f99-a497-6b0d1ce54709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

Hey folks,
We're back. This one was personal. **Joe Walsh** and I both came back to the mic after a brutal couple of weeks, and we didn't ease into it. We talked health, power, corruption, and why so many people feel like the system just keeps lying to them. This was raw, honest, and absolutely necessary.
Here are a few moments to jump into:
* [**00:01:07**] I explain what actually knocked me out for ten days -- and why ignoring your health is a mistake you don't get to make forever
* [**00:10:15**] The DOJ misses the Epstein deadline -- and why the cover-up is the story, not the delay
* [**00:18:04**] Trump's "working class" myth finally collapses under the weight of prices, lies, and pure elitism
* [**00:27:04**] The DNC audit controversy -- why refusing to release it proves Democrats are still afraid of hard truths
* [**00:38:31**] Bongino gets canned, and we talk about the toxic incentive structure of modern political media

We covered a lot -- Epstein, Trump's economy, Bongino, and a Democratic Party still avoiding the hardest conversations. But at the core, this is about honesty and accountability in a broken system. If you value conversations like this -- real, unscripted, and not afraid of the truth -- help me keep them going by becoming a paid subscriber.

With urgency,
--Mike

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Ray Dalio – one of the most respected investors alive – made a quiet but chilling statement this week.

No bold headlines. No wild predictions. Just a calm warning...

“What’s happening right now feels a lot like the early 1970s.”

At first glance, it might not sound alarming...but smart Americans are taking advantage of one piece of advice...

If you remember what followed the 1970s — runaway inflation, collapsing currency values, and skyrocketing commodity prices — you understand why Dalio’s words sent a shiver through seasoned investors.

He’s seen this movie before.
And this time, he says the ending could be worse.

Because unlike the 1970s...
Today, our national debt is almost $38 trillion.
Our currency is weakening at home and abroad.
And the government’s only solution seems to be printing more money.

Behind closed doors, major institutions are already repositioning.
Central banks are hoarding hard assets at record levels.
