And I'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years. | MTG's resignation isn't the end of the disaster she created -- not yet. If Republicans hold this seat, they 'll elect another extremist determined to follow her lead. Another conspiracy theorist. Another chaos candidate. Another vote for Donald Trump's dangerous agenda. But if we win -- if we flip GA-14 -- we change the direction of Congress and send a message that the era of chaos is over. ~~ ~~ ~~ I'm a fifth-generation farmer and a veteran. I know what service looks like. And I know what leadership looks like. This is our moment to prove that Northwest Georgia is ready for both. Thank you for standing with me, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN HARRIS FOR CONGRESS

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Sanctuary Policies Release Thousands of Violent Criminal Aliens
body:
Will Mexico Control Its Wastewater Flooding into the U.S.?

[INSIDE JW]

VIOLENT CRIMINAL ALIENS RELEASED IN TWO STATES SINCE JANUARY

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36692&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj16cjlSN3JJUW03NCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=11aeffc61020792724acf1fcc12cf0361b15f704a47bdb8726461e865ff73d0d]

Sanctuary policies not only unlawfully interfere with federal
immigration enforcement, but they are also a clear and present danger
to the public safety. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog points out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36675&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVzLXJlbGVhc2UtOTAwMC1jcmltaW5hbC1hbGllbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=456784a5783a4fc8ae960760b9c21bd165450df7830449e0ae5ddb1dc09e4768]
some of the more recent, egregious sanctuary policy failures.

> The Trump administration’s crackdown on illegal immigration has
> made great strides in a short time, but over a dozen states are
> making the effort more difficult by offering illegal aliens—even
> those convicted of serious crimes—sanctuary. Just two of those
> states, New York and Illinois, have released nearly 9,000 criminal
> aliens from jails and prisons since January 20, defying Immigration
> and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detainers to deport them. Among the
> offenders protected by the sanctuary policies are murderers,
> terrorists, sexual predators and kidnappers, the Department of
> Homeland Security (DHS) confirms this month. Almost 7,000 criminal
> aliens
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36693&F=T&&hash=de1102c1bd5b3be8376a29528e2608156a885f1509f9763d65b6dab4c7fecf08]
> flagged by ICE were released from custody in the state of New York
> during the roughly 10-month period examined by DHS. Illinois
> released more than 1,700 criminal aliens
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36694&F=T&&hash=6942d21cefa0b72ead7eaa0a9d185acdad2301f3717bd03fc01816dff6f48cb7]
> from jails and prisons throughout the state rather than turn them
> over to federal authorities for removal. The failure to honor ICE
> detainers has led to “numerous illegal alien murderers, rapists,
> and pedophiles being released
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36695&F=T&&hash=6023fe02a87445dd302373c4a3458401fe7c46ff5f3b27dca68cb98e252e457f
> back into sanctuary communities, Homeland Security officials have
> established.

> In New York, the crimes committed by illegal aliens released since
> the end of January include 29 homicides, 2,509 assaults, 199
> burglaries, 305 robberies, 392 dangerous drugs offenses, 300 weapons
> offenses, and 207 sexual predatory offenses. Among those freed is a
> Turkish Known or Suspected Terrorist (KST) named Selman Cevik who
> was let go after being jailed for first degree menacing and
> harassment, a rapist, Huseyin Aslan, also charged with assault and
> criminal contempt, and two gang members with convictions or charges
> for assault, criminal possession of a weapon and robbery. The list
> is extensive and, alarmingly, the released criminal aliens have been
> replaced with new ones, according to DHS, which reveals that
> currently there are 7,113 criminal aliens in custody in New York
> jails with an active ICE detainer. Their crimes include 148
> homicides, 717 assaults, 134 burglaries, 106 robberies, 235
> dangerous drugs offenses, 152 weapons offenses, and 260 sexual
> predatory offenses. New York Attorney General Letitia James and her
> fellow “sanctuary politicians are releasing murderers, terrorists,
> and sexual predators back into our neighborhoods and putting
> American lives at risk,” said DHS Assistant Secretary for Public
> Affairs, Tricia McLaughlin.

> The same thing is going on in Illinois where Governor JB
> Pritzker’s statewide sanctuary policies have released 1,768
> criminal illegal aliens since January 20 rather than turn them over
> to ICE for removal. The crimes of these aliens include five
> homicides, 141 assaults, 23 burglaries, 4 robberies, 24 dangerous
> drugs offenses, 15 weapons offenses, and 10 sexual predatory
> offenses. Among them is Mexican Victor Manuel Mendoza-Garcia
> convicted of three counts of aggravated kidnapping/ransom and
> sentenced to 18 years by a Cook County Court, Mexican Amilcar Waldo
> Gonzalez-Jimenez, convicted of driving under the influence, domestic
> battery and criminal sexual assault and Mexican Jaime
> Mandujano-Nunez sentenced to 17 years imprisonment after a 2012
> conviction for predatory criminal sex assault of a child in Cook
> County. DHS reveals that there are currently 4,015 illegal
> immigrants in the custody of an Illinois jurisdiction with an active
> ICE detainer. The crimes of these aliens include 51 homicides, 1,134
> assaults, 107 burglaries, 36 robberies, 275 dangerous drugs
> offenses, 120 weapons offenses, and 813 sexual predatory offenses.
> “We are calling on Governor Pritzker and his administration to
> stop this dangerous derangement and commit to honoring the ICE
> arrest detainers of the more than 4,000 criminal illegal aliens in
> Illinois’ custody,” said McLaughlin, pointing out that criminal
> illegal aliens should not be released back into our streets to
> terrorize more innocent Americans.

> Like New York and Illinois, dozens of local governments throughout
> the U.S. shield illegal immigrants by offering sanctuary. Earlier
> this year the Department of Justice (DOJ) published a list
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36696&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2p1c3RpY2UtZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1wdWJsaXNoZXMtbGlzdC1zYW5jdHVhcnktanVyaXNkaWN0aW9uc11vZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=4ff8388235eb2e5093a1909788604fc63f4b99b592072d1c56365c9fa34854f2
> states, cities, and counties identified as having policies, laws, or
> regulations that impede enforcement of federal immigration laws. An
> analysis
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36697&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jaXMub3JnL1ZhdWdoYW4vV2hpY2gtU2FuY3R1YXJ5LUp1cmlzZGljdGlvbnMtSGF2ZS1SZWxlYXNlZC1Nb3N0LUNyaW1pbmFsc11jb25kdWN0ZWQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a5ad020685d6d706e303b4a21a9115f0fbd274a0a094a72fde6982803346cff0
> by the Washington D.C.-based Center for Immigration Studies (CIS)
> reveals that from October 1, 2022, to February 6, 2025, more than
> 25,000 criminal aliens were released from jails and prisons around
> the country. California was by far the biggest offender, releasing
> more than half (13,025) of the alien criminals by declining ICE
> detainers, the CIS probe found.

STEMMING TOXIC WASTE FROM MEXICO

For decades, hundreds of billions of gallons of trash, toxic sewage
and unmanaged stormwater have flooded into the U.S. from Mexico, and
the latest plan to remedy this relies heavily on the source, as our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36688&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvNjMwLW1pbC1wbGFuLWZhaWxzLXRvLXN0b3AtZmxvdy1vZi1zZXdhZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=08d0c43bbbb8a1a273447110fd9d70af541bd1ac146ee199ed0f321a6501b251].

> Just a few years after the U.S. government wasted $630 million
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36698&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLXRvLXNwZW5kLTYzMC1taWxsaW9uLXRvLXN0b3AtZmxvdy1vZi10b3hpYy13YXN0ZS1yYXctc2V3YWdlLWZyb20tbWV4aWNvL11vbj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=00d35798c516fd011a7d0f06dcbee63e483c8f27d9fc3cf2ae874026ca721a47
> a failed plan to stop the constant flow of toxic waste and raw
> sewage that gushes in from Mexico, the Trump administration is
> celebrating a new project it guarantees will finally solve the
> problem though it seems too good to be true. The new initiative,
> disclosed this week by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and
> International Boundary and Water Commission (IBWC), is called Minute
> 333
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36699&F=T&&hash=2f968a435c1cb7eb9af8e6de4f141cabae37e55c474d6c9af95d7deac4341b5e
> is being hailed as a “historic new agreement between the United
> States and Mexico” that will “permanently end the decades-long
> Tijuana River sewage crisis.” The project relies heavily on Mexico
> and does not obligate any additional U.S. taxpayer funding, raising
> serious doubts about its potential to succeed despite the EPA’s
> claims that it is a historic milestone toward implementing 100%
> solution to the Tijuana River sewage crisis that contaminates
> California beaches with high levels of fecal bacteria that pose
> serious health risks and negatively impact marine life.

> Hundreds of billions of gallons of trash, toxic sewage and unmanaged
> stormwater have flooded into the U.S. from Mexico for years and
> Americans have paid exorbitant sums to clean it up. The government
> refers to it as transboundary flow and it contains a combination of
> treated wastewater, untreated wastewater, and stormwater. Around 50
> million gallons
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36700&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXBhLmdvdi9zdXN0YWluYWJsZS13YXRlci1pbmZyYXN0cnVjdHVyZS91c21jYS10aWp1YW5hLXJpdmVyLXdhdGVyc2hlZD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=51824a7c54f37d41106ed670a425630aee913ff4f66694e494c438b9b9d6b022]
> of mostly raw sewage flows into the Pacific Ocean from the San
> Antonio de los Buenos Creek in Tijuana, Mexico, not far from the
> California border, according to the EPA. Northward currents carry
> the discharge up the coast to the U.S. causing marine transboundary
> flows, the agency confirms. During wet-weather events an average of
> 109 million gallons per day flow into the Pacific Ocean via the
> Tijuana River. The contaminated water includes raw sewage, trash
> from Tijuana’s famously polluted urban area and eroded soil from
> the canyons and upstream of the Tijuana River. The contaminated
> flows create significant negative impacts to water quality, public
> health, and the environment.

> This has been going on for decades and the U.S. has paid handsomely
> to mitigate the mess though it has barely put a dent on controlling
> the damage. The constant stream of pollutants has taken a huge toll,
> including negatively impacting public health and beach water quality
> as well as threats to wildlife and U.S. government activities. The
> untreated wastewater contains harmful pathogens that pose risks to
> human health, the EPA disclosed long ago. Sediment, trash, and
> polluted wastewater hurt aquatic and terrestrial wildlife and
> degrades the marine and estuarian habitats that wildlife rely on to
> thrive. The pollution has also made U.S. Military and Customs and
> Border Protection (CBP) personnel quite sick. A few years ago a
> national news outlet visited the region and published a troubling
> piece
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36701&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9yYXctc2V3YWdlLXNvdXRoZXJuLWNhbGlmb3JuaWEtY29hc3QtdGlqdWFuYS1tZXhpY28tNjAtbWludXRlcy0yMDIwLTA1LTMxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=595c8d926ffaec38e470499c5993894521375cf7f84bdba9c352f3a30495eeb0]
> that includes a detailed list of the contaminants in the Tijuana
> River water; “fecal coliforms, drug-resistant bacteria, benzene,
> cadmium, mercury, hexavalent chromium medical waste, and DDT, which
> has been banned for years in the United States.”

> No one can blame the Trump administration for celebrating a proposed
> project to finally stop Mexico’s trash and sewage from seeping
> into the U.S., but some of the details are likely to ignite
> skepticism. For starters, Minute 333 was born out of a Memorandum of
> Understanding
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36702&F=T&&hash=bbdfa1feae96437ede307ebc3ba0e6daf43c24b35fda68d37c7196df374b85ff]

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36703&F=T&&hash=50e81318eb3b273ddf80c64ab99766e67fddf4c9dff51a8a39e13e295c56c34c)
> signed by EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin and his Mexican counterpart,
> Alicia Bárcena Ibarra, in Mexico City over the summer. The MOU says
> Mexico will seek funding to initiate the construction of a mechanism
> to divert treated effluent entering the Tijuana River to an upstream
> site, initiate engineering and financial feasibility of installing
> an ocean outfall in Tijuana and construct and maintain the sediment
> basin at Matadero Canyon before the upcoming rainy season. Also
> known as Smuggler’s Gulch, Matadero Canyon is the U.S.-Mexico
> border area near San Diego and Tijuana well known for illegal
> crossings and wastewater pollution. The commissioner of Mexico’s
> IBWC says the project reiterates her country’s commitments to
> resolve
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36704&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWJ3Yy5nb3Yvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjUvMTIvVVNJQldDLUZpbmFsLVByZXNzLVJlbGVhc2UtVVMtYW5kLU1leGljby1zaWduLU1pbnV0ZS0zMzMucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0906c45837c6e2ca76af7d9970f754e9e3f456f77645aa95ab2375b80039cea6]

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36705&F=T&&hash=e883d160a4a3246f93f32399df24d1edeeac0c81b4654fdaf4f77577f3fed256
> border sanitation problem pursuant to the provisions of the 1944
> Water Treaty. That means it has taken eight decades for Mexico to
> keep its end of the deal if in fact Minute 333 goes as planned.

MERRY CHRISTMAS!

Throughout the year, Judicial Watch engages the government in court to
expose its never-ending efforts to operate behind closed doors. Thanks
to our supporters, we are wrapping up one of the most impactful years
in our 31-year history.

Together, let us celebrate on December 25 the birth of Christ, which
occurred amid the ruthless imposition of government authority. In his
desire
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=36706&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmlibGVnYXRld2F5LmNvbS9wYXNzYWdlLz9zZWFyY2g9THVrZSAyJnZlcnNpb249S0pWJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8a235675b3349134dec06cc61a96697fb626f16e832e3d5e4f4f499b68f1474c]
to
eliminate any contest to the throne, Caesar Augustus mandated a census
to identify anyone who might challenge him. A census was also a first
step in taxing the people.

And so, despite Mary being in her ninth month of pregnancy, she and
Joseph travelled to his home, Bethlehem, a week-long journey of
perhaps 90 miles through treacherous landscape, and it was there that
Jesus was born.

Herod, who ruled over Judea, had been given the title
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=28634&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmlibGVnYXRld2F5LmNvbS9ibG9nLzIwMTcvMTIvd2hvLXdhcy1oZXJvZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=90170448a7981604b4574e9a78209379b15fe104bbb71b1bbd558588bb5448b8]
“King of
the Jews” by Rome, so when the Wise Men from the East used that
title for the Christ child they came to worship, Herod was inflamed.
He demanded that the travelers reveal the location of Jesus, but they
refused.

This infuriated him even more. It took little effort for him to order
the national massacre of all boys under two years old. Warned of this
in a dream, Joseph took Mary and Jesus to Egypt for safekeeping, and
they didn’t return until Herod was dead.

But once again a despotic ruler would influence the Christmas story.
When he heard that Herod’s son Archelaus, who had massacred
thousands of Jews, had assumed control of Judea, Joseph resettled his
family in Nazareth outside of Archelaus’ power.

These tempestuous events echo loudly in our time. We can take from
them the realization that the kings of this earth have no power over
the Truth, and, despite the tribulations of our age, we can genuinely
be of good cheer.

Thank you for your continued support
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5].
All of us at
Judicial Watch pause from our labors in this season to wish you a
Merry Christmas! Our thoughts are also with those celebrating
Hanukkah!

Until next week,

[Contribute]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5]

[32x32x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78428&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bb4bbb83588467f5da69fe03bd3831b0f9cf661939799cc8a525f7b41078c632]

[32x32x2]

clean_body: Will Mexico Control Its Wastewater Flooding into the U.S.? [INSIDE JW] VIOLENT CRIMINAL ALIENS RELEASED IN TWO STATES SINCE JANUARY [] Sanctuary policies not only unlawfully interfere with federal immigration enforcement, but they are also a clear and present danger to the public safety. Our Corruption Chronicles blog points out [] some of the more recent, egregious sanctuary policy failures. The Trump administration’s crackdown on illegal immigration has made great strides in a short time, but over a dozen states are making the effort more difficult by offering illegal aliens—even those convicted of serious crimes—sanctuary. Just two of those states, New York and Illinois, have released nearly 9,000 criminal aliens from jails and prisons since January 20, defying Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detainers to deport them. Among the offenders protected by the sanctuary policies are murderers, terrorists, sexual predators and kidnappers, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) confirms this month. Almost 7,000 criminal aliens [] flagged by ICE were released from custody in the state of New York during the roughly 10-month period examined by DHS. Illinois released more than 1,700 criminal aliens [] from jails and prisons throughout the state rather than turn them over to federal authorities for removal. The failure to honor ICE detainers has led to “numerous illegal alien murderers, rapists, and pedophiles being released [ back into sanctuary communities, Homeland Security officials have established. In New York, the crimes committed by illegal aliens released since the end of January include 29 homicides, 2,509 assaults, 199 burglaries, 305 robberies, 392 dangerous drugs offenses, 300 weapons offenses, and 207 sexual predatory offenses. Among those freed is a Turkish Known or Suspected Terrorist (KST) named Selman Cevik who was let go after being jailed for first degree menacing and harassment, a rapist, Huseyin Aslan, also charged with assault and criminal contempt, and two gang members with convictions or charges for assault, criminal possession of a weapon and robbery. The list is extensive and, alarmingly, the released criminal aliens have been replaced with new ones, according to DHS, which reveals that currently there are 7,113 criminal aliens in custody in New York jails with an active ICE detainer. Their crimes include 148 homicides, 717 assaults, 134 burglaries, 106 robberies, 235 dangerous drugs offenses, 152 weapons offenses, and 260 sexual predatory offenses. New York Attorney General Letitia James and her fellow “sanctuary politicians are releasing murderers, terrorists, and sexual predators back into our neighborhoods and putting American lives at risk,” said DHS Assistant Secretary for Public Affairs, Tricia McLaughlin. The same thing is going on in Illinois where Governor JB Pritzker’s statewide sanctuary policies have released 1,768 criminal illegal aliens since January 20 rather than turn them over to ICE for removal. The crimes of these aliens include five homicides, 141 assaults, 23 burglaries, 4 robberies, 24 dangerous drugs offenses, 15 weapons offenses, and 10 sexual predatory offenses. Among them is Mexican Victor Manuel Mendoza-Garcia convicted of three counts of aggravated kidnapping/ransom and sentenced to 18 years by a Cook County Court, Mexican Amilcar Waldo Gonzalez-Jimenez, convicted of driving under the influence, domestic battery and criminal sexual assault and Mexican Jaime Mandujano-Nunez sentenced to 17 years imprisonment after a 2012 conviction for predatory criminal sex assault of a child in Cook County. DHS reveals that there are currently 4,015 illegal immigrants in the custody of an Illinois jurisdiction with an active ICE detainer. The crimes of these aliens include 51 homicides, 1,134 assaults, 107 burglaries, 36 robberies, 275 dangerous drugs offenses, 120 weapons offenses, and 813 sexual predatory offenses. “We are calling on Governor Pritzker and his administration to stop this dangerous derangement and commit to honoring the ICE arrest detainers of the more than 4,000 criminal illegal aliens in Illinois’ custody,” said McLaughlin, pointing out that criminal illegal aliens should not be released back into our streets to terrorize more innocent Americans. Like New York and Illinois, dozens of local governments throughout the U.S. shield illegal immigrants by offering sanctuary. Earlier this year the Department of Justice (DOJ) published a list [ states, cities, and counties identified as having policies, laws, or regulations that impede enforcement of federal immigration laws. An analysis [ by the Washington D.C.-based Center for Immigration Studies (CIS) reveals that from October 1, 2022, to February 6, 2025, more than 25,000 criminal aliens were released from jails and prisons around the country. California was by far the biggest offender, releasing more than half (13,025) of the alien criminals by declining ICE detainers, the CIS probe found. STEMMING TOXIC WASTE FROM MEXICO For decades, hundreds of billions of gallons of trash, toxic sewage and unmanaged stormwater have flooded into the U.S. from Mexico, and the latest plan to remedy this relies heavily on the source, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Just a few years after the U.S. government wasted $630 million [ a failed plan to stop the constant flow of toxic waste and raw sewage that gushes in from Mexico, the Trump administration is celebrating a new project it guarantees will finally solve the problem though it seems too good to be true. The new initiative, disclosed this week by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and International Boundary and Water Commission (IBWC), is called Minute 333 [ is being hailed as a “historic new agreement between the United States and Mexico” that will “permanently end the decades-long Tijuana River sewage crisis.” The project relies heavily on Mexico and does not obligate any additional U.S. taxpayer funding, raising serious doubts about its potential to succeed despite the EPA’s claims that it is a historic milestone toward implementing 100% solution to the Tijuana River sewage crisis that contaminates California beaches with high levels of fecal bacteria that pose serious health risks and negatively impact marine life. Hundreds of billions of gallons of trash, toxic sewage and unmanaged stormwater have flooded into the U.S. from Mexico for years and Americans have paid exorbitant sums to clean it up. The government refers to it as transboundary flow and it contains a combination of treated wastewater, untreated wastewater, and stormwater. Around 50 million gallons [] of mostly raw sewage flows into the Pacific Ocean from the San Antonio de los Buenos Creek in Tijuana, Mexico, not far from the California border, according to the EPA. Northward currents carry the discharge up the coast to the U.S. causing marine transboundary flows, the agency confirms. During wet-weather events an average of 109 million gallons per day flow into the Pacific Ocean via the Tijuana River. The contaminated water includes raw sewage, trash from Tijuana’s famously polluted urban area and eroded soil from the canyons and upstream of the Tijuana River. The contaminated flows create significant negative impacts to water quality, public health, and the environment. This has been going on for decades and the U.S. has paid handsomely to mitigate the mess though it has barely put a dent on controlling the damage. The constant stream of pollutants has taken a huge toll, including negatively impacting public health and beach water quality as well as threats to wildlife and U.S. government activities. The untreated wastewater contains harmful pathogens that pose risks to human health, the EPA disclosed long ago. Sediment, trash, and polluted wastewater hurt aquatic and terrestrial wildlife and degrades the marine and estuarian habitats that wildlife rely on to thrive. The pollution has also made U.S. Military and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) personnel quite sick. A few years ago a national news outlet visited the region and published a troubling piece [] that includes a detailed list of the contaminants in the Tijuana River water; “fecal coliforms, drug-resistant bacteria, benzene, cadmium, mercury, hexavalent chromium medical waste, and DDT, which has been banned for years in the United States.” No one can blame the Trump administration for celebrating a proposed project to finally stop Mexico’s trash and sewage from seeping into the U.S., but some of the details are likely to ignite skepticism. For starters, Minute 333 was born out of a Memorandum of Understanding [] [) signed by EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin and his Mexican counterpart, Alicia Bárcena Ibarra, in Mexico City over the summer. The MOU says Mexico will seek funding to initiate the construction of a mechanism to divert treated effluent entering the Tijuana River to an upstream site, initiate engineering and financial feasibility of installing an ocean outfall in Tijuana and construct and maintain the sediment basin at Matadero Canyon before the upcoming rainy season. Also known as Smuggler’s Gulch, Matadero Canyon is the U.S.-Mexico border area near San Diego and Tijuana well known for illegal crossings and wastewater pollution. The commissioner of Mexico’s IBWC says the project reiterates her country’s commitments to resolve [] [ border sanitation problem pursuant to the provisions of the 1944 Water Treaty. That means it has taken eight decades for Mexico to keep its end of the deal if in fact Minute 333 goes as planned. MERRY CHRISTMAS! Throughout the year, Judicial Watch engages the government in court to expose its never-ending efforts to operate behind closed doors. Thanks to our supporters, we are wrapping up one of the most impactful years in our 31-year history. Together, let us celebrate on December 25 the birth of Christ, which occurred amid the ruthless imposition of government authority. In his desire [] to eliminate any contest to the throne, Caesar Augustus mandated a census to identify anyone who might challenge him. A census was also a first step in taxing the people. And so, despite Mary being in her ninth month of pregnancy, she and Joseph travelled to his home, Bethlehem, a week-long journey of perhaps 90 miles through treacherous landscape, and it was there that Jesus was born. Herod, who ruled over Judea, had been given the title [] “King of the Jews” by Rome, so when the Wise Men from the East used that title for the Christ child they came to worship, Herod was inflamed. He demanded that the travelers reveal the location of Jesus, but they refused. This infuriated him even more. It took little effort for him to order the national massacre of all boys under two years old. Warned of this in a dream, Joseph took Mary and Jesus to Egypt for safekeeping, and they didn’t return until Herod was dead. But once again a despotic ruler would influence the Christmas story. When he heard that Herod’s son Archelaus, who had massacred thousands of Jews, had assumed control of Judea, Joseph resettled his family in Nazareth outside of Archelaus’ power. These tempestuous events echo loudly in our time. We can take from them the realization that the kings of this earth have no power over the Truth, and, despite the tribulations of our age, we can genuinely be of good cheer. Thank you for your continued support []. All of us at Judicial Watch pause from our labors in this season to wish you a Merry Christmas! Our thoughts are also with those celebrating Hanukkah! name: Turning Point PAC
subject: Losing is NOT an option.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
We're turning Charlie's warning into the votes that save America
| | | | [View as Web Page](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvc2hHVXZFamd0cQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNlg0VGdaMzVscw/gaUXliA/s5m5338b36c)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)
| | Patriot,
---
Charlie always said conservatives lose because we bring signs to a ballot fight.

**No more.
**
For too long, the radical left has dominated the ground game—building massive operations to identify disengaged voters, register them, chase their ballots relentlessly, and cure any issues to ensure every possible vote counts.

They've had a decade-long head start, pouring billions into these efforts while conservatives relied on rallies and enthusiasm alone. **[That ends now.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)**
In 2026, Turning Point PAC is deploying _**thousands of paid ballot chasers**_ across every key battleground state—the largest and most sophisticated conservative ballot-chasing operation ever built.

We're not just matching the left; we're surpassing them with better data, cutting-edge technology, and patriots who truly love this country.

**Here's exactly how we're doing it:
**
\- **Identifying low-propensity America First voters:** Using advanced targeting to find every patriot who supports our values but doesn't always vote.
\- **Registering unregistered conservatives:** Getting them signed up and ready to make their voices heard.
\- **Building authentic, one-on-one relationships:** Through millions of door knocks, phone calls, and texts—prioritizing personal connections over impersonal blasts.
\- **Chasing and tracking ballots:** With our proprietary first-of-its-kind mobile app that provides optimal routes, detailed scripts, early ballot detection, and real-time tracking to ensure submissions.
\- **Curing issues relentlessly** : Following up on every problematic ballot until it's fixed and counted.
[KEEP AMERICA GREAT FOREVER >> ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)
This is the hard, gritty work: door-to-door mobilization, call after call, text after text—securing power the way the left has for decades, but faster, smarter, and with unwavering conviction.

Just look at what we proved in 2024: We launched the first truly robust conservative ballot-chasing program, deploying thousands of chasers and perfecting our data and tech.

_In Arizona alone, we chased over**315,000** ballots and built more than 400,000 voter relationships. We turned the tide in key states—and now we're scaling it even bigger for 2026.
_
We're laser-focused on the decisive swing states: AZ, GA, NV, PA, WI, and MI. Operations are expanding every single week, building the permanent grassroots infrastructure needed to dominate elections not just in 2026, but in 2028 and beyond.

**This is how we construct the unbreakable Red Wall—a fortress of banked votes that no Democrat can ever breach again.
**
The left is already panicking. They know what's coming: a conservative machine that's finally playing—and winning—the ballot game on their terms.

[_**Be the patriot who can say you helped fund this historic turnaround.**_**
**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)
[_**Your immediate support today**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641) arms our paid chasers in the field, fuels the app and tech that track every ballot, and banks the votes that will secure Republican majorities and protect the America First agenda for generations.
[SUPPORT WITH $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)
[SUPPORT WITH $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)
[SUPPORT WITH $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17383596/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0xX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIxNy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29ZZQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNDJfd3Ix/gaUXliA/s0o97471641)

Turning Point Action Team

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
| | **_Paid for by Turning Point PAC_**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Have you heard the news?
body:
[1]LeftNet

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251219_partner_ms_wes_em_leftnet.b3MEu6&refcode=em20251219-1413&t=1001&akid=1413%2E2118727%2EGyIRQo ][IMG]

Hi, you probably already
heard the news: I’m running for reelection for Governor of Maryland.

Together, we’ve proven that progress is possible when we put people first.
But Donald Trump is doubling down to push his agenda – and he’s already
coming after states like ours and Democratic governors like me.

That’s why I’m running: because Maryland needs a governor who will stand
up to Trump’s dangerous threats and protect the progress we’ve made
together.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251219_partner_ms_wes_em_leftnet.b3MEu6&refcode=em20251219-1413&t=1002&akid=1413%2E2118727%2EGyIRQo ]Will you chip in to our campaign today to prove we won’t bow down to
bullies and we’ll stand up for everyone?

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251219_partner_ms_wes_em_leftnet.b3MEu6&refcode=em20251219-1413&t=1003&akid=1413%2E2118727%2EGyIRQo ]DONATE ››

Trump and Republicans in Washington are trying to erase our hard-fought
progress, and Republicans are testing a whole field of candidates to try
to defeat me. Former governor Larry Hogan, Andy Harris, and even some guy
named Ed Hale could run against me with millions in spending behind them.

I need you if we’re
going to be able to fight back. That’s why I have to ask:

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251219_partner_ms_wes_em_leftnet.b3MEu6&refcode=em20251219-1413&t=1004&akid=1413%2E2118727%2EGyIRQo ]Please, join our movement by making a contribution to our reelection
campaign today. It will directly power our fight to leave no one behind.

Thanks for being on this team!

Elevate,

Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1413%2E2118727%2EGyIRQo

name: MGP
subject: One more note from me
body:
| | Peter – Just sending a quick note before I sign off for the night.

I know this time of year is hectic. Between holiday travel, tight budgets, and everything else life throws at us, political fundraising is probably the last thing on anyone’s mind.

But, staying on track now gives us a fighting chance heading into our big Dec. 31 FEC deadline.

If you can spare a few dollars tonight, it would go a long way:

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/december-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121631278/590080944/-1021815558?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251219_2_5&refcode2=5b71cc92-36dd-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjcxY2M5Mi0zNmRkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFIjiXRn4RPshtK-CtaH_0YYrbtTbikIroSb-KWTgqw=)

Thanks for sticking with me, truly.

– Marie

subject: FWD: fwd: Ketanji Brown Jackson just changed EVERYTHING!!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) Team,

We’re following up because [**_we still haven’t seen your name_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=3&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) on our petition supporting Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson.

We reached out to YOU specifically because you’ve always stepped up when it mattered most — and Justice Jackson needs Democrats like you in her corner right now.

_But it looks like we never received your response...?_

[**So we’re trying again to make sure nothing slipped through the cracks.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=4&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) [**Please add your signature to our petition right away to stand with Justice Jackson and push back against Donald Trump’s authoritarian power grabs → →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=5&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) | [ADD YOUR NAME: STAND WITH JUSTICE JACKSON →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=6&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
Look, Justice Jackson is standing up to Trump’s extremist Supreme Court, and she must know that grassroots Democrats stand firmly with her.

We’re counting on you.

Fight For Reform

**\------FORWARDED MESSAGE------**

Hey, did you miss our email regarding Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson in your inbox?

We emailed YOU _specifically_ to add your name to our petition to stand with Justice Jackson against Trump, because we knew we could count on a good Democrat like you to step up.

[_**But you never responded?!**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=7&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)

[**So, we are reaching out again to make sure that it gets through this time.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=8&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)

Justice Jackson is fighting back against Trump’s far-right conservative Supreme Court and she needs to know that we stand behind her!!!

[**Add your name to our petition now to stand with her and fight back against Donald Trump and his authoritarian power grabs →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=9&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=10&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=11&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
Hope to see your name this time,

Fight For Reform

**-—---FORWARDED MESSAGE—----**

[ **LOOK, you need to see this →→→ ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=12&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[ [**REMARKABLE: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s far-right Supreme Court after they ruled to limit the power of federal judges in favor of Donald Trump.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=14&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)

[**Team, we NEED to let Justice Jackson know that we AGREE and couldn’t be more proud of her! Sign our petition now to stand with Justice Jackson >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=15&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69362?t=13&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=16&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=17&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[ **Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is calling OUT Trump’s Supreme Court: **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=18&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=19&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
* * *
Donald Trump is acting like a [**DICTATOR**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=20&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) and Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch are empowering him every step of the way.

Over and over again he pushes the boundaries of the law and then [**DEFIES**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=21&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) the rulings of judges simply because he doesn't agree with them. [**It’s totally illegal, and Donald Trump shouldn’t be above the law.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=22&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)

[**The stakes are high, team. If we don’t fight back against these authoritarian tactics RIGHT NOW, our democracy will be at serious risk of collapse. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=23&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[ **If you agree with Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, add your name to our petition now to stand with her and fight back against Donald Trump and his authoritarian power grabs → ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=24&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71126?t=25&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
If we fail to act now, we could lose everything.

In this together,

Fight for Reform
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=26&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=27&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---

If you'd like to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=29&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)**
Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court's 2010 _Citizens United v. FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=30&refcode2=23753_4449941_Hnr3fO&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=31&refcode2=23753_4449941_Hnr3fO&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=32&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)**
If you'd like to donate to support our efforts, please **[click here:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=33&refcode2=23753_4449941_Hnr3fO&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)**
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=34&refcode2=23753_4449941_Hnr3fO&akid=23753%2E4449941%2EHnr3fO)
---
| [LIKE US ON FACEBOOK →](https://www.facebook.com/FightForReform)
---
| [FOLLOW US ON TWITTER →](https://twitter.com/For_Reform)
---
From the entire Fight For Reform team, thanks for your support!
